label:
PF2E 欧塔里疑云（TiO）增强版海滩营地，作者 Wise
PF2E Troubles in Otari (TiO) Enhanced Beach Camp by Wise

PF2E Troubles in Otari Beach Camp.name: PF2E 奥塔里麻烦事：海滩营地 PF2E Troubles in Otari Beach Camp
PF2E Troubles in Otari Beach Camp.description:
这些地图（3）适用于从 Paizo 购买的独立冒险《Troubles in Otari》（TiO），供 2 级 PC 使用。虽然其中许多地图并不要求必须拥有该冒险，但仍强烈建议购买，因为它为英雄最终达到 2 级的 Beginner Box（BB）战役提供了一个很好的衔接转折。同时也建议 GM 购买 PF2E Bestiary（本冒险支持使用它们）。

仅“Beach Camp Encounter Only”地图需要 Adventure Path，但 “Beaten Forest Path” 和可升级地图可以用于任何冒险故事。完成 TiO 第 1 章后，英雄们将达到 3 级，而 Tamily 会将 Beach Camp 交给他们作为“行动基地”。

这个冒险允许 PC 将 Beach Camp “升级”为他们的“行动基地”！其中包含对 Paizo 某些子系统和工具的引用，用于在英雄们清理、修缮、装饰并强化 Beach Camp，使其真正成为“行动基地”的过程中进行追踪并为他们提供增益。

当然，作为 GM，你也可以将这张可升级地图用于任何你想为玩家提供替代性成长方式或奖励的冒险中。

注意：Beaten Forest Path 并非基于先前作品。其余两张地图确实对 Paizo 提供的 pdf 附带地图做了些微改动，只是为了给这处地点提供更多延展空间（以及一个合适的洗澡地点！）

These maps (3) work with the standalone adventure "Troubles in Otari" (TiO) purchased from Paizo for Level 2 PCs. While many of the maps do not require that Adventure, it is highly recommended to purchase it as it offers a nice pivot from the Beginner Box (BB) Campaign where the heroes end up at Level 2. It is also recommended, GM's purchase the PF2E Bestiary (this Adventure supports them).

The Beach Camp Encounter Only map will require the Adventure Path, but the Beaten Forest Path and the Upgradeable Map can work with any adventure story. After completing Chapter 1 of TiO, the heroes will be Level 3 and Tamily gives them the Beach Camp as a "Base of Operations."

This Adventure allows the PCs to "upgrade" the Beach Camp into thheir "Base of Operations!" It includes references to some of Paizo's subsystems and tools to track and provide perks to the heroes as they clean, repair, decorate, and enhance the Beach Camp to a true "Base of Operations!"

Naturally, as the GM, you can use this upgradable map for any adventure where you want to provide the players with alternative progression or rewards.

Note: The Beaten Forest Path is not based on previous work. The other two maps do include a slight alteration to the pdf supplied map from Paizo simply to provide more extension to the property (and a proper place to bathe!)
PF2E Troubles in Otari Beach Camp.caption:
从你的行动基地眺望海岸景色！
Costal view from your Base of Operations!

Boar Charge.name: 野猪冲锋 Boar Charge
Boar Charge.description:
野猪先后两次Stride，然后进行一次獠牙Strike。只要它至少移动了20尺，它的攻击掷骰就获得+2环境加值。

在大成功攻击时：造成正常伤害，但英雄会被撞得单膝跪地或一屁股坐倒，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

The boar Strides twice and then makes a tusk Strike. As long as it moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its attack roll.

On Critical Strike: Normal Damage, but hero is knocked to a knee or on their bum and is  @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

Boar.publicNotes:
野猪是杂食性哺乳动物，因其肉被视为珍馐而遭到大量猎捕。野猪最可能在自卫时，或是在冬季的交配季节攻击类人生物；此时雄性会长出额外一英寸厚的组织，以在与竞争对手搏斗时保护其器官。当然，在某些文化中，野猪会被训练得更具攻击性，以承担战兽与守卫的角色。当这样的野猪逃回野外后，便可能成为当地真正的恐怖之源。

虽然家猪是农场生活中不可或缺的一部分，但野猪要危险得多。脾气恶劣的疣猪相对常见，而那些被称为巨齿兽的笨重远古野兽则少见得多。野猪食量惊人，能够蹂躏它们栖息的乡野。野猪繁殖力很强，一对野猪很快就能发展成一个庞大的家族。野猪尤其令农夫头疼，因为它们会闯入粮仓，并拱翻菜园来满足自己的饥饿。

Boars are omnivorous mammals, hunted heavily because their meat is considered a delicacy. Boars are most likely to attack humanoids either in self-defense or during their mating season in the winter months, when the males grow an extra inch of tissue to protect their organs as they fight off rivals. Of course, in some cultures boars are trained to become much more aggressive so they can fill the roles of warbeast and guardian. When such boars escape back into the wild, they can become true terrors of the region.

While domesticated pigs are a staple of farm life, wild boars are much more dangerous. Foul-tempered warthogs are relatively common, while the lumbering, primeval beasts known as daeodons are less so. Voracious eaters, boars can ravage the countryside in which they live. Boars breed freely, and a pair of boars can rapidly grow to a large family. Boars are a particular nuisance to farmers, as they break into food stores and root through gardens to sate their hunger.

Goblin Commando.name: 地精突击兵 Goblin Commando

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，能在提供一定防护的同时保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精奔窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
触发 一个哥布林盟友以与该哥布林相邻的位置结束一个移动动作。

效果 该哥布林 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{步移}。

Trigger A goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin.

Effect The goblin @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.UHpkTuCtyaPqiCAB]{Steps}.

Goblin Commando.publicNotes:
地精突袭队名义上的首领被称为地精突击队员。实际上，一旦战斗开始，地精突击队员很少会继续率领他们的同伴。大多数都会逃避职责，转而冲入混战之中，从部族同胞那里为自己赢得更多荣耀。

这些小型类人生物有着绿色或灰色的皮肤，以及长着宽大耳朵的大脑袋。虽然有些地精已经开化，并努力成为类人社区中受人尊敬的一员，但大多数地精都是鲁莽而残忍的生物，以制造浩劫为乐。这些地精毫不在乎屠杀家畜、偷走婴儿，或仅仅为了片刻的快意就烧毁一栋建筑。他们还热衷于对那些更高大的类人生物施展恶毒的恶作剧，并称其为“长腿鬼”。

地精十分迷信，对魔法怀有强烈的敬畏，并且痴迷于火焰；能够掌握魔法或火焰的地精会赢得同族极高的尊敬。大多数其他类人生物都很难理解地精的思维方式：他们憎恨犬类，却乐于与所谓的“地精狗”共享巢穴；他们会无畏地攻击体型更大的生物，却又对马匹恐惧万分；他们厌恶蔬菜，却把腌黄瓜视为美味佳肴。当然，对地精来说，这些全都是完全合情合理的生活选择。

The theoretical leaders of goblin raids are called goblin commandos. In practice, goblin commandos rarely continue to lead their comrades once a battle has begun. Most shirk their responsibilities in favor of wading into the fray and claiming more glory from their tribe-mates.

These small humanoids have green or gray skin and large heads with wide ears. While some goblins are civilized and have worked hard to be considered upstanding members of humanoid communities, most are impetuous and vicious creatures who delight in wreaking havoc. These goblins think nothing of slaughtering livestock, stealing infants, or burning down a building purely for momentary delight. They revel in playing malicious tricks on taller humanoids, whom they call "longshanks."

Goblins are superstitious, with an intense awe of magic and a fascination with fire; goblins who master magic or fire earn great respect from their kin. Most other humanoids find it difficult to understand goblins' outlook: they hate canines but eagerly share their lairs with so-called "goblin dogs," they fearlessly attack larger creatures but are terrified of horses, and they despise vegetables yet consider pickles a delicacy. To a goblin, of course, these are all perfectly sensible life choices.

Goblin Commando (Captain).publicNotes:
地精袭击队在理论上的领导者被称为地精突击队员。但在实际中，一旦战斗开始，地精突击队员很少会继续带领他们的同伴。大多数都会逃避自己的职责，转而冲入战团，从部族同伴那里为自己赢得更多荣耀。

这些小型类人生物有着绿色或灰色的皮肤，以及长着宽大耳朵的大脑袋。虽然有些地精已经开化，并努力让自己被视为类人社区中品行端正的一员，但大多数地精都是冲动而凶残的生物，以制造浩劫为乐。这些地精根本不把屠杀牲畜、偷走婴儿，或仅仅为了一时取乐就烧毁一栋建筑当回事。他们热衷于对那些更高大的类人生物耍恶毒的把戏，并称其为“长腿鬼”。

地精十分迷信，对魔法怀有强烈的敬畏，并痴迷于火焰；掌握魔法或火焰的地精会赢得同族的极大尊敬。大多数其他类人生物都很难理解地精的想法：他们憎恨犬类，却又乐于与所谓的“地精狗”共享巢穴；他们会无畏地攻击体型更大的生物，却又对马匹恐惧万分；他们厌恶蔬菜，却把腌黄瓜视为美味佳肴。当然，对地精而言，这些全都是再合理不过的人生选择。

The theoretical leaders of goblin raids are called goblin commandos. In practice, goblin commandos rarely continue to lead their comrades once a battle has begun. Most shirk their responsibilities in favor of wading into the fray and claiming more glory from their tribe-mates.

These small humanoids have green or gray skin and large heads with wide ears. While some goblins are civilized and have worked hard to be considered upstanding members of humanoid communities, most are impetuous and vicious creatures who delight in wreaking havoc. These goblins think nothing of slaughtering livestock, stealing infants, or burning down a building purely for momentary delight. They revel in playing malicious tricks on taller humanoids, whom they call "longshanks."

Goblins are superstitious, with an intense awe of magic and a fascination with fire; goblins who master magic or fire earn great respect from their kin. Most other humanoids find it difficult to understand goblins' outlook: they hate canines but eagerly share their lairs with so-called "goblin dogs," they fearlessly attack larger creatures but are terrified of horses, and they despise vegetables yet consider pickles a delicacy. To a goblin, of course, these are all perfectly sensible life choices.

Goblin Trip Wire - Remaster.name: 地精绊线 - Remaster Goblin Trip Wire - Remaster

Snarl.name: 咆哮 Snarl
Snarl.description:
触发 一个生物穿过绊线

效果 绊线勒进该生物的脚踝，使其失去平衡（之后必须重置）。触发该陷阱的生物必须进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] 豁免。

  • 大成功：生物避开绊线并流畅地继续移动
  • 成功：生物避开绊线，但获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，直到其下个回合开始
  • 失败：生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，直到其下个回合开始
  • 大失败： 失败的效果，外加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤 1}

Trigger A creature crosses the trip wire

Effect The trip wire digs into the anchles of the creature throwing them off balance (it must be reset). The triggering creature must mak a @Check[type:reflex|dc:18] save.

  • Critical Success: Creature avoids the trip wire and continues in fluid movement
  • Success: Creature avoids the trip wire but gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until beginning of their next turn
  • Failure: Creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and gains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} until beginning of their next turn
  • Critical Failure: Failure condition plus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

Goblin Trip Wire - Remaster.disable:
@Check[type:thievery|dc:17]（受训）以破坏锚定机构，使绊线松开。

@Check[type:acrobatics|dc:18] 以在正确的时机跳过绊线

这两个动作都是预先采取的，因此可以防止Snarl 反应动作被触发。

@Check[type:thievery|dc:17] (trained) to break the anchor mechanism lossening the wire.

@Check[type:acrobatics|dc:18] to jump over the trip wire at the right time

Both of these actions are proactive which prevent Snarl reaction to trigger.
Goblin Trip Wire - Remaster.hazarddescription:
一根粗厚的带刺铁丝横跨过道，恰好处在会撕裂脚踝的高度。

A thick barbed wire stretches across the passageway at the perfect height to tear into ankles.
Goblin Trip Wire - Remaster.reset:
启动：2 交互

一个生物用双手将松弛的绳索穿过锚点拉紧，以便在恰当的时机收紧它。

Activate: 2 Interact

A creature pulls the slack through the anchor with both hands to tighten it at the right moment.
Goblin Trip Wire - Remaster.stealthdetails:
（受训）- 在被设定之前，只要其距离在你地面速度的 2 倍以内

（未受训，DC18）- 在一次绊摔他人的尝试成功或失败后，只要其距离在你地面速度以内

(trained) - prior to being set as long as it is within distance of 2x your land speed

(untrained, DC18) - after a single attempt to trip someone succeeds or fails as long as it is within distance of your land speed

Universal Upgrade Switches.prototypeToken: 通用升级开关 Universal Upgrade Switches

Blue Finley.name: 布鲁·芬利 Blue Finley

Site Bound.name: 场地缚灵 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
典型的幽魂只能在它被杀死之处或其萦绕之地附近短距离游荡。典型的限制是120尺。还有一些幽魂并非受缚于某个地点，而是受缚于对它而言具有特殊意义的房间、建筑、物品或生物。

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 回春 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
纠正导致这名平民死亡的不公，便能让其前往来世。

当一个幽灵被摧毁时，它会在其所缚之地于 [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天} 后重新形成，并完全恢复。只有当有人查明其存在的原因，并纠正阻止该灵魂安息的一切时，幽灵才能被永久摧毁。

Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner's death allows it to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Frightful Moan.name: 惊惧哀嚎 Frightful Moan
Frightful Moan.description:
幽灵哀叹自身的命运，迫使 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30尺}内的每个活着的生物尝试进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免。失败时，生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}（若为大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}）。成功时，生物在1分钟内暂时免疫该幽灵的惊怖哀号。

The ghost laments its fate, forcing each living creature within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save. On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure). On a success, a creature is temporarily immune to this ghost's frightful moan for 1 minute.

Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the.name: 居所知识（适用于该幽灵所缚系之处） Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the ghost is bound to)

Blue Finley.publicNotes:
幽灵平民是一个普通人，认为自己死得不公，通常是由于谋害或背叛。

当一些凡人因悲剧性的境遇死去，或带着未了之事离世时，他们可能会在世间徘徊不去。这些痛苦的灵魂会萦绕在一处对他们生前意义重大的地方，不断试图纠正他们所认为的错误或恶行。

The ghost commoner is an ordinary person who believes they died unjustly, usually due to foul play or betrayal.

When some mortals die through tragic circumstances or without closure, they can linger on in the world. These anguished souls haunt a locale significant to them in life, constantly trying to right their perceived wrong or wrongdoings.

Collapsing Porch.name: 坍塌门廊 Collapsing Porch
Collapsing Porch.tokenName: 坍塌门廊危害 Collapsing Porch Hazard

Collapse.name: 坍塌 Collapse
Collapse.description:
触发 一个生物走上脆弱的地板。

效果 触发生物穿过脆弱的地板坠落到凹凸不平的岩石和锋利的木片上，受到1d4点穿刺伤害和1d6点钝击伤害。该生物可以使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{抓住边缘}反应动作（）来避免坠落。

Trigger A creature walks onto the weak floor.

Effect The triggering creature falls through the weakened floorboards onto uneven rocks and sharp shards of wood, taking 1d4 piercing damage and 1d6 bludgeoning damage.That creature can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge} reaction to avoid falling.

Collapsing Porch.disable:
@Check[type:crafting|dc:15|name:移除活板门] 以移除活板门

@Check[type:crafting|dc:15|name:Remove the Trapdoor] to remove the trapdoor
Collapsing Porch.hazarddescription:
一段满是碎裂木刺且腐朽的地板会使一个生物坠落6英尺，落到凹凸不平的岩石和尖锐的木片上。 

A section of splintery and rotten floorboards drop a creature 6 feet onto uneven rocks and piercing shards of wood.
Collapsing Porch.reset:
一旦门廊的这一部分坍塌，生物仍然可能从这个洞里掉下去，直到门廊被修复为止。

Once this section of the porch has collapsed, creatures can still fall through the hole until the porch is Repaired.
Collapsing Porch.stealthdetails:
（如果活板门被禁用或损坏，则为 0）

(or 0 if the trapdoor is disabled or broken)
Collapsing Porch.prototypeToken: 坍塌门廊危害 Collapsing Porch Hazard

Crocodile.name: 鳄鱼 Crocodile

Deep Breath.name: 深呼吸 Deep Breath
Deep Breath.description:
鳄鱼可以闭气约2小时。

The crocodile can hold its breath for about 2 hours.

Death Roll.name: 死亡翻滚 Death Roll
Death Roll.description:
需求 鳄鱼必须已将一个生物置于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓住} 状态。

效果 鳄鱼收起四肢并快速翻滚，扭转它的受害者。它对被抓住的生物进行一次颚部打击，且此次攻击掷骰获得+2环境加值。若命中，它还会使该生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。若失败，则它会释放该生物。

Requirements The crocodile must have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}.

Effect The crocodile tucks its legs and rolls rapidly, twisting its victim. It makes a jaws Strike with a +2 circumstance bonus to the attack roll against the grabbed creature. If it hits, it also knocks the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If it fails, it releases the creature.

Crocodile.publicNotes:
鳄鱼常见于河岸上晒太阳、潜伏在沼泽中，或漂浮在湖面上。从远处看，它们通常与原木无异——至少在它们发动攻击之前如此。短吻鳄的属性数据与之类似，但由于它们往往生活在更为温和的气候中，因此更能忍受寒冷。与短吻鳄不同，鳄鱼能够耐受咸水。两者都是强大的掠食者，很可能会吞食那些不注意脚下、因而疏于防备的冒险者。

鳄鱼外形强健而充满远古气息，是危险的自然掠食者，栖息于沼泽、河床、湿地，以及其他各类湿润地带。

Crocodiles can be found basking on riverbanks, lurking in swamps, or floating in lakes. They are usually are indistinguishable from logs when viewed from afar-at least until they attack. Alligators have similar statistics, but because they often live in more temperate climates, they endure cold temperatures better. Unlike alligators, crocodiles can tolerate salt water. Both are formidable predators that are likely to devour careless adventurers who fail to watch where they step.

Powerful and primeval in appearance, crocodiles are dangerous natural predators that dwell in marshes, riverbeds, swamps, and other wetlands.

Giant Centipede.name: 巨型蜈蚣 Giant Centipede

Giant Centipede Venom.name: 巨型蜈蚣毒液 Giant Centipede Venom
Giant Centipede Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害（1轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d8[poison]]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1轮）

阶段 3 [[/r 1d12[poison]]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，以及措手不及（1轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d8[poison]]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 3 [[/r 1d12[poison]]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and off-guard (1 round)

Giant Centipede.publicNotes:
大多数巨型蜈蚣会小群结巢，但在寻找食物时会单独猎食。试图驯化巨型蜈蚣并将其用作守卫或宠物，通常都会以糟糕的结果告终，但一些地精、狗头人和米特弗利特部族已经发展出了有效利用这些害虫作为守卫的方法。其他部族和一些类人生物社会则会将蜈蚣烤来吃，常配以辛辣的椒类作为一道人间美味，不过在准备这道食物时必须小心，以免生物的毒液污染其肉质。

蜈蚣是生活在粪便和腐屑中的猎食者与食腐者，是冒险者经常遭遇且常被厌恶的威胁。它们靠着连接在细长分节身躯上的数十条腿，以惊人的速度四处窜行，用带毒的大颚发动攻击，以凶恶的毒素减缓并折磨猎物，随后才安顿下来，慢吞吞且令人作呕地享用猎物。

Most giant centipedes nest in small groups but hunt alone when they seek out food. Attempts to domesticate giant centipedes for use as guardians or pets generally end poorly, but some tribes of goblins, kobolds, and mitflits have developed effective methods of utilizing these vermin as guardians. Other tribes and some humanoid societies roast and eat centipedes, often with pungent peppers as a savory delicacy, although care must be taken in preparing the meal to avoid tainting the flesh with the creature's venom.

Hunters and scavengers that live amid dung and detritus, centipedes are a relatively common and often reviled threat faced by adventurers. Scurrying about with surprising speed on the scores of legs attached to their long, segmented bodies, centipedes strike with poisoned mandibles to slow and torment their prey with a vicious toxin before they settle down to feed in slow and disgusting leisure.

Giant Rat.name: 巨鼠 Giant Rat

Filth Fever.name: 污秽热病 Filth Fever
Filth Fever.description:
因污秽热导致的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 状态，在疾病被治愈前不会自行改善。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良影响（[[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4小时}）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1天）

阶段 3 恶心 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1天）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}（1天）

阶段 5 死亡

The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions from filth fever don't improve on their own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect ([[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours})

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 Sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 day)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 5 dead

Giant Rat.publicNotes:
老鼠是无处不在的祸患，穿梭于下水道与世界上几乎每个聚居地的街道之中。虽然一只普通老鼠从脚边窜过，可能只会让一般的路人吃一惊，甚至感到害怕，但巨鼠和鼠群则危险得多。

巨鼠是普通害兽的巨大化版本。它们通常数量众多，但由于无法钻进普通老鼠平时藏身的那些角落缝隙里，因此要更容易被发现和消灭。它们大多生活在下水道中，以便捡食上方街道上的残渣，不过也有一些巨鼠家族生活在更偏远的地方，例如潮湿的洞穴、森林或丘陵。老鼠是极其擅长生存的动物，几乎能在世界上的任何地方发现，不过与寒冷地区相比，它们更偏好温带或温暖的气候。

虽然它的咬伤本身并不致命，除非对象是非常年幼或非常年老者，但巨鼠携带着世界各地啮齿动物常见的污秽热——这种疫病完全足以摧残乡村社区。

Rats are a ubiquitous menace, scurrying through the sewers and on the streets of nearly every settlement the world over. Though a regular rat darting underfoot might startle or even frighten the average passerby, giant rats and rat swarms are far more dangerous.

Giant rats are enormous versions of the common vermin. They are typically found in abundant numbers, but since they cannot fit in the nooks where mundane rats typically hide, they are much easier to locate and exterminate. They mostly live in sewers where they can scavenge from the streets above, but some families of giant rats live in more remote locations, such as dank caves or forests and hills. Rats are incredibly adept survivors and can be found nearly anywhere in the world, though they tend to favor temperate or warm climates as opposed to cold regions.

Although its bite alone is not lethal except to the very young or very old, the giant rat carries the filth fever common to rodents around the world-a pestilence more than capable of ravaging rural communities.

Giant Spider.name: 巨型蜘蛛 Giant Spider

Web Sense.name: 蛛网感知 Web Sense
Web Sense.description:
狩猎蛛拥有不精确的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.j2wsK6IsW5yMW1jW]{震动感知}，以探测接触其蛛网的生物所产生的振动。

The hunting spider has imprecise @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.j2wsK6IsW5yMW1jW]{Tremorsense} to detect the vibrations of creatures touching its web.

Spring Upon Prey.name: 猛扑猎物 Spring Upon Prey
Spring Upon Prey.description:
需求 尚未掷先攻。

触发 当狩猎蜘蛛位于蛛网上时，有生物触碰了它的蛛网。

效果 狩猎蜘蛛会自动察觉该生物，并在它掷先攻之前进行步行、攀爬，或在蛛网上下降。

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

Trigger A creature touches the hunting spider's web while the spider is on it.

Effect The hunting spider automatically notices the creature and Strides, Climbs, or Descends on a Web before it rolls initiative.

Descend on a Web.name: 沿蛛网而降 Descend on a Web
Descend on a Web.description:
狩猎蜘蛛沿直线向下移动，最多 40 尺，由一根蛛丝悬吊。它可以挂在蛛丝上，或脱离蛛丝落下。它通过蛛网下降的距离不计入坠落伤害。

生物若成功对蛛丝进行 Strike（AC 20，硬度 3，5 HP），便会将其切断，导致蜘蛛坠落。

The hunting spider moves straight down up to 40 feet, suspended by a web line. It can hang from the web or drop off. The distance it Descends on a Web doesn't count for falling damage.

A creature that successfully Strikes the web (AC 20, Hardness 3, 5 HP) severs it, causing the spider to fall.

Hunting Spider Venom.name: 狩猎蛛毒液 Hunting Spider Venom
Hunting Spider Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 [[/r 1d10[poison]]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1 轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d12[poison]]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，以及措手不及（1 轮）

阶段 3 [[/r 2d6[poison]]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，以及措手不及（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 [[/r 1d10[poison]]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d12[poison]]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and off-guard (1 round)

Stage 3 [[/r 2d6[poison]]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and off-guard (1 round)

Web Trap.name: 蛛网陷阱 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被狩猎蜘蛛的蛛网攻击命中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{动弹不得}状态，并被黏在最近的表面上，直到它@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（DC 17）。

A creature hit by the hunting spider's web attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and stuck to the nearest surface until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} (DC 17).

Giant Spider.publicNotes:
猎蛛是巨蛛中最常见的种类，尽管并不是最大的。

很少有日常害虫能像臭名昭著的蜘蛛那样引起如此强烈的恐惧。

Hunting spiders are the most common type of giant spider, though not the largest.

Few everyday vermin inspire as much dread as the infamous spider.

Mature Spider.name: 成熟蜘蛛 Mature Spider

Web Sense.name: 网感 Web Sense
Web Sense.description:
狩猎蛛拥有不精确的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.j2wsK6IsW5yMW1jW]{震动感知}，以侦测接触其蛛网的生物所产生的振动。

The hunting spider has imprecise @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.j2wsK6IsW5yMW1jW]{Tremorsense} to detect the vibrations of creatures touching its web.

Spring Upon Prey.name: 扑向猎物 Spring Upon Prey
Spring Upon Prey.description:
需求 尚未掷先攻。

触发 当狩猎蜘蛛位于其网上时，一个生物触碰了它的蛛网。

效果 狩猎蜘蛛会自动注意到该生物，并在掷先攻之前进行疾走、攀爬，或在蛛网上下降。

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

Trigger A creature touches the hunting spider's web while the spider is on it.

Effect The hunting spider automatically notices the creature and Strides, Climbs, or Descends on a Web before it rolls initiative.

Descend on a Web.name: 沿蛛网下降 Descend on a Web
Descend on a Web.description:
狩猎蜘蛛沿直线向下移动，最多 40 尺，由一根蛛丝悬吊着。它可以挂在蛛丝上，或脱离蛛丝落下。它以“沿蛛网下降”所下降的距离不计入坠落伤害。

成功对蛛丝进行打击的生物（AC 20、硬度 3、5 HP）会将其切断，导致蜘蛛坠落。

The hunting spider moves straight down up to 40 feet, suspended by a web line. It can hang from the web or drop off. The distance it Descends on a Web doesn't count for falling damage.

A creature that successfully Strikes the web (AC 20, Hardness 3, 5 HP) severs it, causing the spider to fall.

Hunting Spider Venom.name: 猎蛛毒液 Hunting Spider Venom
Hunting Spider Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 [[/r 1d10[poison]]] 伤害并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1 轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d12[poison]]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，以及措手不及（1 轮）

阶段 3 [[/r 2d6[poison]]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，以及措手不及（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 [[/r 1d10[poison]]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d12[poison]]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and off-guard (1 round)

Stage 3 [[/r 2d6[poison]]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and off-guard (1 round)

Web Trap.name: 蛛网陷阱 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被猎蛛蛛网攻击命中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，并黏附在最近的表面上，直到它@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（DC 17）。

A creature hit by the hunting spider's web attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and stuck to the nearest surface until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} (DC 17).

Mature Spider.publicNotes:
猎蛛是巨型蜘蛛中最常见的一种，尽管并不是最大的一种。

日常害虫中，几乎没有哪一种能像臭名昭著的蜘蛛那样引发如此多的恐惧。

Hunting spiders are the most common type of giant spider, though not the largest.

Few everyday vermin inspire as much dread as the infamous spider.

Ollie.name: 奥利 Ollie

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神圣先天法术 Divine Innate Spells

Invisibility (Self Only).name: 隐形术（仅限自身） Invisibility (Self Only)
Invisibility (Self Only).description:
笼罩于幻象之中，目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未被察觉} 状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找目标，从而使其对它们而言改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽} 状态。若目标使用敌对动作，则该法术会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续 1 分钟，但如果目标使用敌对动作，它也不会结束。

Cloaked in illusion, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Command.name: 命令 Command
Command.description:
你高声下达一道难以忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你、逃离（如同它具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}状态）、放开它正持握的物品、卧倒 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}，或原地站住不动。在它服从你的命令之前，它不能延缓，也不能采取任何反应动作。效果取决于目标的意志豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在它下个回合中的第一个动作时，该生物必须使用一个单动作来照你的命令行事。

大失败 目标在它的下个回合中必须用尽其所有动作来服从你的命令。

升阶（5环） 你的目标至多可以是 10 个生物。You shout a command that's hard to ignore. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command.

Critical Failure The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Daze.name: 恍惚术 Daze
Daze.description:
你扰乱目标的心智，并以一次精神冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成等同于你施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标的豁免结果为大失败，它还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害提高 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Guidance.name: 指引 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求神圣指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击掷骰、察觉检定、豁免检定或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。如果目标使用了该加值，法术结束。无论如何，目标随后都会获得1小时的暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

You ask for divine guidance, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Heal.name: 治疗 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导正能量来治疗活体，或对不死生物造成伤害。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其1d8生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的正能量伤害，且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数决定其目标、射程、区域和其他参数。

1（姿势）该法术的射程为接触。

2（言语，姿势）该法术的射程为30英尺。若你正在治疗一个活体生物，恢复的生命值增加8。[[/r (@item.level)d8[vitality]+@item.level*8[healing]]]{2动作治疗}

3（材料，姿势，言语）你将正能量散播为一个30英尺的放射。此效果以爆发中的所有活体生物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗量或伤害量增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

You channel positive energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of positive damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.

2 (verbal, somatic) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8. [[/r (@item.level)d8[vitality]+@item.level*8[healing]]]{2-Action Healing}

3 (material, somatic, verbal) You disperse positive energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你制造出一只单独的魔法手掌，它可以是隐形的，也可以呈幽灵般的形态；它抓住目标物体，并缓慢地将其移动至多20尺。由于你是让该物体悬浮起来，因此你可以朝任意方向移动它。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动20尺。如果该物体在法术结束时仍在空中，它就会坠落。

升环（3环） 你可以将一个无主物体作为目标，其负载为1或更低。

升环（5环） 射程增加至60尺，且你可以将一个无主物体作为目标，其负载为1或更低。

升环（7环） 射程增加至60尺，且你可以将一个无主物体作为目标，其负载为2或更低。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Message.name: 讯息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声默念词句，但这些话并不会从你口中说出，而是直接传送到目标的耳中。其他人听到你的话并不会比你平常只动口型时更清楚，但目标听到你的话就仿佛正站在你身旁一样。

目标可以用一个反应动作作出简短回应，或者如果他们愿意，也可以在其下一回合以一个自由动作回应，但他们必须能看见你且位于射程内才能这么做。若其作出回应，其回应会像原本的信息一样，直接传送到你的耳边。

升阶（3环） 法术的射程增加至500尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Sanctuary.name: 庇护所 Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description:
你以防护能量庇护一个生物，阻止敌人的攻击。生物每次试图攻击目标时，都必须进行一次意志豁免。如果目标使用敌对动作，法术结束。

大成功 Sanctuary 结束。

成功 该生物可以尝试其此次攻击，以及本回合内对该目标的任何其他攻击。

失败 该生物不能攻击该目标，且该动作被浪费。它在本回合内不能再尝试对该目标进行攻击。

大失败 该生物浪费该动作，且在 sanctuary 的剩余持续时间内不能尝试攻击该目标。

You ward a creature with protective energy that deters enemy attacks. Creatures attempting to attack the target must attempt a Will save each time. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends.

Critical Success Sanctuary ends.

Success The creature can attempt its attack and any other attacks against the target this turn.

Failure The creature can't attack the target and wastes the action. It can't attempt further attacks against the target this turn.

Critical Failure The creature wastes the action and can't attempt to attack the target for the rest of sanctuary's duration.

Shield.name: 盾牌 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面由力场构成的魔法护盾。这视为使用“举盾”动作，使你获得 AC +1 环境加值，直到你下个回合开始，但使用它不需要占用一只手。

当该法术的效果持续时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应动作（）。该护盾的硬度为 5。你使用 Shield Block 后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。不同于通常的 Shield Block，你可以用该法术的反应动作（）来对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} 法术。

法术升阶会提高护盾的硬度。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：Shield}

升阶（3环） 护盾的硬度为 10。

升阶（5环） 护盾的硬度为 15。

升阶（7环） 护盾的硬度为 20。

升阶（9环） 护盾的硬度为 25。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes. Unlike a normal Shield Block, you can use the spell's reaction against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} spell.

Heightening the spell increases the shield's Hardness.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

Heightened (3rd) The shield has Hardness 10.

Heightened (5th) The shield has Hardness 15.

Heightened (7th) The shield has Hardness 20.

Heightened (9th) The shield has Hardness 25.

Wing Flash.name: 翼闪 Wing Flash
Wing Flash.description:
鳞翼兽展开其虹彩双翼，并以催眠般的图案扇动。每个位于30尺内且能够看见鳞翼兽的生物都必须尝试进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:20] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到其下个回合开始。

失败 该生物措手不及，直到其下个回合开始，并且它在自己下个回合中必须将第一个动作用于欣赏鳞翼兽。

大失败 该生物措手不及，直到其下个回合开始。在1分钟内，该生物每回合都必须将第一个动作用于欣赏鳞翼兽。若鳞翼兽对受影响生物进行攻击或使用其他敌对动作，则此效果结束。

The scalliwing spreads their iridescent wings and flutters them in a hypnotizing pattern. Each creature within 30 feet that can see the scalliwing must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:20] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of its next turn.

Failure The creature is off-guard until the start of its next turn, and it must spend its first action on its next turn admiring the scalliwing.

Critical Failure The creature is off-guard until the start of its next turn. For 1 minute, the creature must spend its first action each turn admiring the scalliwing. This effect ends if the scalliwing attacks or uses another hostile action against the affected creature.

Ollie.publicNotes:
羽蛇是体型庞大、色彩鲜艳并长有羽翼的蛇形生物。它们天性善良，会帮助凡人并与邪恶之徒对抗，但目睹一只羽蛇是极其重大的际遇——这些壮丽却隐居的生物极少现身。

作为羽蛇家族中体型最小的成员，小翎翼蛇外形与它们更大的同族相似，但大约只有家猫般大小，而且它们温和的天性中还夹杂着一丝暴躁的顽皮。大多数羽蛇致力于纠正世间的不公，或引导凡人的文明走向社会进步，而小翎翼蛇则在更偏向个体的层面上行动。它们宣称自己的职责是教导心地善良的施法者掌握魔法之道，而事实上，它们有时也会担任——或者按它们迅速纠正的说法，是“协助”——这类施法者的魔宠。

小翎翼蛇拥有虹彩般的鳞片与鲜艳的羽毛，是异常美丽的生物。它们显然很清楚这一点，并利用自己的外表来博取他人的欢心。这种美貌使其中一些变得有些自我夸大，但另一些小翎翼蛇则发现，自己小型（体型）的身躯与相对薄弱的防御，使它们只能任由残忍而更庞大的生物摆布；那些生物会将它们囚禁起来，当作美丽的宠物与战利品。虽然小翎翼蛇若出于自愿，可能会兴高采烈地长期居住在同一处住所中，但被囚禁的小翎翼蛇却曾策划过阴险的逃脱，协调其他生物一同行动，并在过程中造成惊人的财产损失。

小翎翼蛇从鼻尖到尾巴约有2英尺长，翼展也大致相同。它们的寿命几乎与人类一样长。尽管小翎翼蛇看起来比它们那些体型更大、行踪隐秘的同族稍微常见一些，但许多凡人终其一生也从未遇见过一只小翎翼蛇。

Couatls are large, brightly colored serpents with feathered wings. Good-natured, these creatures aid mortals and oppose evildoers, but sighting one presents a momentous occasion-these magnificent, albeit reclusive creatures rarely appear.

The smallest members of the couatl family, Scalliwings resemble their larger kin but are roughly the size of a house cat, and a irascible mischievous streak tempers their kindly nature. While most couatls seek to right the world's wrongs or guide mortal civilization toward societal advancement, scalliwings work on a more individual level. They claim their role is to teach goodhearted spellcasters the ways of magic, and indeed they sometimes serve-or "assist," as they're swift to correct-such spellcasters as familiars.

With iridescent scales and bright feathers, scalliwings are remarkably pretty creatures. They seem well aware of this fact and use their appearance to ingratiate themselves with others. This beauty makes some of them slightly self-aggrandizing, but other scalliwings find that their small size and relatively weak defenses put them at the mercy of cruel, larger creatures who seek to imprison them as beautiful pets and trophies. While scalliwings might cheerfully reside in a single residence indefinitely of their own volition, captive scalliwings have orchestrated devious escapes, coordinating their efforts with other creatures to cause spectacular property damage in the process.

Scalliwings measure about 2 feet long from nose to tail with wingspans of about the same length. They have life spans nearly as long as a human's. While a scalliwing appears slightly more common than their larger, reclusive kin, many mortals live entire lifetimes without ever encountering a scalliwing.

Sewer Ooze.name: 下水道软泥怪 Sewer Ooze
Sewer Ooze.tokenName: 下水道软泥怪 Sewer Ooze

Motion Sense 60 feet.name: 动觉 60尺 Motion Sense 60 feet
Motion Sense 60 feet.description:
下水道软泥怪可以通过振动和空气流动感知附近的动静。

A sewer ooze can sense nearby motion through vibration and air movement.

Filth Wave.name: 污秽波浪 Filth Wave
Filth Wave.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 下水道软泥怪释放出一阵污秽波涛，覆盖 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的所有生物。区域内的每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|traits:damaging-effect] 豁免，否则受到 [[/r 1d4[acid]]] 伤害，且其所有速度在 1 分钟内承受 10 尺减值（若大失败，该生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}）。

生物可以花费一个交互动作来为某人清理身上的污秽，每花费一个动作，速度减值减少 5 尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Qomp2EujVCbzJb4X]{效果：污秽波涛}

Frequency once per minute

Effect The sewer ooze unleashes a wave of filth, covering all creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17|traits:damaging-effect] save or take [[/r 1d4[acid]]] damage and take a -10-foot penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute (on a critical failure, the creature also falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}).

A creature can spend an Interact action to clean someone off, decreasing the Speed penalty by 5 feet with each action.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Qomp2EujVCbzJb4X]{Effect: Filth Wave}

Sewer Ooze.publicNotes:
这些由污水和其他残骸构成的无定形团块，会沿着大大小小城市下方肮脏的排水道缓慢移动。

史莱姆、霉菌以及其他软泥怪常见于潮湿阴暗的地下城和昏暗的森林中。它们未必邪恶，但有些会长到极其巨大，并拥有无法满足的食欲。

These amorphous masses of sewage and other detritus make their way through filthy culverts beneath cities large and small.

Slimes, molds, and other oozes can be found in dank dungeons and shadowed forests. While not necessarily evil, some grow to enormous sizes and have insatiable appetites.
Sewer Ooze.prototypeToken: 下水道软泥怪 Sewer Ooze

Web Lurker.name: 蛛网潜伏者 Web Lurker

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet (Creatur.name: 震动感知（不精确）30尺（接触其蛛网的生物） Tremorsense (Imprecise) 30 feet (Creatures Touching its Web)

Spider Speak.name: 蜘蛛语 Spider Speak
Spider Speak.description:
蛛网潜伏者能够与蜘蛛交谈，其效果和限制与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{与动物交谈}相同。

The web lurker can speak with spiders, with the same effects and limitations as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BBvV7qoXGdw09q1C]{Speak with Animals}.

Spring upon Prey.name: 扑向猎物 Spring upon Prey
Spring upon Prey.description:
触发 当蛛网潜伏者位于其蛛网上时，有生物触碰了该蛛网。

需求 尚未掷先攻。

效果 蛛网潜伏者会自动注意到该生物，并在掷先攻前进行Stride或Climb。

Trigger A creature touches the web lurker's web while the web lurker is on it.

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

Effect The web lurker automatically notices the creature and Strides or Climbs before rolling initiative.

Web Lurker Venom.name: 潜网毒液 Web Lurker Venom
Web Lurker Venom.description:
豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]

最长持续时间 10 轮

阶段 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1 轮）

阶段 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] 伤害、措手不及，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 10 rounds

Stage 1 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 [[/r 1d6[poison]]] damage, off-guard, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Web Trap.name: 蛛网陷阱 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被网伏者的蛛网攻击命中的生物会陷入无法移动并被黏在最近的表面上，直到它成功通过@Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|traits:action:escape]检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}。

A creature hit by the web lurker's web attack is immobilized and stuck to the nearest surface until it succeeds at @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|traits:action:escape] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}.

Web Lurker.publicNotes:
潜网者，也被称为蛛魔，是丑陋的怪物；它们不仅栖居于蜘蛛与虫群的巢穴之中，还会主动豢养并驱使这类害虫。

Web lurkers, known also as ettercaps, are ugly monsters that not only dwell within the lairs of spiders and swarms, but actively cultivate and shepherd such vermin.

Web Lurker Noose.name: 蛛网潜伏者绞索 Web Lurker Noose
Web Lurker Noose.tokenName: 蛛网潜伏者套索危害 Web Lurker Noose Hazard

Web Noose.name: 蛛网套索 Web Noose
Web Noose.description:
触发 一个生物进入带有蛛网绊索的方格。

效果 网潜者套索对触发该效果的生物进行一次套索打击。

Trigger A creature steps into the square with the web tripwire.

Effect The web lurker noose makes a noose Strike against the triggering creature.

Noose.name: 绞索 Noose
Noose.description:
若打击成功，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 状态，并被从地面上拉起（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} DC 22）。

只要目标被套索困住，它在自己的每个回合结束时都会受到 [[/r 1d6[bludgeoning]]] 伤害。

On a successful strike, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} and pulled off the ground (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC 22).

The target takes [[/r 1d6[bludgeoning]]] damage at the end of each of its turns as long as it's caught in the noose.

Web Lurker Noose.disable:
@Check[type:survival|dc:18|name:Rearrange the Webbing|traits:mechanical,trap]（受训）或 @Check[type:thievery|dc:18|name:Rearrange the Webbing|traits:mechanical,trap]（专家）以重新整理蛛网。

@Check[type:survival|dc:18|name:Rearrange the Webbing|traits:mechanical,trap] (trained) or @Check[type:thievery|dc:18|name:Rearrange the Webbing|traits:mechanical,trap] (expert) to rearrange the webbing.
Web Lurker Noose.hazarddescription:
喉部高度的隐蔽蛛网会绊住走进其中的生物。

Discreet webbing at throat level snags a creature that walks into it.
Web Lurker Noose.prototypeToken: 潜网者套索危害 Web Lurker Noose Hazard

Marvelous Miniature (Chest).name: 奇妙微缩模型（宝箱） Marvelous Miniature (Chest)
Marvelous Miniature (Chest).description:
启动 1 (操作)

每个奇妙微缩模型都是某个真实生物或物体的极小复制品。该微缩模型由木材、白镴或其他简单材料制成，并在复制品底座的 underside 刻有一枚符文。奇妙微缩模型有时会成套包装；例如，露营套装中包含小船、营火和马匹微缩模型。启动一个奇妙微缩模型会使其变形为另一种生物或物体，随后便可像该物体通常那样使用。每个微缩模型只能启动一次，其中大多数会永久变成其描述中的物品。

当你使用这个微缩模型时，会出现一个小木箱并立刻打开。这个箱子最多可容纳总计 10 负载的物品。木箱一旦关闭，就会再次变形——这次会变成一把钥匙——并将其中存放的所有物品一同带走。你可以通过花费一个交互动作，在一把想象中的锁里转动这把钥匙来启动它，这会使其重新变回一个箱子，且所有物品仍都在里面。

一旦它第二次变成箱子，它就会永远保持为一个木箱。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Every marvelous miniature is an exceptionally small replica of a real creature or object. The miniature is made from wood, pewter, or other simple materials, and features a rune etched into the underside of the replica's base. Marvelous miniatures sometimes come packaged together; for example, the camping set features the boat, campfire, and horse miniatures. Activating a marvelous miniature causes it to transform into another creature or object, which then can be used as normal for that object. Each miniature can be activated only once, with most of them permanently becoming the item in their description.

When you use this miniature, a small wooden chest appears and immediately opens. This chest can hold up to 10 Bulk worth of items. Once the chest is closed, it transforms again—this time into a key—taking all of the stored items with it. You can activate this key by spending an Interact action to turn it in an imaginary lock, which causes it to transform back into a chest with all of the items still inside.

Once it has turned into a chest a second time, it forever remains a wooden chest

Spacious Pouch (Type II).name: 宽敞袋（II型） Spacious Pouch (Type II)
Spacious Pouch (Type II).description:
尽管它看起来只是一个布袋，饰有色彩华丽的丝绸拼片或时髦的刺绣，但宽敞袋会通向一个比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。袋内所装的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。袋子中的异次元空间能容纳多少负载，取决于它的类型。

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互，将物品存放其中或将其取出，就像使用普通袋子一样。尽管这个袋子能容纳大量物品，某个物体仍必须能够通过袋口，才能被存放进去。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它会破裂并被毁坏，导致其中的物品永远丢失。如果把它翻个里朝外，里面的物品会完好无损地洒出来，但必须先把袋子恢复原状才能再次使用。被放进袋中的活物有足够的空气维持10分钟，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱逃。袋中的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。袋中的物品无法被只侦测同一位面事物的魔法所探测到。

容量 50 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 50 Bulk

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互（Interact）动作，将物品存入其中或将其取出，就像使用普通麻袋一样。尽管这个袋子可以容纳大量材料，但物体仍然必须能穿过袋口，才能被存放在里面。

容量 100 负载

The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 100 Bulk

Spacious Pouch (Type III).name: 宽敞袋（III型） Spacious Pouch (Type III)
Spacious Pouch (Type III).description:
尽管它看起来只是一个布袋，并饰有色彩华丽的丝绸拼片或时髦的刺绣，但宽敞袋会通向一处比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。袋中容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。袋子异次元空间所能容纳的负载量取决于其类型。

你可以对宽敞袋使用交互，以像使用普通麻袋一样将物品存入其中或取出。尽管这个袋子能容纳大量物质，但某个物体若要被储存在里面，仍然必须能够穿过袋口。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它就会破裂并被毁坏，导致里面的物品永远丢失。如果把它翻个底朝天，里面的物品会毫发无损地洒出来，但必须先将袋子恢复原状，才能再次使用。被放入袋中的活物拥有足够维持10分钟的空气，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱身。袋中物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。袋中的物品无法被仅探测同一位面上事物的魔法侦测到。

容量 100 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 100 Bulk

你可以通过对宽敞袋执行交互动作，将物品存放其中或将其取出，就像使用普通袋子一样。虽然这个袋子能容纳大量物质，但物体仍然必须能够通过袋口，才能被存放在里面。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它就会破裂并被毁坏，导致里面的物品永远丢失。如果把它里外翻转，里面的物品会毫发无损地洒出来，但必须先把袋子翻回正面才能再次使用。被放入袋中的活体生物在开始窒息前有足够维持10分钟的空气，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱逃。袋中的物品在被先取出之前不会提供任何好处。袋中的物品无法被仅探测同一位面事物的魔法侦测到。

容量 150 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 150 Bulk

Marvelous Miniature (Chest).name: 奇妙微缩雕像（箱子） Marvelous Miniature (Chest)
Marvelous Miniature (Chest).description:
启动 1（操作）

每个奇妙微缩模型都是某个真实生物或物体的异常微小复制品。该微缩模型由木材、白镴或其他简单材料制成，并在底座下侧蚀刻有一枚符文。奇妙微缩模型有时会成套包装；例如，露营套装包含小船、营火和马匹微缩模型。启动一个奇妙微缩模型会使其变形为另一种生物或物体，随后便可像该物体平常那样使用。每个微缩模型只能启动一次，其中大多数都会永久变成其描述中的物品。

当你使用这个微缩模型时，一个小木箱会出现并立即打开。这个箱子最多可以容纳总计 10 负载的物品。一旦箱子被关上，它会再次变形——这次变成一把钥匙——并将所有存放其中的物品一并带走。你可以通过花费一个交互动作，在想象中的锁孔里转动这把钥匙来启动它，这会使它重新变回一个箱子，而所有物品仍都在里面。

一旦它第二次变成箱子，它就会永远保持为一个木箱。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Every marvelous miniature is an exceptionally small replica of a real creature or object. The miniature is made from wood, pewter, or other simple materials, and features a rune etched into the underside of the replica's base. Marvelous miniatures sometimes come packaged together; for example, the camping set features the boat, campfire, and horse miniatures. Activating a marvelous miniature causes it to transform into another creature or object, which then can be used as normal for that object. Each miniature can be activated only once, with most of them permanently becoming the item in their description.

When you use this miniature, a small wooden chest appears and immediately opens. This chest can hold up to 10 Bulk worth of items. Once the chest is closed, it transforms again—this time into a key—taking all of the stored items with it. You can activate this key by spending an Interact action to turn it in an imaginary lock, which causes it to transform back into a chest with all of the items still inside.

Once it has turned into a chest a second time, it forever remains a wooden chest

Sluggish.description:
该载具每进行一次 90 度转向，就必须移动其自身长度的两倍。

This vehicle must move twice its length for each 90-degree turn it makes.

Riding Horse 1 (Br-Saddle-Walk) - L6.name: 骑乘马 1（育-鞍-步行） - L6 Riding Horse 1 (Br-Saddle-Walk) - L6

Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 气味（不精确）30尺 Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet

Gallop.name: 飞奔 Gallop
Gallop.description:
骑乘马跨步两次。在这些跨步中，它的速度获得 +10 英尺的环境加值。

The riding horse Strides twice. It has a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these Strides.

Riding Horse 1 (Br-Saddle-Walk) - L6.publicNotes:
马匹在许多社会中既充当坐骑，也作为驮兽。它们忠诚且通常性情温顺，对于想要长途旅行的人来说极为宝贵。较小的族群，如侏儒和半身人，常常使用矮马作为坐骑，而马则是人类和其他中型类人生物偏爱的骑乘动物。普通类人生物遇到的大多数马匹都是驯养的，不过在野外也能发现这些强壮动物组成的大型马群。

Horses serve as mounts and beasts of burden in many societies. They are loyal and typically gentle creatures, and they are invaluable to those looking to travel long distances. Smaller folk, like gnomes and halflings, often utilize ponies as mounts, while horses are the favored steeds for humans and other Medium humanoids. Most horses that the average humanoid encounters are domesticated, though large herds of these powerful animals can be found in the wild.

Riding Horse 2 (Bl-Saddle-Idle) - L6.name: 骑乘马 2（黑色-鞍具-闲置） - L6 Riding Horse 2 (Bl-Saddle-Idle) - L6

Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）30尺 Scent (Imprecise) 30 feet

Gallop.description:
骑乘马移动两次。在这些移动期间，它的速度获得+10尺环境加值。

The riding horse Strides twice. It has a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these Strides.
