Horses serve as mounts and beasts of burden in many societies. They are loyal and typically gentle creatures, and they are invaluable to those looking to travel long distances. Smaller folk, like gnomes and halflings, often utilize ponies as mounts, while horses are the favored steeds for humans and other Medium humanoids. Most horses that the average humanoid encounters are domesticated, though large herds of these powerful animals can be found in the wild.

Boar (TiO) - Remaster.name: 野猪（TiO）- 重制版 Boar (TiO) - Remaster

Ferocity.name: 凶暴性 Ferocity
Ferocity.description:
当野猪的生命值降至 0 时，它可以使用其反应动作，保持清醒并保留 1 点生命值，但它会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{重伤 1} 状态（如果它已经具有该状态，则其重伤值提高 1）。它在重伤 3 时不能使用此能力。

When the boar is reduced to 0 Hit Points, it can use its reaction to remain conscious with 1 Hit Point, but it gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1} condition (or increases its wounded value by 1 if it already has that condition). It can't use this ability at wounded 3.

Boar Charge.name: 野猪冲锋 Boar Charge
Boar Charge.description:
野猪先疾驰两次，然后进行一次獠牙攻击。只要它至少移动了20尺，它的攻击掷骰便获得+2环境加值。

The boar Strides twice and then makes a tusk Strike. As long as it moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its attack roll.

Boar (TiO) - Remaster.publicNotes:
野猪脾气恶劣且皮糙肉厚，比家养猪危险得多。这些杂食性哺乳动物因其肉被视为美味佳肴而遭到大量猎捕。野猪最有可能在自卫时攻击类人生物，或是在冬季的交配期发动攻击；此时雄性会长出额外一英寸厚的组织，以在与竞争对手搏斗时保护内脏。在某些文化中，人们会训练野猪变得更加凶猛，将其用作战兽和守卫。这样的野猪一旦逃回野外，就可能成为当地真正的祸害。

Foul-tempered and tough, boars are far more dangerous than domesticated pigs. These omnivorous mammals are hunted heavily because their meat is considered a delicacy. Boars are most likely to attack humanoids in self-defense or during their mating season in the winter months, when the males grow an extra inch of tissue to protect their organs as they fight off rivals. In some cultures, boars are trained to become much more aggressive for use as war beasts and guardians. When such boars escape back into the wild, they can become true terrors of the region.

Young Boar (TiO) - Remaster.name: 幼年野猪（TiO） - 重制版 Young Boar (TiO) - Remaster

Ferocity.name: 凶猛 Ferocity
Ferocity.description:
当野猪的生命值降至 0 时，它可以使用其反应动作以 1 点生命值保持清醒，但它会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤 1} 状态（如果它已经具有该状态，则其受伤值增加 1）。当受伤为 3 时，它不能使用此能力。

When the boar is reduced to 0 Hit Points, it can use its reaction to remain conscious with 1 Hit Point, but it gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1} condition (or increases its wounded value by 1 if it already has that condition). It can't use this ability at wounded 3.

Boar Charge.name: 野猪冲锋 Boar Charge
Boar Charge.description:
这头野猪先疾驰两次，然后进行一次獠牙攻击。只要它至少移动了20尺，它的攻击掷骰便获得+2环境加值。

The boar Strides twice and then makes a tusk Strike. As long as it moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its attack roll.

Young Boar (TiO) - Remaster.publicNotes:
野猪脾气暴躁且皮糙肉厚，比家猪危险得多。这些杂食性哺乳动物因其肉被视为美味佳肴而遭到大量猎捕。野猪最有可能在自卫时或在冬季的交配季节攻击类人生物；此时雄性会长出额外一英寸厚的组织来保护内脏，以便在击退竞争对手时免受伤害。在某些文化中，人们会训练野猪，让它们变得更加凶猛，用作战争野兽和守卫。若这样的野猪逃回野外，它们就可能成为当地真正的恐怖之源。

Foul-tempered and tough, boars are far more dangerous than domesticated pigs. These omnivorous mammals are hunted heavily because their meat is considered a delicacy. Boars are most likely to attack humanoids in self-defense or during their mating season in the winter months, when the males grow an extra inch of tissue to protect their organs as they fight off rivals. In some cultures, boars are trained to become much more aggressive for use as war beasts and guardians. When such boars escape back into the wild, they can become true terrors of the region.

Goblin Commando (TiO) - Remaster.name: 地精突击兵（TiO）- 重制版 Goblin Commando (TiO) - Remaster

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这类护甲由柔韧的与模压的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时，保持了最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时靠一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Horsechopper.name: 斩马刀 Horsechopper
Horsechopper.description:
这把武器由地精制造，专门用于对付马匹；其本质上是一根长杆，末端装有刀刃和一个大钩子。

Created by goblins to battle horses, this weapon is essentially a long shaft ending in a blade with a large hook.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精飞奔 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
如果一名地精盟友在地精突击兵邻近处结束一个移动动作，该突击兵可以使用其反应动作来【跨步】。

If a goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin commando, the commando can use their reaction to Step.

Goblin Commando (TiO) - Remaster.publicNotes:
大多数地精社群都处于一种勉强维持控制的混乱状态——这是由一群主要凭直觉行事的生物组成的集体，几乎不会遵循任何明确的指挥。即便是地精首领，往往也冲动、不负责任，而且通常确实不太擅长领导。

理论上，地精突击队员会率领地精袭击队。可在实际中，一旦战斗开始，地精突击队员很少会继续带领他们的同伴。大多数都会逃避职责，转而冲入混战之中，从他们的族人那里赢取荣耀。

Most goblin communities teeter in a state of barely controlled disarray-a collective of creatures operating largely on gut instinct rarely follows any clear direction. Even goblin leaders tend to be impulsive, irresponsible, and generally just not that good at actually leading.

In theory, goblin commandos lead goblin raids. In practice, goblin commandos rarely continue to lead their comrades once a battle has begun. Most shirk their responsibilities in favor of wading into the fray and claiming glory from their kin.
Goblin Commando (TiO) - Remaster.prototypeToken: 地精突击队员 Goblin Commando

Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster.name: 地精突击队队长（TiO）- Remaster Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster
Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster.tokenName: 地精突击队队长 Goblin Commando Captain

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的硬化皮革混合制成，能在提供一定防护的同时保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在一端靠箭羽在飞行中保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Horsechopper.name: 斩马钩镰刀 Horsechopper
Horsechopper.description:
这种武器由地精制造，用来对付马匹；它本质上是一根长杆，末端装有刀刃和一个大钩子。

Created by goblins to battle horses, this weapon is essentially a long shaft ending in a blade with a large hook.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
如果一个地精盟友在地精突击队员邻近处结束一个移动动作，该突击队员可以使用其反应动作进行【跨步】。

If a goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin commando, the commando can use their reaction to Step.

Trip Wire Kit.name: 绊线套件 Trip Wire Kit
Trip Wire Kit.description:
一个小型容器中的补给品，可被布置来制造一个@UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{地精绊线}

布置：10分钟和2只手

启动：2 交互

一个生物用双手将松弛的绳线穿过锚点拉紧，以在恰当的时机将其收紧。

Supplies in a small contained that can be set up to create a @UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{Goblin Trip Wire}

Set-up: 10 Min and 2 Hands

Activate: 2 Interact

A creature pulls the slack through the anchor with both hands to tighten it at the right moment.

Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster.publicNotes:
大多数地精社群都处于一种勉强维持的混乱状态——这是一群主要凭直觉行事的生物，几乎从不遵循任何明确的指挥。即便是地精首领，往往也冲动、不负责任，而且通常确实不怎么擅长领导。

理论上，地精突击队员会率领地精袭掠队。可在实际中，一旦战斗开始，地精突击队员就很少继续领导他们的同伴了。大多数都会逃避自己的职责，转而冲入战团，在族人面前争抢荣耀。

Most goblin communities teeter in a state of barely controlled disarray-a collective of creatures operating largely on gut instinct rarely follows any clear direction. Even goblin leaders tend to be impulsive, irresponsible, and generally just not that good at actually leading.

In theory, goblin commandos lead goblin raids. In practice, goblin commandos rarely continue to lead their comrades once a battle has begun. Most shirk their responsibilities in favor of wading into the fray and claiming glory from their kin.
Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster.prototypeToken: 地精突击队队长 Goblin Commando Captain

Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - R.name: 地精突击兵收费员（TiO）- Remaster Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - Remaster
Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - R.tokenName: 地精收费员 Goblin Toll Collector

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的硬化皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时保有最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Horsechopper.name: 斩马戟 Horsechopper
Horsechopper.description:
这种武器由地精制造，用于对付马匹；其本质上是一根长杆，末端装有一片带大钩的刀刃。

Created by goblins to battle horses, this weapon is essentially a long shaft ending in a blade with a large hook.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
如果一个地精盟友在地精突击兵邻接处结束一个移动动作，突击兵可以使用其反应动作来踏步。

If a goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin commando, the commando can use their reaction to Step.

Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - R.publicNotes:
大多数地精社群都摇摇欲坠地处于一种勉强受控的混乱状态——一群主要凭直觉行事的生物，几乎不会遵循任何明确的指挥。即使是地精首领，也往往冲动、不负责任，而且通常并不擅长真正去领导。

理论上，地精突击队员会领导地精劫掠行动。可在实际中，一旦战斗开始，地精突击队员很少会继续带领他们的同伴。大多数人都会逃避职责，转而冲入混战，从族人那里赢得荣耀。

Most goblin communities teeter in a state of barely controlled disarray-a collective of creatures operating largely on gut instinct rarely follows any clear direction. Even goblin leaders tend to be impulsive, irresponsible, and generally just not that good at actually leading.

In theory, goblin commandos lead goblin raids. In practice, goblin commandos rarely continue to lead their comrades once a battle has begun. Most shirk their responsibilities in favor of wading into the fray and claiming glory from their kin.
Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - R.prototypeToken: 地精收费员 Goblin Toll Collector

Goblin Commando Bowman (TiO) - Remaster.name: 地精突击弓手（TiO）- 重制版 Goblin Commando Bowman (TiO) - Remaster

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的硬化皮革混合制成，提供一定防护的同时保有最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些射弹是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在一端靠箭羽在飞行中保持稳定，另一端则带有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Horsechopper.name: 斩马长柄刀 Horsechopper
Horsechopper.description:
这件武器由地精制造，用于对抗马匹；其本质上是一根长柄，末端装有刀刃和一个大钩。

Created by goblins to battle horses, this weapon is essentially a long shaft ending in a blade with a large hook.

Goblin Scuttle.name: 地精疾窜 Goblin Scuttle
Goblin Scuttle.description:
如果一个地精盟友在地精突击队员邻近处结束一个移动动作，该突击队员可以用其反应动作进行【跨步】。

If a goblin ally ends a move action adjacent to the goblin commando, the commando can use their reaction to Step.

Goblin Commando Bowman (TiO) - Remaster.publicNotes:
大多数地精社群都处于一种勉强维持控制的混乱状态——一群主要凭直觉行事的生物，很少会遵循任何明确的指挥。就连地精首领也往往冲动、不负责任，而且通常确实不太擅长领导。

理论上，地精突击队员会领导地精的劫掠行动。可在实际中，一旦战斗开始，地精突击队员很少会继续带领他们的同伴。大多数都会逃避职责，转而冲进战团，从他们的族人那里赢得荣耀。

Most goblin communities teeter in a state of barely controlled disarray-a collective of creatures operating largely on gut instinct rarely follows any clear direction. Even goblin leaders tend to be impulsive, irresponsible, and generally just not that good at actually leading.

In theory, goblin commandos lead goblin raids. In practice, goblin commandos rarely continue to lead their comrades once a battle has begun. Most shirk their responsibilities in favor of wading into the fray and claiming glory from their kin.

Crocodile - Remaster.name: 鳄鱼 - 重制版 Crocodile - Remaster

Deep Breath.name: 深呼吸 Deep Breath
Deep Breath.description:
鳄鱼可以屏住呼吸约 2 小时。

The crocodile can hold its breath for about 2 hours.

Death Roll.name: 死亡翻滚 Death Roll
Death Roll.description:
需求 鳄鱼必须已使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓住} 状态；

效果 鳄鱼收起四肢并迅速翻滚，扭转它的受害者。它对被抓住的生物进行一次颚部打击，且此次攻击掷骰获得+2环境加值。若命中，它还会使该生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏地}。若失败，它会释放该生物。

Requirements The crocodile must have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed};

Effect The crocodile tucks its legs and rolls rapidly, twisting its victim. It makes a jaws Strike with a +2 circumstance bonus to the attack roll against the grabbed creature. If it hits, it also knocks the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If it fails, it releases the creature.

Crocodile - Remaster.publicNotes:
鳄鱼可以在河岸上晒太阳、潜伏于沼泽中，或漂浮在湖里。远远看去，它们通常与原木没什么区别——至少在它们发动攻击之前如此。短吻鳄拥有相似的数据，但由于它们常生活在较为温和的气候中，因此更能耐受寒冷。与短吻鳄不同，鳄鱼能够耐受咸水。两者都是强大的掠食者，很可能会吞食那些不留意脚下的粗心冒险者。

鳄鱼外表强壮而充满远古气息，是危险的天然掠食者，栖息于湿地、河床、沼泽及其他湿地环境中。

Crocodiles can be found basking on riverbanks, lurking in swamps, or floating in lakes. They are usually indistinguishable from logs when viewed from afar—at least until they attack. Alligators have similar statistics, but because they often live in more temperate climates, they endure cold temperatures better. Unlike alligators, crocodiles can tolerate salt water. Both are formidable predators that are likely to devour careless adventurers who fail to watch where they step.

Powerful and primeval in appearance, crocodiles are dangerous natural predators that dwell in marshes, riverbeds, swamps, and other wetlands.

Blue Finley - Remaster.name: 蓝色芬利 - 重制版 Blue Finley - Remaster

Site Bound.name: 地点束缚 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
一个典型的幽灵通常只能离开它被杀死之处或它萦绕之地很短的一段距离。典型的限制是120英尺。有些幽灵则不是被束缚在某个地点，而是被束缚于一个房间、建筑、物品，或某个对它而言具有特殊意义的生物。

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复原 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
纠正导致这名平民死亡的不公，便能让其前往来世。

当一个幽灵被摧毁时，它会在 [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天} 后于其所缚之地重新成形，并完全恢复。只有当有人查明它存在的原因，并纠正阻止该灵魂安息的一切时，幽灵才能被永久摧毁。

Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner’s death allows it to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Frightful Moan.name: 恐怖哀嚎 Frightful Moan
Frightful Moan.description:
幽灵为自己的命运哀叹，迫使 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30尺}内的每个活着的生物进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:21] 豁免。失败时，生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}（若为大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3}）。成功时，生物在1分钟内暂时免疫该幽灵的惊怖哀号。

The ghost laments its fate, forcing each living creature within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} to attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:21] save. On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure). On a success, a creature is temporarily immune to this ghost's frightful moan for 1 minute.

Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the.name: 居所学识（适用于该幽灵所缚之地） Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the ghost is bound to)

Blue Finley - Remaster.publicNotes:
幽灵平民是一个相信自己死得不公的普通人。

当一些凡人因悲剧性的处境而死去，或死时心愿未了，他们的灵魂可能会徘徊不去，并在某个对他们生前具有重要意义的地点闹鬼。

The ghost commoner is an ordinary person who believes they died unjustly.

When some mortals die through tragic circumstances or without closure, their souls can linger and haunt a locale significant to them in life.

Giant Centipede - Remaster.name: 巨型蜈蚣 - Remaster Giant Centipede - Remaster

Giant Centipede Venom.name: 巨型蜈蚣毒液 Giant Centipede Venom
Giant Centipede Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 round)

Giant Centipede - Remaster.publicNotes:
大多数巨型蜈蚣（若出现在城市中，则被称为下水道蜈蚣）会小群栖居，但在寻找食物时会单独猎食。试图驯化巨型蜈蚣并将其用作守卫或宠物的做法通常都会以糟糕的结果告终，但一些地精、狗头人和米特福社区已经发展出有效利用这些害虫充当守卫的方法。还有一些群体会把蜈蚣烤来吃，常配以辛辣的胡椒，作为一道咸香的美味，不过在烹制时必须小心，以免生物的毒液污染肉质。

蜈蚣是生活在粪便与腐屑之间的猎手和食腐者，是冒险者所面对的一种相对常见且往往令人憎恶的威胁。它们以令人惊讶的速度窸窣爬行，靠着附着在细长分节身体上的数十条腿迅速移动，并以带毒的大颚发起攻击，用猛烈的毒素拖慢并折磨猎物，然后才安顿下来，悠然缓慢而令人作呕地进食。

Most giant centipedes (known as sewer centipedes when found in cities) nest in small groups but hunt alone when they seek out food. Attempts to domesticate giant centipedes for use as guardians or pets generally end poorly, but some communities of goblins, kobolds, and mitflits have developed effective methods of utilizing these vermin as guardians. Other groups roast and eat centipedes, often with pungent peppers as a savory delicacy, although care must be taken in preparing the meal to avoid tainting the flesh with the creature's venom.

Hunters and scavengers that live amid dung and detritus, centipedes are a relatively common and often reviled threat faced by adventurers. Scurrying about with surprising speed on the scores of legs attached to their long, segmented bodies, centipedes strike with poisoned mandibles to slow and torment their prey with a vicious toxin before they settle down to feed in slow and disgusting leisure.

Giant Rat - Remaster.name: 巨鼠 - 重制版 Giant Rat - Remaster

Putrid Plague.name: 腐臭瘟疫 Putrid Plague
Putrid Plague.description:
腐败瘟疫造成的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 状态在疾病被治愈前不会自行改善。

豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良影响（[[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4小时}）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（1天）

阶段 3 恶心 1 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}（1天）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}（1天）

阶段 5 死亡

The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions from putrid plague don't improve on their own until the disease is cured.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:14]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect ([[/br 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours})

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 Sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 day)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 5 dead

Giant Rat - Remaster.publicNotes:
巨鼠是普通害兽老鼠的巨大化版本。它们通常成群大量出现，但由于无法钻进普通老鼠平时藏身的那些缝隙角落，因此要更容易被发现和消灭。它们大多生活在下水道中，以拾食上方街道上的残渣为生，但也有一些巨鼠家族生活在更偏远的地点，例如潮湿的洞穴、森林或丘陵。老鼠是极其擅长生存的动物，几乎在世界上任何地方都能找到，不过相比寒冷地区，它们往往更偏好温带或温暖的气候。

虽然它的啮咬本身并不致命，除非对象是非常年幼或非常年老者，但巨鼠携带着世界各地啮齿动物常见的腐臭瘟疫——这种疫病完全足以蹂躏乡村社区。

老鼠是无处不在的祸害，在世界上几乎每一处聚居地的下水道和街道上乱窜。虽然一只普通老鼠从脚边飞快窜过，可能会让一般路人吃一惊，甚至感到害怕，但巨鼠和鼠群要危险得多。

Giant rats are enormous versions of the common vermin. They are typically found in abundant numbers, but since they cannot fit in the nooks where mundane rats typically hide, they are much easier to locate and exterminate. They mostly live in sewers where they can scavenge from the streets above, but some families of giant rats live in more remote locations, such as dank caves, forests or hills. Rats are incredibly adept survivors and can be found nearly anywhere in the world, though they tend to favor temperate or warm climates as opposed to cold regions.

Although its bite alone is not lethal except to the very young or very old, the giant rat carries the putrid plague common to rodents around the world—a pestilence more than capable of ravaging rural communities.

Rats are a ubiquitous menace, scurrying through the sewers and on the streets of nearly every settlement in the world. Though a regular rat darting underfoot might startle or even frighten the average passerby, giant rats and rat swarms are far more dangerous.

Hunting Spider - Remaster.name: 狩猎蜘蛛 - Remaster Hunting Spider - Remaster

Web Sense.name: 网觉 Web Sense
Web Sense.description:
猎蛛拥有不精确震颤感知，可侦测接触其蛛网的生物所产生的振动。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

The hunting spider has imprecise tremorsense to detect the vibrations of creatures touching its web.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Tremorsense]

Spring Upon Prey.name: 扑向猎物 Spring Upon Prey
Spring Upon Prey.description:
需求 尚未掷先攻。

触发 当狩猎蜘蛛位于其蛛网上时，一名生物触碰了该蛛网。

效果 狩猎蜘蛛会自动注意到该生物，并在掷先攻之前进行Stride、Climb，或在蛛网上下降。

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

Trigger A creature touches the hunting spider's web while the spider is on it.

Effect The hunting spider automatically notices the creature and Strides, Climbs, or Descends on a Web before it rolls initiative.

Descend on a Web.name: 蛛网上降落 Descend on a Web
Descend on a Web.description:
猎蛛沿直线向下移动，最多40尺，由一根蛛丝悬吊着。它可以悬挂在蛛丝上，或脱离坠下。它通过“沿蛛网下降”下降的距离不计入坠落伤害。

成功对蛛丝进行打击的生物（AC 20，硬度 3，5 HP）会将其切断，导致蜘蛛坠落。

The hunting spider moves straight down up to 40 feet, suspended by a web line. It can hang from the web or drop off. The distance it Descends on a Web doesn't count for falling damage.

A creature that successfully Strikes the web (AC 20, Hardness 3, 5 HP) severs it, causing the spider to fall.

Hunting Spider Venom.name: 猎蛛毒液 Hunting Spider Venom
Hunting Spider Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害，且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，且措手不及（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，且措手不及（1轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, and off-guard (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and off-guard (1 round)

Web Trap.name: 蛛网陷阱 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被狩猎蜘蛛的蛛网打击命中的生物将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 状态，并黏在最近的表面上，直到其 [[/act escape dc=17]]{逃脱（DC 17）}。

A creature hit by the hunting spider's web Strike is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and stuck to the nearest surface until it [[/act escape dc=17]]{Escapes (DC 17)}.

Hunting Spider - Remaster.publicNotes:
狩猎蜘蛛是最常见的巨蜘蛛种类，尽管并非体型最大。

很少有日常害虫能像臭名昭著的蜘蛛一样引发如此强烈的恐惧。

Hunting spiders are the most common type of giant spider, though not the largest.

Few everyday vermin inspire as much dread as the infamous spider.

Sewer Ooze - Remaster.name: 下水道软泥怪 - Remaster Sewer Ooze - Remaster
Sewer Ooze - Remaster.tokenName: 下水道软泥怪 Sewer Ooze

Motion Sense 60 feet.name: 动觉感知 60尺 Motion Sense 60 feet
Motion Sense 60 feet.description:
下水道软泥怪可以通过振动和空气流动感知附近的动静。

A sewer ooze can sense nearby motion through vibration and air movement.

Filth Wave.name: 污秽波 Filth Wave
Filth Wave.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 下水道软泥怪释放出一股污秽之浪，覆盖@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的所有生物。区域内的每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:17] 豁免，否则受到 @Damage[1d4[acid]] 伤害，并在 1 分钟内其各项速度承受 –10 尺减值（若大失败，该生物还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}）。

生物可以花费一个交互动作来帮他人清理身上的污秽，每次动作使速度减值减少 5 尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Qomp2EujVCbzJb4X]{效果：污秽之浪}

Frequency once per minute

Effect The sewer ooze unleashes a wave of filth, covering all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[type:reflex|dc:17] save or take @Damage[1d4[acid]] damage and take a –10-foot penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute (on a critical failure, the creature also falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}).

A creature can spend an Interact action to clean someone off, decreasing the Speed penalty by 5 feet with each action.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Qomp2EujVCbzJb4X]{Effect: Filth Wave}

Sewer Ooze - Remaster.publicNotes:
这些由污水和其他残骸构成的无定形团块，会穿行于大大小小城市下方肮脏的排水沟中。

史莱姆、霉菌和其他软泥怪可见于阴湿的地下城与幽暗的森林中。它们未必邪恶，但有些会长到极其庞大的体型，并拥有永不满足的食欲。

These amorphous masses of sewage and other detritus make their way through filthy culverts beneath cities large and small.

Slimes, molds, and other oozes can be found in dank dungeons and shadowed forests. While not necessarily evil, some grow to enormous sizes and have insatiable appetites.
Sewer Ooze - Remaster.prototypeToken: 下水道软泥怪 Sewer Ooze

Spring Upon Prey.description:
需求 尚未掷先攻。

触发 当狩猎蜘蛛位于其蛛网上时，一个生物触碰了该蛛网。

Requirements Initiative has not yet been rolled.

生物若成功对蛛丝进行打击（AC 20，硬度 3，5 HP），便会将其切断，导致蜘蛛坠落。

The hunting spider moves straight down up to 40 feet, suspended by a web line. It can hang from the web or drop off. The distance it Descends on a Web doesn't count for falling damage.

A creature that successfully Strikes the web (AC 20, Hardness 3, 5 HP) severs it, causing the spider to fall.

Hunting Spider Venom.name: 猎蛛毒液 Hunting Spider Venom
Hunting Spider Venom.description:
豁免检定 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，且措手不及（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，且措手不及（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:16]

Web Trap.name: 蛛网陷阱 Web Trap
Web Trap.description:
被猎蛛的蛛网打击命中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{动弹不得}，并被黏在最近的表面上，直到其[[/act escape dc=17]]{脱逃（DC 17）}。

Mature Spider - Remaster.publicNotes:
狩猎蜘蛛是最常见的巨蜘蛛种类，尽管不是体型最大的。

很少有日常害虫能像臭名昭著的蜘蛛那样激起如此强烈的恐惧。

Hunting spiders are the most common type of giant spider, though not the largest.

Few everyday vermin inspire as much dread as the infamous spider.
Mature Spider - Remaster.prototypeToken: 成熟巨蜘蛛 Mature Giant Spider

Boar Carcass.name: 野猪尸体 Boar Carcass
Boar Carcass.description:
这头成年野猪的尸体，其皮和肉能卖出不错的价格，但它有点沉，携带起来也很笨重。

此价值适用于完整且死亡不超过一天的尸体。

This adult boar carcass could get a decent price for its hide and meat, but it is a bit heavy and ackward to carry.

Value is for the full carcass that is not older than a day.

Boar Meat.name: 野猪肉 Boar Meat
Boar Meat.description:
未变质的优质板肉包，足够提供 3 份每日口粮。

Unspoiled package of fine board meat enough for 3 daily rations.

Potion of Emergency Escape.name: 紧急逃脱药水 Potion of Emergency Escape
Potion of Emergency Escape.description:
启动 A（操纵）

紧急脱逃药水的瓶塞经过特别制作，能在危急关头轻易崩开。当你饮用这瓶药水时，你会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑} 状态，持续1分钟，并且在持续时间内只要你处于逃跑状态，你的所有速度都获得+40尺状态加值。你立即进行一次Stride。

Activate A (manipulate)

The stopper for a potion of emergency escape is crafted to easily snap open in dire circumstances. When you drink this potion, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 minute, and you gain a +40-foot status bonus to all your Speeds for the duration as long as you are fleeing. You immediately Stride.

Cannonball.name: 炮弹 Cannonball
Cannonball.description:
加农炮或许是所有黑火药攻城武器中最广为人知的一种，这是因为它们在威力与成本之间取得了不错的平衡。阿肯斯塔的要塞与堡垒更倾向于用加农炮来强化防御力量，因为它们相对容易制造，而且其弹药也足够便宜，能够大量储备。


瞄准 t 100尺，最小距离50尺
装填 d (操纵) 2次，需要一次成功的DC 20 运动 检定
发射 a (操纵, 射程增量200尺) 6d12 钝击伤害，单一目标，DC 23 反射

Cannons are perhaps the most well known of all black powder siege weapons, and that's because they represent a good midpoint between power and expense. Keeps and fortresses in Alkenstar prefer to fortify their forces with cannons, as they're relatively easy to construct and their ammunition is cheap enough to build up great supplies.


Aim t 100 feet, minimum distance 50 feet
Load d (manipulate) 2 times, requires a successful DC 20 Athletics check
Launch a (manipulate, range increment 200 feet) 6d12 bludgeoning, single target, DC 23 Reflex

Fish Camp Deed.name: 渔营地契 Fish Camp Deed
Fish Camp Deed.description:
本契据作为所有权文书，确认对坐落于奥塔里湾内寇托斯岛南海岸的土地与住宅的所有权。

所有矿产、植物群、动物群、材料、建筑结构及相关麻烦，均由所列各方以均等份额共同承担责任并享有所有权，且拥有其认为适当时调整权益份额的完整权利。

本契据授予的价格为： 0pp/0gp/0sp/0cp

受让人：

  • PC (xx%)
  • PC (xx%)
  • PC (xx%)
  • PC (xx%)

奥塔里每月税额固定为：300sp

签署：

This deed serves as an instrument of ownership to the land and dwelling on South Coast of the Isle of Kortos nestled in the Bay of Otari.

All mineral, flora, fauna, materials, structures and troubles are fully under the accountability and ownership of listed parties in equal shares wth full rights to adjust shares of interest as they deem.

This deed was granted at the price of: 0pp/0gp/0sp/0cp

Grantees:

  • PC (xx%)
  • PC (xx%)
  • PC (xx%)
  • PC (xx%)

Otari Monthly Taxes will be fixed at: 300sp

Signed:

Hireling.name: 雇工 Hireling
Hireling.description:
受雇的劳工可以按日为你提供服务。

非熟练佣工可以从事简单的体力劳动，并且在大多数技能上为未受训。

熟练佣工具有某一特定技能的专家熟练度。佣工的等级为0。

如果需要进行技能检定，未受训的佣工拥有+0调整值，而熟练佣工在其专长区域内拥有+4调整值，进行其他技能检定时则为+0。

如果佣工要和你一起去冒险，他们的报酬会翻倍。

Paid laborers can provide services for you Per Day.

Unskilled hirelings can perform simple manual labor and are untrained at most skills.

Skilled hirelings have expert proficiency in a particular skill. Hirelings are level 0.

If a skill check is needed, an untrained hireling has a +0 modifier, while a skilled hireling has a +4 modifier in their area of expertise and +0 for other skill checks.

Hirelings’ rates double if they’re going adventuring with you.

Hireling (Skilled).name: 雇工（熟练） Hireling (Skilled)
Hireling (Skilled).description:
受雇的劳工可以按日为你提供服务。

无技能雇工可以进行简单的体力劳动，且在大多数技能上都是未受训。

熟练雇工具备某一特定技能的专家熟练度。雇工为0级。

如果需要进行技能检定，未受训雇工的调整值为+0，而熟练雇工在其专长领域的调整值为+4，其他技能检定则为+0。

如果雇工要跟随你一起进行冒险，他们的报酬会翻倍。

Paid laborers can provide services for you Per Day.

Unskilled hirelings can perform simple manual labor and are untrained at most skills.

Skilled hirelings have expert proficiency in a particular skill. Hirelings are level 0.

If a skill check is needed, an untrained hireling has a +0 modifier, while a skilled hireling has a +4 modifier in their area of expertise and +0 for other skill checks.

Hirelings’ rates double if they’re going adventuring with you.

Marvelous Miniature (Chest).name: 奇妙微型（宝箱） Marvelous Miniature (Chest)
Marvelous Miniature (Chest).description:
启用 1（操作）

每个奇妙微缩模型都是某个真实生物或物体的极小复制品。该微缩模型由木材、白镴或其他简单材料制成，并在复制品底座的下方刻有一道符文。奇妙微缩模型有时会成套包装；例如，露营套装包含小船、营火和马匹微缩模型。启用一个奇妙微缩模型会使其变形为另一种生物或物体，随后便可以像正常使用该物体一样使用它。每个微缩模型只能被启用一次，其中大多数会永久变成其描述中的物品。

当你使用这个微缩模型时，一个小木箱会出现并立即打开。这个箱子最多可以容纳价值 10 负载的物品。一旦箱子被关上，它会再次变形——这一次变成一把钥匙——并将其中储存的所有物品一并带走。你可以花费一个交互动作来在想象中的锁里转动这把钥匙，从而启用它，使其再次变回一个箱子，里面的所有物品仍然都在。

一旦它第二次变成箱子，它将永远保持为一个木箱。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Every marvelous miniature is an exceptionally small replica of a real creature or object. The miniature is made from wood, pewter, or other simple materials, and features a rune etched into the underside of the replica's base. Marvelous miniatures sometimes come packaged together; for example, the camping set features the boat, campfire, and horse miniatures. Activating a marvelous miniature causes it to transform into another creature or object, which then can be used as normal for that object. Each miniature can be activated only once, with most of them permanently becoming the item in their description.

When you use this miniature, a small wooden chest appears and immediately opens. This chest can hold up to 10 Bulk worth of items. Once the chest is closed, it transforms again—this time into a key—taking all of the stored items with it. You can activate this key by spending an Interact action to turn it in an imaginary lock, which causes it to transform back into a chest with all of the items still inside.

Once it has turned into a chest a second time, it forever remains a wooden chest

Spacious Pouch (Type I).name: 宽敞袋（I型） Spacious Pouch (Type I)
Spacious Pouch (Type I).description:
尽管它看起来像是一个以色彩华丽的丝绸拼片或时尚刺绣装饰的布袋，宽敞袋却会通向一个比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。袋内所装的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。袋子内异次元空间所能容纳的负载量取决于其类型。

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互，将物品存放其中或将其取出，就像使用普通麻袋一样。尽管这个袋子能容纳大量物质，但物体仍必须能够通过袋口，才能被存放在里面。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它会破裂并被毁坏，导致里面的物品永远遗失。如果把它翻个底朝天，里面的物品会毫发无伤地掉出来，但必须先把袋子恢复原状后才能再次使用。被放入袋中的活体生物有足够维持 10 分钟的空气，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱逃。袋中的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。袋中的物品无法被只能侦测同一位面事物的魔法探测到。

容量 25 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 25 Bulk

Spacious Pouch (Type II).name: 宽敞袋（II型） Spacious Pouch (Type II)
Spacious Pouch (Type II).description:
虽然它看起来只是一个以色彩华丽的丝绸拼片或时髦刺绣装饰的布袋，但宽敞袋会通向一个比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。袋内容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。这个袋子的异次元空间能够容纳多少负载，取决于其类型。

你可以通过对宽敞袋执行交互动作，像使用普通麻袋一样将物品放入其中或取出。虽然这个袋子能容纳大量材料，但物体仍必须能够穿过袋口，才能被储存在其中。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它会破裂并被毁坏，导致里面的物品永远丢失。如果把它翻转过来，里面的物品会毫发无损地洒出来，但必须先将袋子恢复原状后才能再次使用。被放入袋中的活物有足够维持 10 分钟的空气，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱逃。袋中的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。袋中的物品无法被只侦测同一位面事物的魔法探测到。

容量 50 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 50 Bulk

Spacious Pouch (Type III).name: 宽敞袋（III型） Spacious Pouch (Type III)
Spacious Pouch (Type III).description:
尽管它看起来像是一个以色彩华丽的丝绸饰片或时尚刺绣装饰的布袋，宽敞袋会通向一处比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。袋内所容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。该袋超次元空间所能容纳的负载量取决于其类型。

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互动作，将物品存放其中或将其取出，就像使用普通麻袋一样。尽管这个袋子能容纳大量物质，物体仍必须能够穿过袋口，才能被存放在里面。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它会破裂并被毁坏，导致其中的物品永远丢失。如果把它翻到里面朝外，里面的物品会完好无损地洒出来，但必须先将袋子恢复原状后才能再次使用。被放入袋中的活体生物有足够维持 10 分钟的空气，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱逃检定。袋中的物品不会提供任何益处，除非先将其取出。袋中的物品无法被只能侦测同一位面事物的魔法探测到。

容量 100 负载

The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 100 Bulk

Spacious Pouch (Type IV).name: 宽敞袋（IV型） Spacious Pouch (Type IV)
Spacious Pouch (Type IV).description:
尽管它看起来像是一个布袋，并以色彩华丽的丝绸拼片或时尚刺绣加以装饰，宽敞袋却会通向一个比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。袋内所容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。袋子异次元空间所能容纳的负载量取决于其类型。

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互，以将物品收纳其中或将其取出，就如同使用一个普通麻袋一样。尽管这个袋子能容纳大量物质，但物体仍必须能够通过袋口，才能被存放在里面。

如果袋子超载或损坏，它会破裂并被毁坏，导致其中的物品永远丢失。如果把它翻个里朝外，里面的物品会毫发无损地掉出来，但必须先将袋子恢复原状，才能再次使用。被放入袋中的活体生物有足够维持 10 分钟的空气，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 进行脱逃检定。袋中物品除非先被取出，否则不会提供任何益处。袋中的物品无法被只能侦测同一位面事物的魔法探测到。

容量 150 负载

Though it appears to be a cloth bag decorated with panels of richly colored silk or stylish embroidery, a spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the bag doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself. The amount of Bulk the bag's extradimensional space can hold depends on its type.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the bag can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the bag is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the bag must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the bag has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the bag provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the bag can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 150 Bulk

Surgeon's Steadiness.name: 外科医的稳健 Surgeon's Steadiness
Surgeon's Steadiness.description:
你受到鼓舞，变得更加专注。在接下来的10分钟内，你在停用装置时获得+2环境加值。

You are inspired and more attentive. For the next 10 minutes, you receive a +2 Circumstance Bonus to Disabling a Device.

Admired: Otari.name: 敬仰：奥塔里 Admired: Otari
Admired: Otari.description:
该组织或团体中的许多成员都认识你，其中若干成员对你持 @UUID[Item.FHxPEohhxHL3ULJ8]{Helpful} 态度。

你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} 和提出 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} 以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} 的外交检定时获得 +3 状态加值

You are known by many members of this organization or group, and several of its members are @UUID[Item.FHxPEohhxHL3ULJ8]{Helpful} toward you.

You gain a +3 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} as well as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}

Disliked: Otari.name: 厌恶：欧塔里 Disliked: Otari
Disliked: Otari.description:
你在这个团体的几名成员中名声很差。许多成员都认识你，而且通常对你是 @UUID[Item.2NMi3p6COC8JZZ96]{不友善} 态度。

你在进行交涉检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}、进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求} 以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集信息} 时获得 -1 状态加值

You have a poor reputation amongst several members of this group. Many members know you, and are usually @UUID[Item.2NMi3p6COC8JZZ96]{Unfriendly} to you.

You gain a -1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} as well as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}

Hated: Otari.name: 憎恶：奥塔里 Hated: Otari
Hated: Otari.description:
你惹恼了这个群体。绝大多数成员都认识你，并且对你抱有极其负面的看法。许多成员对你处于@UUID[Item.VUCk8Y7XH4TzmYpe]{敌对}态度。

你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集信息}的外交检定时获得-3状态加值

You have earned this groups ire. The vast majority know you, and have an extremely unfavorable opinion of you. Many members are @UUID[Item.VUCk8Y7XH4TzmYpe]{Hostile} to you.

You gain a -3 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} as well as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}

Hunted: Otari.name: 被追猎：奥塔里 Hunted: Otari
Hunted: Otari.description:
即使要让整个团体付出巨大代价，他们也会积极地追捕你。每个成员都听说过你，并且对你持有@UUID[Item.VUCk8Y7XH4TzmYpe]{敌对}态度，还决心冒重大风险来摧毁或阻挠你。

你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}的外交检定，以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{打探消息}时，获得-5状态加值

You are actively hunted even at a great cost to the group. Every member has heard of you and is @UUID[Item.VUCk8Y7XH4TzmYpe]{Hostile} toward you and is determined to take major risks to destroy or thwart you.

You gain a -5 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} as well as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}

Liked: Otari.name: 喜欢：奥塔里 Liked: Otari
Liked: Otari.description:
该组织或团体的许多成员都认识你，其中数名成员对你是@UUID[Item.VO9ZuhztceCrWZ5m]{友善} 的。

你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集信息} 的外交检定时，获得+1状态加值。

You are known by many members of this organization or group, and several of its members are @UUID[Item.VO9ZuhztceCrWZ5m]{Friendly} toward you.

You gain a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} as well as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}

Revered: Otari.name: 尊者：奥塔里 Revered: Otari
Revered: Otari.description:
这个组织或团体的每一位成员都知道你，而且每位成员对你都是@UUID[Item.FHxPEohhxHL3ULJ8]{帮手}态度。你备受赞誉。对他们而言，你们是英雄。这个团体愿意为你承担重大风险。

你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}和提出@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}，以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集情报}的外交检定时获得+5状态加值

You are known by every member of this organization or group, and every member is @UUID[Item.FHxPEohhxHL3ULJ8]{Helpful} toward you. You are celebrated. You are heroes to them. The group would take major risks for you.

You gain a +5 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} as well as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}

Horsechopper.name: 斩马刀 Horsechopper
Horsechopper.description:
这种武器由地精创造出来，用于对抗马匹，本质上是一根长柄，末端装有带大型钩子的刀刃。

Created by goblins to battle horses, this weapon is essentially a long shaft ending in a blade with a large hook.

Shortbow.name: 短弓 Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这种较小的弓由一整块木头制成，深受散兵和骑兵青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，既能提供一定防护，又能保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木材制成。它在一端靠箭羽保持飞行稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 铆钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor
Studded Leather Armor.description:
这件皮甲用金属铆钉加固，有时还配有小型金属板，在提供大部分皮甲灵活性的同时，给予更坚实的防护。

This leather armor is reinforced with metal studs and sometimes small metal plates, providing most of the flexibility of leather armor with more robust protection.

Trip Wire Kit.name: 绊线套件 Trip Wire Kit
Trip Wire Kit.description:
一个小型容器中的补给品，可以布设成一个 @UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{地精绊线}

Supplies in a small contained that can be set up to create a @UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{Goblin Trip Wire}

+1 Dagger.name: +1 匕首 +1 Dagger
+1 Dagger.description:
这种带刃的小型武器单手持用，用于在近战中刺击生物。它也可以被投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Antidote (Lesser).name: 解毒剂（次等） Antidote (Lesser)
Antidote (Lesser).description:
启动 A 交互

解毒剂能保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在 6 小时内对抗毒药的强韧豁免检定获得 +2 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7z1iY4AaNEAIKuAU]{效果：解毒剂（次级）}

Activate A Interact

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7z1iY4AaNEAIKuAU]{Effect: Antidote (Lesser)}

Healer's Toolkit (Expanded).name: 治疗者工具包（扩展） Healer's Toolkit (Expanded)
Healer's Toolkit (Expanded).description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的器具包，是进行医疗检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗中毒}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗创伤}时是必需的。扩充版医者工具包为此类检定提供+1物品加值。如果你穿戴着医者工具包，你可以将其作为使用它的动作的一部分抽出并放回。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Expanded healer's toolkits provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Healing Potion (Minor).name: 治疗药水（次级） Healing Potion (Minor)
Healing Potion (Minor).description:
治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用时会带来一阵刺痛般的感觉，同时饮用者的伤口迅速愈合。当你饮用治疗药水时，你恢复 [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 生命值}。

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r 1d8[healing]]]{1d8 Hit Points}.

Healing Potion (Lesser).name: 治疗药水（次级） Healing Potion (Lesser)
Healing Potion (Lesser).description:
治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时，会感到一阵刺痛般的麻感。喝下治疗药水时，你恢复 [[/r (2d8+5)[healing]]]{2d8+5 生命值}。

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain [[/r (2d8+5)[healing]]]{2d8+5 Hit Points}.

Friendly.name: 友好型 Friendly
Friendly.description:
该状态反映了某个生物对特定角色的态度，并且只有超自然效果（如法术）才能将该状态施加给PC。对某个角色友好的生物喜欢该角色。它很可能会同意该角色提出的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}，只要这些请求简单、安全，并且完成起来代价不高。如果该角色（或其盟友之一）对该生物使用敌对动作，则该生物会根据该敌对动作的严重程度获得一个更差的态度状态，具体由GM决定。

This condition reflects a creature's disposition toward a particular character, and only supernatural effects (like a spell) can impose this condition on a PC. A creature that is friendly to a character likes that character. It is likely to agree to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Requests} from that character as long as they are simple, safe, and don't cost too much to fulfill. If the character (or one of their allies) uses hostile actions against the creature, the creature gains a worse attitude condition depending on the severity of the hostile action, as determined by the GM.

Helpful.name: 有帮助的 Helpful
Helpful.description:
这个状态反映了一个生物对特定角色的态度，并且只有超自然效果（例如法术）才能将这个状态施加给PC。一个对某角色抱有帮助态度的生物会希望积极地帮助该角色。它会接受该角色提出的合理 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{要求}，只要这些要求不会以牺牲该乐于助人的生物的目标或生活质量为代价。如果该角色（或其盟友之一）对该生物使用了敌对动作，则该生物会根据敌对动作的严重程度获得一个更差的态度状态，具体由GM决定。

This condition reflects a creature's disposition toward a particular character, and only supernatural effects (like a spell) can impose this condition on a PC. A creature that is helpful to a character wishes to actively aid that character. It will accept reasonable @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Requests} from that character, as long as such requests aren't at the expense of the helpful creature's goals or quality of life. If the character (or one of their allies) uses a hostile action against the creature, the creature gains a worse attitude condition depending on the severity of the hostile action, as determined by the GM.

Hostile.name: 敌对 Hostile
Hostile.description:
该状态反映了某个生物对特定角色的态度，并且只有超自然效果（例如法术）才能将其施加于 PC。对某个角色怀有敌意的生物会主动寻求伤害该角色。它不一定会进行攻击，但不会接受该角色提出的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}。

This condition reflects a creature's disposition toward a particular character, and only supernatural effects (like a spell) can impose on a PC. A creature hostile to a character actively seeks to harm that character. It doesn't necessarily attack, but it won't accept @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Requests} from the character.

Indifferent.name: 冷漠 Indifferent
Indifferent.description:
该状态反映了某个生物对特定角色的态度，且只有超自然效果（如法术）才能将该状态施加于PC。一个对某个角色持冷漠态度的生物，并不真的在乎那个角色，无论好坏。除非另有说明，否则假定一个生物对某个特定角色的态度为冷漠。

This condition reflects a creature's disposition toward a particular character, and only supernatural effects (like a spell) can impose this condition on a PC. A creature that is indifferent to a character doesn't really care one way or the other about that character. Assume a creature's attitude to a given character is indifferent unless specified otherwise.

Unfriendly.name: 不友好 Unfriendly
Unfriendly.description:
该状态反映了某个生物对特定角色的态度，而且只有超自然效果（如法术）才能将该状态施加给PC。一个对某角色不友好的生物会厌恶并不信任该角色。处于不友好态度的生物不会接受该角色的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}。

This condition reflects a creature's disposition toward a particular character, and only supernatural effects (like a spell) can impose this condition on a PC. A creature that is unfriendly to a character dislikes and distrusts that character. The unfriendly creature won't accept @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Requests} from the character.

Gather Information.name: 收集信息 Gather Information
Gather Information.description:
你在当地的市场、酒馆和聚会场所四处打听，试图了解某个特定人物或主题。GM 决定这次外交检定的 DC 以及所需时间（通常为 2 小时，但有时会更久），以及你通过花钱进行贿赂、请客喝酒或赠送礼物可能获得的任何好处。

成功 你收集到关于该人物或主题的信息。具体内容由 GM 决定。

大失败 你收集到关于该人物或主题的错误信息。

收集信息任务示例

  • 未受训 街谈巷议
  • 受训 常见传闻
  • 专家 隐秘传闻、防备不严的秘密
  • 大师 严加看守或深奥的信息
  • 传奇 只有极少数人知晓的信息，或只有非凡存在才知道的信息

You canvass local markets, taverns, and gathering places in an attempt to learn about a specific individual or topic. The GM determines the DC of the Diplomacy check and the amount of time it takes (typically 2 hours, but sometimes more), along with any benefit you might be able to gain by spending coin on bribes, drinks, or gifts.

Success You collect information about the individual or topic. The GM determines the specifics.

Critical Failure You collect incorrect information about the individual or topic.

Sample Gather Information Tasks

  • Untrained talk of the town
  • Trained common rumor
  • Expert obscure rumor, poorly guarded secret
  • Master well-guarded or esoteric information
  • Legendary information known only to an incredibly select few, or only to extraordinary beings

Boar Charge.name: 野猪冲锋 Boar Charge
Boar Charge.description:
野猪沿直线两次【Stride】，然后进行一次獠牙【Strike】。只要它至少移动了20尺，它的攻击掷骰便获得+2环境加值。

The boar Strides twice in a straight line and then makes a tusk Strike. As long as it moved at least 20 feet, it gains a +2 circumstance bonus to its attack roll.

Healer's Tools (Expanded).name: 治疗者工具（扩展） Healer's Tools (Expanded)
Healer's Tools (Expanded).description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行“施予急救”“治疗疾病”“治疗毒素”或“治疗伤口”的医疗检定所必需的。强化医师工具对此类检定提供+1物品加值。如果你穿戴着你的医师工具，你可以将其作为使用它们的动作的一部分取出并放回。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to Administer First Aid, Treat Disease, Treat Poison, or Treat Wounds. Expanded healer's tools provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. If you wear your healer's tools, you can draw and replace them as part of the action that uses them.

Module Content Summary.name: 模组内容摘要 Module Content Summary
Module Content Summary.text:
你好！感谢你下载这个模块！这个模块的开发源于我个人对 PF2E 系统的喜爱、许多模块开发者所形成的文化，以及我想把自己为玩家创作时所享受的一切分享给他人的愿望，而这一切在很大程度上都受惠于围绕 FVTT 的协作社群。希望你会喜欢这个模块。我会继续随着时间推移对它进行更新和改进。

模块内容

本模块包含地图、物品、说明文档，以及自定义和衍生资源。

请查看本日志中的致谢以及模块描述，并考虑为这一具有一定衍生性质作品的创作者和开发者提供支持。

资源总计

3 张地图

34 件物品

说明文档 + 日志

150+ 个主动地块

22 个角色，21 个 MATT 模板，7 辆载具，22 个宝箱

2 个宏（其中 1 个有 7 种变体）

100 项叙事升级

200+ 个地块

3,600 行用于自动化升级的脚本

2 本日志

3 个图像文件，1 个短视频

5 个音效

这 100 项叙事升级分为五个升级等级，营地会一步一步、每次一个地块地从“不洁” > “整洁” > “基础” > “优良” > “非凡”！

地图

本模块包含 Tamily Tanderveil 旧海滩营地的两张地图：

  1. Beaten Forest Path - 探索与遭遇

  2. Beach Camp - 仅遭遇

  3. Beach Base - 可升级

物品

  1. +1 匕首（属于下文提及冒险的奖励之一，仅因其与一个自动化危害地块绑定而被收录）

  2. Fish Camp 地契

  3. 雇工

  4. 熟练雇工

  5. 奥塔里声望效果：共 6 个效果，具有自动化的外交关系等级

日志

Beaten Forest Path 地图的目标，是鼓励进行更长时间的探索，并让 GM 能以一种不只是“‘特警式’地城爬行之间那十分钟休息”的方式引入这种游戏模式——这种情况可能曾出现在《Menace Under Otari》中。该日志提供了多个由地图支持的选项，以鼓励探索活动。

说明文档

  1. 模块概览（就是本文件！），概述所包含内容、致谢、版本日志，以及关于 PF2E 子系统的建议。

  2. GM 必读（GM），说明如何使用本模块、这些地图，以及为提升玩家体验而提供的叙事支持。

  3. 必读（玩家）- 这是给玩家使用的无剧透指南，方便他们规划并追踪自己的升级。

音乐

由于这是一个免费模块，本模块包含的音效、环境音或音轨非常少。我强烈且只推荐 Michaël Ghelfi Studios (MGS)。我个人版本中使用了他最高质量的声音资源，未来的付费版本也可能会包含他的资源。

Hello! Thank you for downloading this module! The development of this module grew out of my personal enjoyment of the PF2E systems, the culture of many of the module developers and my desire to share with others what I have enjoyed creating for my own players largely indebted to the collaborative community surrounding FVTT. I hope that you enjoy this module. I will continue to update it and improve it over time.

Module Contents

This module contains maps, items, instructions, and custom as well as derivative assets.

Please see the Acknowledgements in this journal as well as the module description and consider contributing to the creators and developers of this moderately derivative creation.

Total Assets

3 Maps

34 Items

Instructions + Journals

150+ Active Tiles

22 Actors, 21 MATT templates, 7 Vehicles, 22 Chests

2 Macros (1 with 7 variations)

100 narrative upgrades

200+ Tiles

3,600 lines of script automating upgrades

2 Journals

3 Image Files, 1 Video Short

5 SFX

The 100 narrative upgrades occurs through five upgrade levels taking the camp from Unclean > Clean > Basic > Superior > Extraordinary one tile at a time!

Maps

This module contains two maps of Tamily Tanderveil's former Beach Camp:

  1. Beaten Forest Path - Exploration and Encounter

  2. Beach Camp - Encounter Only

  3. Beach Base - Upgradeable

Items

  1. +1 Dagger (part of the rewards from the adventure referenced below, it is included only because it is tied to an automated hazard tile)

  2. Fish Camp Deed

  3. Hireling

  4. Hireling Skilled

  5. Otari Reputation Effects: These are 6 effects that have automated diplomacy standing

Journals

The Beaten Forest Path map's objective is to encourage extended exploration and allow the GM to introduce this Mode of Play in a way that is more than "the ten minute break between 'swat-style' dungeon crawl" that may have occurred in Menace Under Otari. The journal provides a number of options supported by the map to encourage Exploration Activities.

Instructions

  1. Module Overview (this document!) outlining what is included, acknowledgements, version logs, and suggestions on PF2E subsystems.

  2. GM Read Me (GM) outlining instructions on how to use the Module, the Maps, and Narrative support for the player's enjoyment

  3. Read Me (Players) - this is a spoiler free guide for the players to use so they can plan and track their upgrades

Music

This module contains very little SFX, Ambience or Sound Tracks since it is a Free Module. I highly and solely recommend Michaël Ghelfi Studios (MGS). My personal version includes his highest quality sounds and a future paid version may include his assets as well.

Troubles in Otari.name: 奥塔里疑云 Troubles in Otari
Troubles in Otari.text:
奥塔里疑云

海滩营地遭遇专用地图仅适用于从 Paizo 购买的独立冒险《奥塔里疑云》（TiO），供 2级 PC 使用。它是 TiO 这部三章节冒险的第一章。虽然这些地图并不要求必须拥有该冒险，但仍强烈建议购买，因为它为英雄们最终达到 2级的《新手盒》（BB）战役提供了一个很好的承接。在完成 TiO 第1章后，英雄们将达到 3级，而塔米莉会将海滩营地赠予他们，作为“行动基地”。

当然，作为 GM，你可以在任何你想为玩家提供替代性成长路线或奖励的冒险中使用这张可升级地图。

注意：两张地图都对 Paizo 提供的 pdf 地图做了轻微修改，只是为了给这片地产提供更多延伸空间（以及一个合适的洗澡地点！）

Troubles in Otari

The Beach Camp Encounter Only map works with the standalone adventure "Troubles in Otari" (TiO) purchased from Paizo for Level 2 PCs. It is the first chapter of the three chapter adventure from TiO. While the maps do not require that Adventure, it is highly recommended to purchase it as it offers a nice pivot from the Beginner Box (BB) Campaign where the heroes end up at Level 2. After completing Chapter 1 of TiO, the heroes will be Level 3 and Tamily gives them the Beach Camp as a "Base of Operations."

Naturally, as the GM, you can use this upgradable map for any adventure where you want to provide the players with alternative progression or rewards.

Note: Both maps do include a slight alteration to the pdf supplied map from Paizo simply to provide more extension to the property (and a proper place to bathe!)

PF2E Subsystems.name: PF2E 子系统 PF2E Subsystems
PF2E Subsystems.text:
本模组使用了若干子系统和变体规则。你可以对其中任意一项进行调整，以贴合你的偏好。

子系统

  1. 胜利点数被用作触发基地升级时进行一次技能检定的“货币”。你可以用它们替代 XP 发放，或与 XP 一同发放。我两种方式都会使用；但当我在玩家团队达到下一个指定里程碑前冻结升级进度时，我会用它们来替代 XP 发放。VP 的比例如下：

    遭遇：每击败或规避 1 个生物等级，获得 1VP（每个生物至少 1VP）

    危害：当英雄们克服危害时，每个危害等级获得 1VP

    成就：我使用 1:1 的比例（轻微为 10VP，中等为 30VP，重大为 80VP；某些情况下我也给过 50VP 的版本）

  2. 声望用于追踪在区域性组织中的整体影响力（例如鱼鹰俱乐部、寇托斯财团、伐木公司、奥塔里镇）。由于它们会作为基地升级的奖励提供，因此它们为英雄们对周边区域产生的影响提供了叙事上的机会。若这些影响对奥塔里或伐木营地具有实质意义，我也会参照《游戏主持指南》第 164 页，以较为保守的数值将声望点作为“任务”奖励发放。这里我还加入了一些与声望系统对应的“物品”，当这些物品提供给英雄时，会自动处理 FVTT 中的技能检定。

  3. 领导力主要被用作一种叙事工具，并在冒险队伍投资其行动基地时，为他们提供实际的额外好处。随着他们投入胜利点数，累计数值会转化为一个领导力等级，而该等级会提供新的特权或收益。

注意：对于这些系统的使用，我通常会对宝藏做轻微但不实质性的调整。我的主要动机是提升沉浸式体验，同时也提供一种在不累计常规 XP 时给予奖励的方式。这能帮助玩家感觉自己正在朝某个目标努力。

变体规则：

  1. 慢速 XP：在我的许多游戏中，运行奥塔里战役时我会使用慢速 XP，以帮助新玩家学习，同时也让所有玩家更有沉浸感。它也有助于缓解在某个当前无法获得 XP 的里程碑上停留过久所带来的“卡住”感。

  2. 里程碑：如果我计划在 BB/TiO 之后运行 AV，我会使用里程碑规则（如 AV 战役中所建议的那样），以帮助英雄们不至于感觉自己过于强大。通常我会将 XP 冻结在 TiO 各章节的等级，并始终提供 VP，以便他们将这些点数花在升级其行动基地上。

  3. 长期目标：对于任何希望自己的英雄拥有长期目标的玩家，我也会使用 LTG，作为提供成长进展的另一种方式。（随着后续版本发布，我可能会提供这些 LTG 的叙事内容，因为它们可以迁移，并且与星陨之灾、星石以及预言破灭之年的更广泛故事相连，从而让玩家更有重要性的感受。）

替代方案：

如果你或你的玩家不太想追踪 VP（我使用一个叫做 “Party Resources” 的简单模组，作者是 Dave Lens），那么你也可以在达到里程碑时，按所有房间发放若干房间或整整一个升级等级。行动基地可以一直支援英雄直到 20 级，因此你可以将升级逐步计入成就奖励中。

This module makes use of several subsystems and variant rules. Any of them can be adapted to support your preferences.

Subsystems

  1. Victory Points are used as the currency for triggering a Skill Check on upgrading the base. You can reward them in place or XP or alongside XP. I award them both ways, but award them in place of XP when I freeze leveling until the player group hits the next designated milestone. The VP rate is as follows

    Encounters: 1VP per defeated or avoided Creature level (minimum 1 VP per creature)

    Hazards: 1VP per Hazard level when the heroes over come it

    Accomplishments: I use a 1:1 ratio (10VP for Minor, 30VP for Moderate, and 80VP for Major; in some cases I have given 50VP versions)

  2. Reputation is used to track overall influence within regional Organizations (e.g., Osprey Club, Kortos Consortium, Lumber Companies, Town of Otari). Since they are provided as rewards for upgrading the base, they provide a narrative opportunity for the heroes' impacts on the surrounding area. I also provide conservative amounts of Reputation points in alignment with the Gamemastery Guide Page 164 as "quest" rewards if they are material impacts to Otari or the Lumber camps. I have included here, "items" that align with the Reputation system that when provided to the heroes automates the FVTT skill checks.

  3. Leadership is used largely as a narrative device and to provide material perks to the adventuring party as they invest in their Base of Operations. As they invest Victory Points, the cumulative amounts convert to a Leadership Level, and that level provides new perks or benefits.

Note: I generally adjust Treasure slightly but not materially for the use of these systems. My primary motive is immersive experience, but also a way to provide rewards when not accumulating general XP. It helps the players feel like they are working toward something.

Variant Rules:

  1. Slow XP: In many of my games, I will use Slow XP when running the Otari campaigns as way to help new players learn, but also all players feel immersive. It also helps to alleviate feelings of being "stuck" too long on a milestone where XP may not be presently earned

  2. Milestones: If I am planning on running AV after BB/TiO, I use Milestone Rules (as suggested in AV Campaign) to help the heroes not feel overpowered. I generally freeze XP at the TiO chapter levels and provide VP always so that they can spend these on upgrading their Base of Operations.

  3. Long Term Goals: I also use LTG for any player that wants their hero to have one as another way to provide progression. (I may provide these LTG narratives in later releases as they are transferable and connect to the broader story of Earthfall, Starstone, and the Age of Lost Omens giving the players a greater sense of significance.

Alternative:

If you or perhaps your players are not thrilled about tracking VP (I use a simple module called "Party Resources" by Dave Lens), then you could award a number of rooms or an entire upgrade level across all rooms by Milestone Reached. The Base of Operations does support the heroes through Level 20, therefore, you can account for upgrades incrementally as accomplishment rewards.

Acknowledgements.name: 鸣谢 Acknowledgements
Acknowledgements.text:
本模组免费提供给直接下载它的用户使用。其资源、脚本和方法不得被出售、转售，也不得用于其预定用途之外的任何目的。

本模组依赖其他若干模组与创作者。我强烈鼓励用户为这些创作者做出贡献并给予支持，因为他们对 FVTT 社区的贡献远远不止于本模组。

此外，我还列出了一些虽然未在本模组中使用、但由于本模组是免费的，其资源可以集成进来以增强你的玩家体验的创作者。

Paizo

虽然本模组不提供任何冒险内容，但它支援 Paizo 的《Troubles in Otari》。在本次发布时，这个独立冒险及其 Beach Camp/Base of Operations 目前尚无地图支援。我非常支持购买、下载并使用该 PDF，你可以在他们的网站上购买。

链接： https://paizo.com/products/btq026k1?Pathfinder-Adventure-Troubles-in-Otari

Baileywiki

我非常感谢 Baileywiki 团队，不仅因为他们的资源被用于我的地图或他们的预制件中，也因为他们介绍并认可了其他富有创造力的贡献者，比如 Ripper 和 IronMonk，同时还为 Dungeondraft 和 FVTT 提供了源源不断的视频教程。他们都是很好的人，提供一站式服务，我强烈推荐他们。

链接： https://www.patreon.com/baileywiki | https://www.youtube.com/c/baileywiki

IronMonk

首先，IronMonk 是个很棒的人；其次，他 100% 的模组都是免费提供的，但你仍然应该支持他。他的开发成果以一种使本模组得以运作的方式构成了整个模组的基础，否则它将几乎无法使用。虽然我使用了他的大多数模组，但本模组尤其大量使用了 Monks' Active Tile Triggers（也称 MATTs）。我还想特别感谢 Crowguard，他做了大量工作来编写文档，说明如何最好地发挥 MATTs 的强大能力。

链接： https://www.patreon.com/ironmonk | https://github.com/ironmonk88/monks-module-wiki/wiki/Monk%27s-Active-Tile-Triggers

theRipper93

本模组使用了 Levels、Better Roofs 和 Tile Sort。Ripper 不仅是一位出色的开发者，会深入思考并围绕终端用户价值进行极其出色的实现，他还提供了完整文档。如果你还没有支持他，那你应该这么做。没有他的贡献，我在 FVTT 上绝不会有这么多乐趣。

链接： https://theripper93.com/#modules | https://www.patreon.com/theripper93

Tom Cartos

Tom 是一位很有才华的艺术家，我在本模组中使用了他的许多资源。他的线条非常干净，风格鲜明。这些模组中的许多衍生资源都来自整合了他创作成果的资源。无论你是想用他的 Dungeondraft 资源自己制作地图，还是使用他的完整地图、指示物和冒险内容，我都鼓励你支持他。

链接： https://www.patreon.com/tomcartos

DungeonQuill

DQ 为 Dungeondraft 提供了海量资源。这些模组中使用了许多这类资源。Jan 还会在某些支持档位提供定制资源，而这张地图中的船架正是他应我的要求为我制作的定制作品。这些模组中的许多衍生资源都来自整合了他创作成果的资源。

链接： https://www.patreon.com/dungeonquill

Forgotten Adventures

FVTT 社区非常了解 FA 的高质量资源。他们为 FVTT 和 Dungeondraft 都制作地图、指示物和资源。这些模组中的许多衍生资源都来自整合了他们创作成果的资源。

链接： https://www.forgotten-adventures.net/ | https://www.patreon.com/forgottenadventures

The Gorgon

动态资源来自 The Gorgon。当我在冒险中加入动态地块时，我从他的作品中收获了不少积极反馈。请考虑支持他。

链接： https://www.patreon.com/The_Gorgon/about

Icons

这里的图标要么来自创作者，要么是基于创作者作品的衍生作品，要么是原创，要么是 Core FVTT 原生内容。创作者及其衍生作品基于作者 Lorc、Skoll 和 Delapouite 的内容，并采用 CC 4.0 DEED 许可。

链接： https://game-icons.net/

Sound Files

部分用于掷骰结果的器乐音效由 Pixabay GmbH 创作。

Michael Ghelfi Studios (MGS)

由于本模组是免费提供的，因此其中不包含 MGS 音频。不过，除极少数例外，我在个人地图中一直都只使用 MGS，因为我长期支持他们的作品。就 FVTT 而言，MGS 毫无疑问是极其出色的作曲团队。他们提供不同时长的音乐、环境音和音效。他们一直有大量项目在进行，并且与支持者保持充分互动。

链接： https://www.patreon.com/MichaelGhelfi | https://michaelghelfistudios.com/who-we-are/ | https://www.youtube.com/@MichaelGhelfiStudios | https://michaelghelfistudios.bandcamp.com/

联系作者

如果你想就问题、反馈或建议与我联系，你可以在 Discord 上通过 Wise5638 找到我。

虽然这份内容是免费的，但你也可以在 https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun 上支持我，或购买我的高级包之一。当你“购买”免费模组时，你也会获得我的 Discord 链接。

This module is provided as free to use to users who directly download it. The assets, scripts, and methods cannot be sold, resold or used for any purposes outside of their intended purpose.

This module relies on several other modules and creators. I highly encourage users to contribute to and support these creators as their contributions to the FVTT community go well beyond this module.

Additionally, I have listed creators that are not used in this module since it is Free, but whose assets can be integrated to enhance the experience for your players.

Paizo

While this module does not provide any adventure content, it supports Troubles in Otari by Paizo. At the time of this release, there is no current map support for that standalone adventure or its Beach Camp/Base of Operations. I highly support the purchase, download, and use of the PDF which you can buy on their website.

Links: https://paizo.com/products/btq026k1?Pathfinder-Adventure-Troubles-in-Otari

Baileywiki

I am extremely grateful for the Baileywiki team not just in assets used within my maps or their prefabs, but their introduction and acknowledgement of other creative contributors like Ripper and IronMonk as well as their endless supply of video tutorials for both Dungeondraft and FVTT. They are good people, a full service shop, and I highly endorse them.

Links: https://www.patreon.com/baileywiki | https://www.youtube.com/c/baileywiki

IronMonk

First, IronMonk is a great guy, and second, he provides 100% of his modules for free, BUT you should support him. His development underlies this entire module in a way that would make it otherwise inert. While I use most of his modules, this module is heavily using Monks' Active Tile Triggers (aka MATTs). I want to give an additional shout-out to Crowguard who has done a lot of the work to create documentation on how to best leverage the power of the MATTs.

Links: https://www.patreon.com/ironmonk | https://github.com/ironmonk88/monks-module-wiki/wiki/Monk%27s-Active-Tile-Triggers

theRipper93

This module uses Levels, Better Roofs, and Tile Sort. Ripper is not only a great developer who thinks hard and executes extremely well against the end users value, he also provides FULL documentation. If you are not supporting him, you should. I would not have nearly as much fun on FVTT without his contributions.

Links: https://theripper93.com/#modules | https://www.patreon.com/theripper93

Tom Cartos

Tom is a talented artist, and I use many of his assets within the module. He has very clean lines, and a distinct style. Many of the derivative assets in these modules come from integrated assets from his creative craft. Whether you want to create your own maps with his Dungeondraft assets or use his full maps, tokens, and adventures, I encourage you to support him.

Links: https://www.patreon.com/tomcartos

DungeonQuill

DQ provides a TON of assets for Dungeondraft. Many of these assets are used within these modules. Jan does custom assets as well at certain tiers, and the boat rack in this map is specifically from customer work he did for me at my request. Many of the derivative assets in these modules come from integrated assets from his creative craft.

Links: https://www.patreon.com/dungeonquill

Forgotten Adventures

The FVTT community is very aware of the high quality assets from FA. They create maps, tokens, and assets both for FVTT and Dungeondraft. Many of the derivative assets in these modules come from integrated assets from their creative craft.

Links: https://www.forgotten-adventures.net/ | https://www.patreon.com/forgottenadventures

The Gorgon

Moving assets are from The Gorgon. I have received several positive acknowledgements from his work when I have included motion tiles in adventures. Please consider supporting him.

Links: https://www.patreon.com/The_Gorgon/about

Icons

The icons in here are either from creators, derivatives from creators, unique, or native to Core FVTT. Creators and derivative work is based on content from the authors Lorc, Skoll, and Delapouite by CC 4.0 DEED.

Links: https://game-icons.net/

Sound Files

Some instrumental sounds provided for roll results were composed by Pixabay GmbH.

Michael Ghelfi Studios (MGS)

There are no MGS sounds in this module since it is offered for Free. However, I used MGS exclusively with few exceptions in my personal maps as I have long supported their work. MGS is by no close second a great composer for FVTT. He provides Music, Ambience, and SFX at varying lengths. He always has a tone of projects going and is fully engaged with his supporters.

Links: https://www.patreon.com/MichaelGhelfi | https://michaelghelfistudios.com/who-we-are/ | https://www.youtube.com/@MichaelGhelfiStudios | https://michaelghelfistudios.bandcamp.com/

Contacting the Author

If you'd like to get in touch with a question, feedback, or suggestion, you can find me on Discord as Wise5638.

While this content is free, you can support me on https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun or purchase one of my Premium Packs. When you "purchase" a free modules, you will get the link to my Discord as well.
