Release & Roadmap.name: 发布与路线图 Release & Roadmap
Release & Roadmap.text:
奥塔里的麻烦 - 增强地图

此模块内含地图、棋子、物品、宏、日志条目及其他工具，提供完整体验，将 Paizo 在星石岛与奥塔里地区的冒险连接起来。

在此了解更多： https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun

当前版本 - 更新内容！

  1. 重制版角色

  2. 重制版物品

  3. 所有已放置物品均已重制

  4. 为 Monster Core 中不再支持的角色提供了一些新的替代方案

路线图（又称待办清单）- 值得期待的内容！

该模块现将更多进入维护模式。此前待办清单上的所有内容仍将由 Wise Gaming 制作，但会归入其他模组（免费与付费皆有）。

我仍会处理修复工作，并会为曾报告 FPS 问题的用户制作此模块的低分辨率版本。我可能会添加一个“制作”设施，或将“道场”房间升级做成一个可由 GM 替换进去的图块。

我采用这种方式的主要原因如下：

  1. 出于多种原因，我已将我的核心美术资源转移到一个新的设计团队名下

  2. 这个模组相当大，我想将其中原本计划的其他部分拆分开来，以便用户更容易挑选自己想要的内容

  3. 授权许可。我坚定地站在做正确之事的一边；我发布的一些产品可能会与 Paizo 兼容，而另一些则会使用他们的世界观与设定。我希望将这些内容分开，并尊重 Paizo 所完成的工作。

什么是增强地图？

“增强”地图是一种动态且可交互的场景，可能包含自动化动画、自动化图块触发、多层、高度、移动、宏等诸多内容。其目的是帮助你作为 GM，为玩家带来一种开箱即玩的“惊艳”体验，并支持不同游戏桌可能喜爱的各种元素。

Troubles in Otari - Enhanced Maps

This module comes packaged with maps, tokens, items, macros journal entries and other tools providing a comprehensive experience that provides connectivity between Paizo's adventures on Starstone Isle and the Otari Region.

Learn more here: https://ko-fi.com/wisewhun

Current Release - What's New!

  1. Remastered Actors

  2. Remastered Items

  3. Remastered all placed items

  4. Some new alternatives for Actors no longer supported in Monster Core

Roadmap (aka Backlog) - Things to look forward to!

This module will now enter more of a maintenance mode. Every thing previously on the backlog will still be produce by Wise Gaming, but they will come under other mods (both free and premium).

I will still be addressing fixes, and will work toward a lower res version of this module for folks that have had FPS issues reported. I may add a "crafting" facility in place or the "dojo" room upgrade as a tile the GM could swap into it.

My main reason for this approach is the following:

  1. I have moved my core art assets under a new design team for a number of reasons

  2. This mod is fairly large and I want to break up the other intended pieces within it so that users can more easily pick and choose what they want

  3. Licensing. I am firmly in the camp of doing what is right, and some products I may release can be compatible with Paizo while others will use their world and lore. I want to keep these things separate and honor the work that Paizo has done.

What is an enhanced Map?

An "enhanced" map is a dynamic and interactive scene which may include automated animations, automated tile triggers, multiple layers, elevations, movement, macros and much more. The intention is to help you as the GM deliver a "wow" factor to your players that is ready to play and supportive of what elements each table may enjoy.

Video: Beaten Forest Path.name: 视频：荒林小径 Video: Beaten Forest Path

Encounter (1) - Wild Boars.name: 遭遇（1）- 野猪 Encounter (1) - Wild Boars

Wild Boars.name: 野猪 Wild Boars
Wild Boars.text:
为玩家做准备 - 探索模式

建议（尤其是面对新玩家时）回顾一下 Pathfinder 2E 中的游戏模式：探索模式，以及它的好处和它在遭遇模式与休整模式之间的衔接作用。下方链接了常见的探索行动，以及一个宏，你可以在选中每个指示物后激活它。

当玩家指示物就位、地图激活后，请朗读以下内容：

你们在南海岸大道上前半段旅程轻松愉快，步调悠闲。你们一边交换故事与抱负，一边看着奥塔里渐渐隐没在下方那处依偎于峭壁线中的海湾里。

你们沿着塔米莉指示的方向走上道路的南侧岔路，开始下一段行程。这里的小径与南海岸大道分离，继续向更南方延伸。你们脚下的新路是一条穿过松林峡谷、被踩踏出来的泥土小道。你们注意到一些古老、干硬、被泥土凝结住的车辙，那是湿泥一次又一次被车轮碾过、又反复干结后留下的痕迹。这显然不是一条常有人走的路，但肯定偶尔会有人使用。灌木、因风而低伏的长草沟痕，以及各类矮丛在树木之间茂密生长。蚱蜢与蝉鸣彼此争胜。沿着这道平缓却坚定向下的斜坡才走出几步，你们的感官便被陈旧松木、野草与覆苔岩石的气息填满。

@UUID[JournalEntry.MiYbTd35OOwUwgNr]{Video: Beaten Forest Path}

英雄可以做的事：

  • 选择探索行动

  • 保持警觉或对周遭环境充满好奇，观察区域并戒备即将到来的事物！

  • @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}

  • 根据任务调整旅行速度！

探索 - 泥土小径

在英雄们开始沿这条被踩踏出来的林间小路缓缓下行之前，让他们先 @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}

自从塔米莉上次来到这里后，野猪们很喜欢这片地方，数量也增长了。温暖的长草、树根，以及岩石和树木交错的环境为这些动物提供了大量遮蔽与食物。它们已经相当喜欢这一带，也见过一些——但不算很多——旅人。这里还有它们的幼崽，因此它们会对任何经过的东西都显得相当凶猛。

这些野猪分布在小路两侧。更深处还有更多野猪，除非受到挑衅，或者 PCs 过于接近幼崽，否则它们不会发起攻击。地精们也常在这条路上来来回回，希望伏击毫无防备的小型旅行队伍，并收取“过路费”才让对方通过。若英雄们保持警觉，或发现了它们存在的证据，他们可能会得到一些额外优势。

泥土小径

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYtYKa1gDEl7y2N0]{Defend}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}

这段道路的起始部分除了马车车辙外，还有动物的足迹与粪便，以及类人生物的足迹。

周边环境察觉 [Nature, Search]

  • DC22 - 看到最近的野猪，它们只是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} 但也处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}
  • DC18 - 听到最近野猪的喷鼻声，它们处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}
  • DC16 - 闻到一丝动物气味，野猪处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}
  • 失败 - 任何 <16 的结果，野猪都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

检查道路 [Search]

  • 大成功：成功，外加发现额外的类人生物足迹

  • 成功：旧马车痕迹、动物足迹和粪便

  • 失败：一条磨损但很少使用的道路

  • 大失败：食人魔的足迹！

回忆知识 - 与发现内容相关

这些是什么类型的足迹？

  • DC26 - 确切辨认出野猪和地精的数量，并知道其中 2 头野猪是幼崽

  • DC18 - 野猪足迹，以及地精足迹

  • DC16 - 野猪足迹，但另一种不太确定，只知道是小型类人生物

  • 失败 - 任何 <16 的结果，都无法推断出任何信息，且不能再次尝试

我们对野猪了解什么？ - DC16*

  • 大成功：动物、野猪、备注，以及 2 条由玩家选择的信息

  • 成功：动物、野猪、备注，以及 1 条由玩家选择的信息

  • 失败：动物，以及 1 条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给出错误信息）

  • 大失败：生物，以及 2 条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给出错误信息）

追踪已发现的足迹

  • 大成功：注意到两条踪迹，并且无需额外耗时即可同时追踪两者

  • 成功：追踪其中一条踪迹，但如果他们看见第二条，可在第 3 次探索请求时再次尝试

  • 失败：丢失踪迹，但可以在第 3 次探索请求时再次尝试

  • 大失败：丢失踪迹，并额外多花 1 小时旅行

*根据学识（技能）和《回忆知识》规则中的尝试次数，相应调整 DC。

遭遇开始

当英雄们进入发现区域或踏上草地时，野猪会在英雄们各自进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} 后尝试使用野猪冲锋。他们可以使用自己偏好的任意感官（精确、不精确或模糊）。

遭遇

野猪（2）*

MOD 2

@UUID[Actor.h1yGBIXE1gqLpS5A]{Boar (TiO)}, @UUID[Actor.bxIRgK7imQ8fxjMc]{Young Boar (TiO)}

4 VP

野猪总会从其初始指示物位置使用野猪冲锋，但每当它们 Stride 时，都会沿着泥土小路 Stride，试图将旅人朝道路任一方向驱赶下去

战斗行为

  • 初始接战：对措手不及的英雄使用 @UUID[Item.NKR2QFVCFihAYq2A]{Boar Charge}

  • 0HP 之前： @UUID[Item.NKR2QFVCFihAYq2A]{Boar Charge} + 朝同一方向 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Stride}

  • 降至 0HP 时：使用 @UUID[Item.caRDVAHUIPBHrFlZ]{Ferocity}，并会站住战斗直到下个回合结束。下个回合结束后，它会朝掩蔽物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Stride}，并尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}。如果它逃走后仍遭到攻击，它会站定死战到底

*额外野猪

  • 如果英雄们进入 boar 3 周围 30 尺内的草地（嗅觉范围），它也会参战或再次参战。

  • 如果英雄们靠近母野猪，它会参战，而它的幼崽会在母亲之后 1 轮参战。

遭遇结束

当所有已参战的野猪都被击败或逃走时。

英雄可以做的事：

  1. 把野猪尸体带回镇上出售“整猪”（5 小时）

  2. 处理野猪 - 口粮（1 小时）

  3. 继续沿路前进

  4. 攀爬悬崖

  5. 抄近路 - 穿越深草（困难地形）

奖励与后续探索

野猪被视为优质食材，而它们的皮、骨与毛也可制成刷子、扫帚及其他实用工具。让玩家进行一次 BLIND @Check[type:society|dc:19]，看看他们知道/回忆起多少关于奥塔里对野猪的需求。

我们对死去的野猪知道什么？

  • 大成功：回忆起奥塔里的农夫公会愿意支付 5gp per 玩家们可以把野猪带回镇上卖钱，或切出足够的口粮。并且相信每位英雄可从中获得 3 份口粮。

  • 成功：回忆起奥塔里的农夫公会愿意支付 2gp5sp per 玩家们可以把野猪带回镇上卖钱，或切出足够的口粮。并且相信每位英雄可从中获得 3 份口粮。

  • 失败：相信可以从中获得 3 份口粮

  • 大失败：这是一只带病且不洁的动物，把它带给奥塔里的任何人都会让他们觉得自己是你的下一个目标！

谁知道怎么处理野猪？

让指定的一名玩家完成一次 @Check[type:survival|dc:16]

  • 大成功：每位英雄可从中获得 6 份口粮 - @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat}, （每位玩家给 2 份）

  • 成功：每位英雄可从中获得 3 份口粮 - @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat}

  • 失败：每位英雄可从中获得 1 份口粮 - @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat} - 移除 2 次充能

  • 大失败：你割伤了自己，还毁掉了尸体，你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

    奖励

    @UUID[Item.bSp4cY9ZzSvlqnab]{Boar Carcass}, @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat}

    1. 10VP - 击败或避开野猪

    2. XP - 仅限击败的野猪

    3. 金币（尸体）或口粮（每头处理好的野猪）

  • 英雄们可以决定他们要如何穿越这张地图。

继续沿路前进

如果玩家选择继续沿道路前进，他们可以恢复或改变自己的 @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}。当他们经过这个图标时

该地块会自动要求他们更新自己的探索行动。最终玩家们会遭遇地精收费关卡。

攀爬悬崖

如果任意时刻有英雄决定 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb} 悬崖，他们必须在 Athletics 上为受训，并且拥有一个连接在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.fyYnQf1NAx9fWFaS]{Rope} 上的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6DCy7tEF1cxaIJMy]{Grappling Hook}，以使用 DC18；或者他们在 Athletics 上为专家，或使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}，则无需钩索并使用 DC18

  • 大成功 - 向上、横向或安全地下行通过斜坡，移动 5 尺，外加每 20 尺陆地速度再多移动 5 尺，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}

  • 成功 - 向上、横向或安全地下行通过斜坡，每 20 尺陆地速度移动 5 尺，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}

  • 失败 - 没有进展，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}

  • 大失败- 坠落并以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 着地，承受坠落伤害

抄近路

英雄们可以选择穿越野猪领地；如果他们能够以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} 对抗野猪的察觉，或者击败所有野猪，他们就可以绕到正在等待并准备伏击旅人的地精身后。这是困难地形，因此 GM 需要根据地形以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} 来调整移动。

Preparing players - Exploration Mode

It is suggested (especially with new players) to review Exploration Mode of Play in Pathfinder 2E as well as its benefits and bridge between Encounter Modes or Downtime Mode. Common Exploration Activities are linked below as well as a Macro, which you can activate after selecting each token.

When the player tokens are situated, the map activated, read the following:

Your first half of your journey on the South Coast Road was cheerful and taken at an easy pace. You traded tales as well as aspirations while Otari faded below into its nestled cliff line cove.

You take the southern fork in the road Tamily directed and begin your next leg as this path diverges from the South Coast Road and travels more southernly. Your new path is a beaten dirt track through a ravine of pine. You notice old dried and dirt hardened wheel ruts where wet mud was traversed and dried time and time again. It is clearly not a frequently used path, but certainly used on occossion. Brush, lamented long grass grooves, and shrubs grow thick among the trees. Grasshoppers and Cicadas choruses combat. A few steps into this gradual and determined downward slope, your senses are filled with old pine, wild grass, and mossy rock.

@UUID[JournalEntry.MiYbTd35OOwUwgNr]{Video: Beaten Forest Path}

Things Heroes Can do:

  • Select Exploration Activity

  • Be ready or curious about their surroundings, observe the area and be on guard ready for what may be next!

  • @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}

  • Adjust travel speed relative to task!

Exploration - The dirt Track

Before the heroes begin their gradual decent down the beaten forest path, have them @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}

Wild boars have enjoyed this space and grown in population since last Tamily was here. The warm long grass, roots, and mixture of rock and tree give the animals plenty of shelter and food. They have grown quite fond of the area and see some, but not many travelers. They have younglings in the area and therefore are quite fierce to anything that passes by.

The boars are on either side of the path. There are more deeper in that will not attack unless provoked or the PCs get too close to the younglings. Goblins have also been up and down this path in hopes of ambushing unexpecting smaller traveling parties and charging a "toll" to pass through. Heroes that are alert or find evidence of their presence may get some additional advantages.

The Dirt TRack

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYtYKa1gDEl7y2N0]{Defend}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}

This initial part of the road has animal prints and scat as well as humanoid prints besides the wagon wheel ruts.

General Surrounds Perception [Nature, Search]

  • DC22 - See closest boars, they are but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}
  • DC18 - Hear snorts of nearest boars, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}
  • DC16 - Whiff of an animal, boars are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}
  • Failure - Any result <16 boars are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

Examining the Road [Search]

  • Critical Success: Success plus additional humanoid tracks

  • Success: Old wagon tracks, animal tracks and scat

  • Failure: A worn and seldom used road

  • Critical Failure: Troll tracks!

Recall Knowledge - Relative to Discoveries

What type of Tracks are these?

  • DC26 - Exact number of Boar and Goblin and 2 Boars are youngling

  • DC18 - Boar tracks, and Goblin

  • DC16 - Boar tracks, but other one not sure but small humanoid

  • Failure - Any result <16, infers nothing and cannot try again

What Do We know about boars? - DC16*

  • Critical Success: Animal, Boar, Notes, and 2 pieces of player selected information

  • Success: Animal, Boar, Notes, and 1 pieces of player selected information

  • Failure: Animal, and 1 pieces of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)

  • Critical Failure: Creature, and 2 piece of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)

Following Discovered Tracks

  • Critical Success: Notices both trails and can follow both with no additional time

  • Success: Follows one trail but can try again at 3rd Exploration Request for second trail if they see it

  • Failure: Loose trail but can try again at 3rd Exploration Request

  • Critical Failure: Loose trail and spend an extra 1 hours traveling

*Adjust the DC relative to Lore skills and attempts per rules on Recall Knowledge.

Encounter Starts

When the heroes enter the Discovery Zone or step onto the grass. The boars will attempt a Boar Charge after the heroes each get @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}. They can use whatever Sense (precise, imprecise, or vague) they prefer.

Encounter

Boars (2)*

MOD 2

@UUID[Actor.h1yGBIXE1gqLpS5A]{Boar (TiO)}, @UUID[Actor.bxIRgK7imQ8fxjMc]{Young Boar (TiO)}

4 VP

The boars will always use Boar Charge from their initial token placement, but anytime they Stride, they will Stride on the dirt path trying to scare the travelers down the road in either direction

Combat Behaviors

  • Prior to 0HP: @UUID[Item.NKR2QFVCFihAYq2A]{Boar Charge} + @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Stride} in same direction

  • Once at 0HP: @UUID[Item.caRDVAHUIPBHrFlZ]{Ferocity} and will stand and fight until end of next turn. After end of next turn, it will @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Bcxarzksqt9ezrs6]{Stride} toward cover, and attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}. If attacked after it flees, it will stand and fight to the death

When all engaged boars are defeated or flee.

Things Heroes Can Do:

  1. Take Boar Carcass to town to sell the "Whole Hog" (5hrs)

  2. Clean the Boar - rations (1hr)

  3. Proceed on Path

  4. Climb Cliffs

  5. Short Cut - traverse the deep grass (difficult terrain)

Rewards & Continued Exploration

Wild Boars are considered good food and their skins, bones, and hair make for brushes, brooms, and other useful tools. Ask the players to do a BLIND @Check[type:society|dc:19] to see what they know/recall about Otari's desire for boar.

What do we know about dead boar?

  • Critical Success: Recall that Otari's Farmer's Guild will pay 5gp per The players can take the boar back to town for a profit or cut up enough for rations. Also believe you can get 3 rations per hero from it.

  • Success: Recall that Otari's Farmer's Guild will pay 2gp5sp per The players can take the boar back to town for a profit or cut up enough for rations. Also believe you can get 3 rations per hero from it.

  • Failure: Believe you can get 3 rations from it

  • Critical Failure: Disease ridden and unclean animal, bringing this to someone in Otari would be a signal to them that they are your next target!

Who knows how to clean a boar?

Have a designated player complete a @Check[type:survival|dc:16]

  • Critical Success: 6 rations per hero from it - @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat}, (give each player 2)

  • Success: 3 rations per hero from it - @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat}

  • Failure: 1 rations per hero from it - @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat} - remove 2 charges

  • Critical Failure: Cut yourself and destroyed the carcass, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}

    Rewards

    @UUID[Item.bSp4cY9ZzSvlqnab]{Boar Carcass}, @UUID[Item.09Aqwh43A7pYCeQd]{Boar Meat}

    1. 10VP - defeating or avoiding boars

    2. XP - defeated boars only

    3. Gold (carcass) or ration (per cleaned boar)

  • Heroes can decide how they will traverse the map.

Proceed on Path

If the players choose to continue on the road, they can resume or change their @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}. When they pass this icon

the tile will automatically ask them to update their Exploration Activity. Eventually the players will encounter the Goblin Toll.

Climb Cliffs

If at any point a hero decides to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb} the Cliff, they must be Trained in Athletics and have a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6DCy7tEF1cxaIJMy]{Grappling Hook} attached to a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.fyYnQf1NAx9fWFaS]{Rope} to use DC18 or they are an Expert in Athletics or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} with no Hook/Rope and use a DC18

  • Critical Success - move up, across, or safely down the incline for 5 feet plus 5 feet per 20 feet of your land Speed, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}

  • Success - move up, across, or safely down the incline for 5 feet per 20 feet of your land Speed, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}

  • Failure - No progress, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}

  • Critical Failure- fall and land @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} with fall damage

Short Cut

Heroes may choose to traverse the boar territory, which if they are able to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} against the Boar's perception, or they defeat all the boars, they can come up behind the goblins who are waiting and ready to ambush travelers. This is Difficult Terrain, therefore, the GM will need to adjust the movement for terrain and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}.

Figure: Wild Boars.name: 图像：野猪 Figure: Wild Boars

Encounter (2) - Goblins Tolls.name: 遭遇（2）- 哥布林收费站 Encounter (2) - Goblins Tolls

A02. Goblin Commandos.name: A02. 地精突击队 A02. Goblin Commandos
A02. Goblin Commandos.text:
准备伏击

这是一个重度等级的遭遇（如果英雄们选择采取攻击性行动）。鼓励创造性做法，但也要通过他们的遭遇行动，为他们提供关于正在逼近的地精的线索（侦察、攀爬峭壁、调查踪迹，以及如果他们知道地精就在附近时，对地精进行回忆知识）。解决这一情况的方法不止一种，而且其中没有任何一种会被奖励为“更好”。

我建议提前为这3只地精掷 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} [Stealth]，并把它们放入战斗遭遇中。由于它们在英雄到来之前先进行了 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}，因此它们获得+4环境加值。

在碰到那个看不见的“暂停格”之前，英雄们应该已经有3次机会选择/更换探索行动。

探索优势

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYtYKa1gDEl7y2N0]{Defend}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}

以下是根据英雄们的探索行动可给予的建议性优势，可以在即将发生的交锋前给予，或在你的叙事中最合理的时机给予。

Avoid Notice

那些缓慢前进、贴着崖壁侧身而行、探头窥视转角、攀爬或利用上方树冠从高处推进的英雄获得：

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} 以及对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} 的+4

Defend

那些正披挂武器或举起盾牌的英雄，看起来会更有威慑力。

  • 对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} 获得+2

Detect Magic

专注于侦测魔法并接近地精的英雄，会感觉到事情并不只是收过路费那么简单。

  • 当你看见地精时，对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} 获得+2，并且对其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} 获得+2

Investigate and Track

那些一直在仔细追踪足迹并理解它们是什么、通往何处的英雄，会掌握更多信息并反应更快。

  • 对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} 获得+2，且对他们下一次反射豁免获得+2

Scout

这位尽职的英雄在为自己承担风险的同时，也一直让队伍保持安全。

  • 全队下一次先攻掷骰获得+1，而进行侦察的人获得+2。他们还对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} 获得+2

当他们到达暂停格时，朗读以下内容：

太阳似乎早已越过西边的林线。树影涂抹在峭壁侧面。覆着更多苔藓的峡谷带着一种天然的阴暗，阳光正缓缓失去温暖岩石的力量。随着下坡变得更快并逐渐开阔，更新鲜的空气似乎朝你们飘来。

你突然停下，向身后的同伴打了个手势。站在你面前的是一个矮小、隐在阴影中的生物。它伸出一把长柄近战武器，拦住你们的去路。它一只手从马砍刀的握柄上松开，朝你们张开手掌示意，并命令道，

“我们清清路路，做做守守卫卫，花花时间、费费力气、惹惹麻烦都要收过过路费。” [20gp]

英雄们可以做的事：

  • 每位玩家获得一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}

  • 冲过去逃跑、往回逃跑、偷偷绕过去、谈判/留下印象、胁迫、欺骗/说谎/冒充、制造牵制、付钱，或威胁/攻击。

最后一段路

这个遭遇为重度。其中包括另外3只隐藏的地精。两只在上方，已经搭弓待发；一只在下方（队长）躲在灌木丛下，准备绊倒任何从旁跑过的人。

从正面接近

如果英雄们是沿着泥土小路过来的，那么当他们踩到那个不可见格子时就会被暂停。你可以根据他们 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} 的结果，向他们提供以下信息。

从上方接近

如果部分或全部英雄是从峭壁上方过来的，并且处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} 状态，他们的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} 会获得+4加值（位置与侦测状态）。

最后一段路——一次社交交涉！

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} , @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}

地精的战术是从旅人身上敲诈20金币，然后继续等待下一个受害者。英雄们正在进行的探索行动可以提供环境加值。

快速环顾搜索 - 相对DC：

  • DC22 - 获得“D20”的结果，此外你还会看见前方灌木里有一些动静，但它现在是隐藏的，并且因为重新调整了位置而拥有轻度掩护
  • DC20 - 你看到上方峭壁上有一些动静，地精们处于隐藏状态，但拥有标准掩护
  • DC18 - 你听到上方峭壁上传来一些窸窣声，峭壁上的地精处于未被察觉状态
  • <D18 - 那只地精显然是单独一只！其他地精都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

Recall Knowledge - Goblins @Check[society|dc:16]*

  • 大成功：类人生物、地精、备注，以及2条由玩家选择的信息

  • 成功：类人生物、地精、备注，以及1条由玩家选择的信息

  • 失败：智能类人生物，以及1条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给他们错误信息）

  • 大失败：生物，以及2条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给他们错误信息）

Sense Motive - DC14 [BLIND]

如果英雄们想在这个生物发出命令之后，或在它回应他们某次社交互动时察言观色，可使用以下结果：

  • 大成功：你注意到这个生物抽动了一下，手似乎拂过了腰带上的一个小瓶子，仿佛正准备抓起它；它的语调似乎也提高了一点（像是想让别人听见），并且有一只眼睛似乎很快地向上方峭壁瞟了一下（峭壁上的地精侦测等级降低一级）

  • 成功：你注意到这个地精抽动了一下，手似乎拂过了腰带上的一个小瓶子，仿佛正准备抓起它

  • 失败：这生物看起来是在相当直接地对你说话，哪怕你并不喜欢这场谈话。

  • 大失败：你感觉到它眼里似乎泛起泪水，喉头哽咽，仿佛它只是想靠诚实劳动养活自己和挨饿的家人而已（blind -1减值至下一次先攻掷骰）

威吓或欺骗手段 - DC15（任何 ATTACK 动作都会立刻触发失败条件）

  • 大成功：地精吹口哨，叫它隐藏的同伴们出来并放下武器

  • 成功：过路费降到10金币

  • 失败：这个生物迅速从腰带上抓起并喝下它的 @UUID[Item.4aiZLNaAhAmMA1LV]{Potion of Emergency Escape}，获得其效果。掷先攻（把这个生物放在最底部）

  • 大失败：你太沉浸于自己的独白、嘲讽或编造出来的故事，连自己都被自己打动了；直到你下个回合结束前，你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}，并且适用上述失败条件。

支付过路费

  • 如果英雄们选择支付过路费，无论是最初金额还是协商后的金额，他们就进入下方的奖励部分，并可以把他们的指示物移动到地图末端（记得关闭绊线）。

  • 如果英雄们选择不支付过路费，那么就让玩家们掷先攻！

*按照回忆知识相关规则，根据学识技能和尝试次数调整DC。

遭遇开始

当英雄们做出以下任一行为时：

  1. 使用任何攻击动作或直接动武（另见上方失败条件）

  2. 尝试向前移动（越过地精）

  3. 追赶地精

遭遇

地精突击队员（3）& 首领

重度 2

@UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{Goblin Trip Wire}, @UUID[Actor.Sb8I7xsRyhZ4KfDx]{Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - Remaster}, @UUID[Actor.K49XR7vTBxxAIdYW]{Goblin Commando Bowman (TiO) - Remaster}, @UUID[Actor.VhUJrm8SwlCGEiot]{Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster}

7 VP

这个收过路费的地精总会从腰带上拿出 @UUID[Item.4aiZLNaAhAmMA1LV]{Potion of Emergency Escape} 并喝下（共2个动作），然后逃跑（如药水所述）。它会沿着北端山坡绕回去，直到药水效果结束。如果战斗持续超过10轮，它会像其他地精突击队员一样参战。

战斗行为

  1. 峭壁上的地精突击队员（重复）：

    向射程内路径上最靠下方的目标射箭

    @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}

    @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}

  2. 地精队长

    触发 @UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{Goblin Trip Wire}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.dLgAMt3TbkmLkUqE]{Ready} （如果有人被绊倒，它会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} 以拔出并改为双手握持马砍刀，然后对触发绊线的目标腿部进行Strike

  • 后续轮次：威吓 > Strike > 移动到弓手射程内的格子

  • 如果没有人进入近战，则切换为远程攻击

地精不会追击！

地精队长可能会说的话……

  1. 我要拿走你们那些亮闪闪的东西！

  2. 别逼我吹口哨叫更多人来

  3. 跑，或者交钱，长腿鬼

  4. 你们死了之后，你们身上的金币我们也照拿！

  5. 想少一颗眼珠子吗？

  6. 那是什么味儿，你们裤裆里的袋子已经弄脏了吗？

  7. 小的们，打那个娇滴滴的家伙

  8. 松鼠抓痕——你们就这点本事吗！

  9. 怎么，得有三条腿才能站稳是吧？

  10. 瞧它那德性，还以为钢铁能割破地精皮呢！哈哈哈

遭遇结束

当所有地精被击败、所有英雄逃离地图，或地精队长被杀死时（其余地精会逃进树林——离开地图）

英雄们可以做什么

这些地精身上只有它们携带的装备，而英雄们可以掠夺这些东西。

宝藏

玩家可以搜索地精尸体，或者它们周围的区域。

地精装备

无论他们是击败、避开、支付还是逃离地精，都给予VP和XP

  1. 7VP - 地精 + 陷阱

  2. 10VP - 因探索行动和作为路霸的小成就！

  3. XP - 陷阱和地精

  4. 尸体上的战利品

  5. 奥塔里1点声望点（因为击败了一伙路匪）

过渡

当玩家到达地图边缘时，他们会被传送到鱼营地。你可以授予任何英雄点，并通过朗读这段 @UUID[JournalEntry.yLgifMiZPRHAWVAt.JournalEntryPage.d54gvYYRQOl4MaOE]{Transition to Beach Camp} 来结束这段简短的引入。

Preparing the Ambush

This is a Severe level encounter (if the heroes choose aggression). Reward creativity, but also provide clues through their Encounter Activities of the approaching Goblins (Scouting, Climbing Cliffs, Investigating Tracks, and Recall Knowledge of Goblins should they know they are in the area.) There is more than one option of overcoming this and none of them are rewarded as "better."

I advise rolling the 3 Goblins @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} [Stealth] ahead of time and putting them in combat encounter. They get a +4 circumstance bonus as they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} prior to Heroes arriving.

The Heroes should have had 3 attempts to select/change Exploration Activities prior to hitting the invisible "pause tile."

Exploration Perks

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYtYKa1gDEl7y2N0]{Defend}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}

The following are suggested perks from the heroes Exploration Activity that can be awarded prior to the approaching engagement or where it makes the most sense in your narrative

Avoid Notice

Heroes that take it slow side stepping against the cliff walls, pressing their bodies to peak around turns, climbed or used the above canopy to progress from above receive:

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} and +4 to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}

Defend

Heroes that are dawning weapons or a raised shield look more impressive.

  • +2 to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}

Detect Magic

Heroes who approach the goblin with a focus of detect magic will sense something than a mere toll is at work.

  • +2 to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} when you see the Goblin, and a +2 to their @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}

Investigate and Track

Heroes that have been engaged in carefully following the tracks and understanding what or where they go will be more informed and responsive.

  • +2 to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} and +2 to their next Reflex Save

Scout

This dedicated hero has kept their party safe while taking on risk for themselves

  • Entire party gets +1 to Next Initiative Roll and those Scouting get +2. They also get a +2 to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}

Once they arrive at the pause tile read the following:

The sun has seemed to long pass over the western tree line. Shadows of the tree paint the cliffsides. The ravine dressed with more moss has a natural gloom as the sun staggers steadily from warming its rocks. Fresher air seems to waft toward you as the decent quickens and opens up.

You stop short, gesturing to your comrades behind. Standing before you is a short shadow shaded creature. It holds out a long melee weapon blocking you advance. It takes one hand off the horsechopper's hilt, gesturing towards you with open palm, and commands,

"We keepz klearz the roads, we safetiez sentriez, tollz for our timezees, troublez and toilz." [20gp]

Things Heroes Can Do:

  • Each player gets one @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}

  • Flee past, Flee back, Sneak Around, Negotiate/Make Impression, Coerce, Deceive/Lie/Impersonate, Create a Diversion, Pay, or Threaten/Attack.

The last leg

This Encounter is Severe. It includes 3 additional hidden goblins. Two are overhead with bows ready and one below (the captain) under a bush ready to trip anyone who runs by.

Coming from Straight-On

If the heroes came by the dirt trek, then they will be paused when they hit the invisible tile. You can provide them the information below relative to the results of their @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}.

Coming from Above

If some or all the heroes came from above the cliffs and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, they get a +4 Bonus (position and detection status) to their @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}.

The Last Leg - A Social Exchange!

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} , @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}

The Goblin's tactics are to get the 20 gold from the travelers and then await future victims. The Exploration Activity the heroes were engaged in can provide circumstantial bonuses.

Quick Search Around - Relative DC:

  • DC22 - "D20" results plus you see some movement in bush ahead, but it is Hidden and has light cover now as it repositioned
  • DC20 - You see some movement on cliffs above, goblins are Hidden but have standard cover
  • DC18 - You hear some rustling on cliffs above, goblins on cliffs are Undetected
  • <D18 - The goblin is clearly alone! The other goblins are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

Recall Knowledge - Goblins @Check[society|dc:16]*

  • Critical Success: Humanoid, Goblin, Notes, and 2 pieces of player selected information

  • Success: Humanoid, Goblin, Notes, and 1 pieces of player selected information

  • Failure: Intelligent Humanoid, and 1 pieces of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)

  • Critical Failure: Creature, and 2 piece of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)

Sense Motive - DC14 [BLIND]

If the heroes want to sense motive after the Creature issues a command or when it answers a response to one of their social engagements, use the following:

  • Critical Success: You notice the Creature twitched, and hand seemed to brush a small vial on its belt as if it was going to grab it, it also seemed to raise its tone a bit (as if to be heard) and one eye seemed to quickly look up above on the cliffs (Goblins on cliff lower one detection level)

  • Success: You notice the Goblin twitched, and hand seemed to brush a small vial on its belt as if it was going to grab it

  • Failure: This creature seems to be talking pretty straight to you, even if you do not like the conversation.

  • Critical Failure: You sense some welled up tears and a frog in its throat as if it was merely seeking for honest work to feed itself and its starving family (blind -1 penalty to next initiative roll)

Intimidation or Deception Approaches - DC15 (any ATTACK action immediately triggers the failure condition)

  • Critical Success: Goblin whistles for its hidden companions to come out and stove weapons

  • Success: Drop Toll to 10 gold

  • Failure: This creature quickly grabs and drinks its @UUID[Item.4aiZLNaAhAmMA1LV]{Potion of Emergency Escape} off its belt gains its effects. Roll initiative (put this creature at the bottom)

  • Critical Failure: You get so wrapped up in your soliloquy, or taunt, or fabricated story that you mentally impress yourself, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} until end of next turn, and the Failure conditions above.

Paying the Toll

  • If the heroes choose to pay the toll whether the initial or a negotiated amount, they proceed to Rewards section below, and can advance their tokens to the end of the map (be sure to disable the trip wire).

  • If the heroes choose NOT to pay the toll, then the have the players Roll Initiative!

*Adjust the DC relative to Lore skills and attempts per rules on Recall Knowledge.

Encounter Starts

When the heroes do any of the following:

  1. Use any Attack action or direct force (also see failure conditions above)

  2. Attempt to make a Movement in Advance (past the Goblin)

  3. Chase the Goblin

Encounter

Goblin Commandos (3) & leader

Severe 2

@UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{Goblin Trip Wire}, @UUID[Actor.Sb8I7xsRyhZ4KfDx]{Goblin Commando Toll Collector (TiO) - Remaster}, @UUID[Actor.K49XR7vTBxxAIdYW]{Goblin Commando Bowman (TiO) - Remaster}, @UUID[Actor.VhUJrm8SwlCGEiot]{Goblin Commando Captain (TiO) - Remaster}

7 VP

The toll collecting Goblin will always pull @UUID[Item.4aiZLNaAhAmMA1LV]{Potion of Emergency Escape} of its belt and drink it (total 2 actions) and then flee (as potion instructs). It will circle back up the hillside on North end until potion wears off. It will engage like the other Goblin Commandos if the fight go more than 10 rounds.

Combat Behaviors

  1. Goblin Commandos on Cliffs (repeat):

    Shoot Arrow target farthest down path in range

    @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}

    @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}

  2. Goblin Captain

    Trigger @UUID[Actor.zWyzXeuYSGmhqe6y]{Goblin Trip Wire}

  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.dLgAMt3TbkmLkUqE]{Ready} (if someone trips, they will @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]{Interact} to draw and change grip to two hands on horsechopper and Strike legs of target that triggers trip wire

  • Later Rounds: Intimidate > Strike > Move to spaces within archer range

  • Switch to Range if nothing engages in Melee

Goblins will not chase!

Things a Goblin Captain Might Say…

  1. I'll take your shinnies!

  2. Don't make me whistle for more

  3. Run or pay longshanks

  4. We'll take your gold off your dead body too!

  5. Fancy one less eye ball?

  6. What's that smell, soiling in your sacks already?

  7. Get the dainty one boyz

  8. Squirrel scratches - is that all you gotz!

  9. Need 3 legs to stand up eh?

  10. How cutz itz iz, thinks it can cut goblin skin with steel! hahaha

Encounter Ends

When all the Goblins are defeated, all heroes flee the map, or the Goblin Captain is killed (the rest flee into woods - off map)

What the Heroes Can Do

The goblins just have their gear on them, and they can be looted for it.

Treasure

The players can search the Goblin bodies or the area around where they were.

Goblin Gear

Award VP and XP whether they Defeat, Avoid, Pay, or Flee Goblins

  1. 7VP - goblins + trap

  2. 10VP - for exploration activities and minor accomplishment as road boss!

  3. XP - trap and goblins

  4. Loot from corpses

  5. 1 Reputation Point for Otari (fore besting some road bandits)

Transition

Once the players hit the edge of the map they will be teleported to the Fish Camp. You can award any hero points, and close out this small introduction by reading this @UUID[JournalEntry.yLgifMiZPRHAWVAt.JournalEntryPage.d54gvYYRQOl4MaOE]{Transition to Beach Camp}

GM Overview: Encouraging Exploration.name: GM 概述：鼓励探索 GM Overview: Encouraging Exploration

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
引言

Beaten Forest Path 扩展内容旨在为 4 名玩家提供一段1 到 2 小时的体验。其中包含一张增强地图、GM 摘要以及 2 场遭遇。内含一个宏、相关角色以及激活图块触发器。遭遇摘要提供了一些针对人数更多或更少的冒险队伍进行调整的建议。探索摘要则提供了一些关于如何为玩家的行动给予引导的建议。

目标

这张地图在设计时预想了以下结果：

  1. 在《Beginner Box》的基础机制之上继续拓展，帮助新玩家体验延伸的探索行动及其益处，以及其他休整模式 挣收入的机会（猎野猪）。

  2. 提供一段从奥塔里过渡到海滩营地的沉浸式旅程，让玩家能够分享他们在休整模式中做了什么或学到了什么，包括任何学识。它应当开始让玩家感受到奥塔里深处之外的距离感。

  3. 灌输一种对于星石和格拉利昂而言都普遍存在危险的感觉。并非每一种威胁都是“地下城爬行”或“幕后暴君”，像野兽和强盗这样的常见危险，甚至连道路上也存在。

后勤安排

  • 道路：队伍会在塔米莉的指引下前往南海岸路，而她的营地距离奥塔里大约 3 小时路程。出城向东行约 90 分钟后，南海岸路会分叉为东、南两条路。南路会穿过沿海森林与峡谷向下延伸，因为河流经年累月切穿山丘。英雄们应走南路。

  • 一天中的时间：这里假定英雄们上午都在为前往渔营进行半天步行做准备，他们在午饭后出发，希望能在下午中段左右到达。

  • 旅行时间：英雄们先沿着朝东走向的南海岸路行进了 90 分钟，到达岔路口后转向南，沿着一条较少使用、穿过峡谷的小径前进。这个峡谷（即本地图：Beaten Forest Road）会花费他们略多于 1 小时（正常速度）。如果他们 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JuqmIAnkL9hVGai8]{Hustle} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout}，则相应调整叙述。他们从这张地图到渔营还大约有半小时路程（尽管这张地图会把他们“传送”到渔营）。他们通常会在傍晚稍晚时分抵达渔营（还够经历几场遭遇），但需要在那里过夜（室内或室外）。

  • 地形：道路属于普通地形，并逐渐向海岸下倾，因此四周的悬崖会渐渐变高。如果英雄们走进树林或离开小径，由于森林地面铺满了厚厚的松针、长草、倒伏的蕨丛、松散的岩石，以及最重要的密集松树，那就属于困难地形。

  • 墙体/视觉：如果任何视觉线与树木、岩石或山丘相交，那么玩家的指示物就无法看见其后的区域，即使玩家本人能看见。所有墙体都是地形墙，不限制移动。默认如此设置是为了支持攀爬，但你可以使用 GM 开关将其改为“禁止移动”。我之前的地图给每棵树都设置了独立的地形墙，但 FVTT 系统在每次指示物移动时进行计算，会让玩家的体验变得非常缓慢，这也是我简化墙体系统的原因。

开始使用

将冒险队伍放置在 3x2 的“背包图块”上（这对他们是不可见的），并询问他们初始的 @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity}（使用此宏时请确保你已选中一个玩家指示物）。根据他们所选择的行动以及其他所需调整，调整他们的行进顺序/玩家指示物位置，然后打开 @UUID[JournalEntry.ibfVbjKNjioc9GZn]{Encounter (1) - Wild Boars}。

进程

通常我在主持 Beginner Box 时，会衔接到 Troubles in Otari, Abomination Vaults，然后再到 Stolen Fate。这些内容合在一起，能在星石岛以及奥塔里的历史中提供一种沉浸式体验。我会把若干元素编织进这一结构中，并在此提供一个概览：@UUID[JournalEntry.fZTTTNRvRKLpgy3U.JournalEntryPage.DCMEAzKuXYTQuVjW]{PF2E 子系统}，用于处理进程与奖励，以及更深入的玩家角色联结。我希望能随着时间推移把这些内容提供出来。

在这些游戏中，我会用胜利点取代 XP，然后允许玩家在完成海滩营地并从塔米莉处获得地契后升到 3 级。我也使用慢速 XP，并会持续同时授予 XP 和 VP，直到他们获得1200XP，但我会暂缓让他们升到 3 级，直到他们从塔米莉那里拿到地契。

- Wise

Introduction

The Beaten Forest Path expansions is designed for a 1 to 2 hour experience for 4 players. It contains an Enhanced Map, GM Summary, and 2 Encounters. There is a macro included, the actors as well as active tile triggers. The Encounter Summaries provide some suggestion on adjustments for larger or smaller adventuring parties. The Exploration Summaries provide some suggestions on providing player's guidance for activities.

Objective

The map has the following outcomes in mind for its design:

  1. Build on the Beginner Box fundamentals to help new players experience extended Exploration Activities and their benefits as well as other Downtime Earn Income opportunities (boar hunting).

  2. Provide an immersive transition from Otari into the Beach Camp allowing players to share what they did or learned in Downtime including any Lore. It should start to give players a sense of distance beyond the depths of Otari.

  3. Instill a sense of common danger for Starstone and Golarion. While not every threat is a "dungeon crawl" or "mastermind tyrant," common dangers like wild animals and brigands exist even on roads.

Logistics

  • Road: The party is directed to South Coast Road by Tamily, and her base is about 3 hours from Otari. The south coast road forks about 90 minutes out of town east and south. The south road heads down through coastal forest and gorges as the rivers flows over the years cut through the hills. The heroes are to take the south road.

  • Time of Day: The assumption is that the heroes spent the morning preparing for a half a day walk to the Fish Camp, they left after lunch time with the hopes of getting there around midafternoon.

  • Travel Time: The heroes have spent 90 minutes on the east bearing South Coast Road until they reach the fork where they head south on a less used trail through a gorge. The gorge (this map: the Beaten Forest Road) will take them a little over an hour (normal pace). If they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JuqmIAnkL9hVGai8]{Hustle} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout}, then adjust the narrative. They have about another half hour from this map to the Fish Camp (even though this map will "teleport" them to the Fish Camp). They arrive generally late afternoon to the Fish Camp (enough for a few encounters), but will need to camp the night (inside or outside).

  • Terrain: The road is normal terrain that slopes gradually down into the coast, which results in the cliffs gradually increasing in heights around them. If the heroes go into the trees or off trail, it is difficult terrain from a forest floor full of dense pine needle, long grass, fallen bracken and loose rock and not least of all densely packed pine trees.

  • Walls/Vision: If any line of sight intersects with a tree, rock, or hill, the player's token cannot see past it even if they as the player can. The walls are all Terrain walls without Movement restriction. This is defaulted this way to enable climbing, but you can use the GM switches to change them to "no movement." My previous map had each tree set with distinct terrain walls, but the FVTT system calculation with every token movement created a very slow experience for players, which is why I have simplified the wall system.

Getting Started

Place the adventuring party on the 3x2 "backpack tile" (this is invisible to them) and ask them for their initial @UUID[Macro.3dn35ueD4othZMvh]{Set Exploration Activity} (when using this macro be sure you have a player token selected). Adjust their traveling order/player token placement relative to the activities they chose and any other needed adjustments, then open @UUID[JournalEntry.ibfVbjKNjioc9GZn]{Encounter (1) - Wild Boars}.

Progression

Generally when I GM Beginner Box, I transition to Troubles in Otari, Abomination Vaults and then Stolen Fate. These collectively provide an immersive experience on Starstone Isle and in Otari's history. There are a number of elements I weave into this structure, which I provide an overview here: @UUID[JournalEntry.fZTTTNRvRKLpgy3U.JournalEntryPage.DCMEAzKuXYTQuVjW]{PF2E Subsystems} to account for Progression and Rewards as well as deeper player character connection. I hope to provide these overtime.

In these games, I award Victory Points in place of XP and then allow players to advance to Level 3 after completing the Beach Camp and obtaining the Deed from Tamily. I also use Slow XP and will award XP with VP up until they acquire1200XP, but I hold off Level 3 until they get the Deed from Tamily.

- Wise

Summaries.name: 摘要 Summaries
Summaries.text:
本摘要供GM熟悉此地图的探索与遭遇模式之用。

当英雄们从南岸大道向南转入那条被踩踏出的林间小路时（通往鱼营地，约两英里长），他们将遭遇两种威胁，并且有机会进行探索。以下为摘要。具体日志条目包含更多细节，而DC摘要也可能列出一些与下述内容相关的常见/潜在DC。

奖励摘要

  • VP
  • XP
  • 宝藏

供GM记录的总计。

胜利点数：27到37

经验值：368到378

宝藏：野猪尸体（5gp）或12份野猪肉口粮（4gp）

宝藏：尸体战利品（26gp，5sp）

  • 3把Horsechopper（27sp）

  • 4套皮甲（12gp）

  • 4把短弓（8gp）

  • 约80支箭（8sp）

  • 1瓶紧急脱逃药水（3gp）

遭遇摘要

野猪群
MOD 2

如果队伍沿着道路前进并经过觅食区域，两头野猪就会攻击他们。若英雄们进入野猪领地，威胁会进一步增加——会有更多野猪加入战斗，或者一头母野猪若觉得自己的两只幼崽受到威胁，也会介入。

要点

保持警觉。运用精确感官和模糊感官。善用你们杀死的任何动物。若队伍中有德鲁伊，还会有额外的结果与机会。

地精收费关卡
SEV 2

三名地精和他们的队长正在向过路旅人拦路收取“过路费”。英雄们可以决定支付过路费、协商金额、威胁地精，或者消灭/赶跑他们。如果他们拒绝支付过路费，“前哨收费员”会逃跑，希望把他们引到灌木丛后方的一处高地箭雨与绊索陷阱中——这些都是他们的队长布置好的。

要点

完成一场遭遇并不只有一种方式，而且往往也不只一条明显的前进路径。逃跑或避开它完全没问题（而且奖励相同）。

探索摘要

虽然探索行动通常持续至少10分钟，但此地图包含三个不同的时点，设有自动触发来允许英雄们更换他们的行动。若有需要，他们也可以轮换更多次；不过总体上，这是为了让英雄们从探索模式过渡到遭遇模式时获得一些过渡性优势。

享受自然
@Check[type:nature] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

想要借助精确或模糊的侦测方式来留意森林中任何寻常或异常迹象的英雄，可能会闻到、听到或看到野猪。在临近地精收费要求前的最后一段路上，他们可能会注意到鸟鸣变少、自然显得格外寂静（躲藏在悬崖上的地精使得那片区域的野生动物都会避开附近）。

保持瞭望
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

想要前出侦察并绕到后方观察小径的英雄，会发现这对他们在面对野猪和地精时进行先攻检定都很有利。

 留意小路
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}

英雄们可以仔细搜索小路，并在不同DC下发现非常古老的货车车辙（普通）、动物足迹（回忆知识：野猪）以及类人生物足迹（回忆知识：地精）。如果英雄们识别出任一种足迹并且正在侦察，GM可以在第一轮中给予每位队员一个环境加值作为奖励。

 探索其他路径
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}

若英雄们基于非元游戏的理由对这条路保持警惕，他们可能会选择走山坡。这样做如果被发现，可能会让他们陷入更多野猪带来的危险，但他们也可能反过来突袭地精。对于不走小路的玩家来说，地形将会是困难地形。如果他们还试图避免引人注意，他们的速度应进一步降低。

 保持警觉
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYtYKa1gDEl7y2N0]{Defend}

英雄们可能更笼统地只是想随时做好准备。如果他们能提出一个非元游戏的理由说明自己为何已举起盾牌，他们就可以进行Defend。

 追踪足迹
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

如果英雄们找到了足迹，他们可以选择跟踪它们。动物足迹会把他们引向野猪，其中包括一头保护幼崽的母野猪。类人生物足迹则一路沿着小径延伸，直到地精收费遭遇为止。这些足迹也会在地图末端绕回山坡上方，那里正是它们的主人——地精——躲藏并准备伏击他们的地方，前提是他们没有支付过路费。

 加快步伐
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JuqmIAnkL9hVGai8]{Hustle}

如果英雄们选择更快地穿过这片区域，希望借此避开危险，你可以在地精收费遭遇第一轮中给予他们一个初始环境加值，表示地精们必须匆忙应对才能做好准备。

 向上攀爬
@Check[type:athletics] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

无论是在探索模式还是遭遇模式中，英雄们都可能想爬上悬崖，以改善他们的视觉线、掩护条件，或降低威胁。地图上已标示出与他们选择攀爬位置相对应的高度。

 侦测魔法
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic}

如果英雄们基于非元游戏的理由想感知魔法迹象，那么一旦进入地精收费员的范围内，他们就能侦测到魔法。虽然侦测魔法不会揭示它侦测到的是哪一种魔法根源或魔法物品，但对GM而言，那就是收费/逃跑地精腰带上的紧急脱逃药水（如果触发遭遇模式，它会在自己的第一个回合饮用它

补充一些背景知识

当我使用一些旅行地图时，我常会利用其中一些“途中”的空间，为每位玩家提供一些他们在休整模式期间获得的学识（取决于他们进行了哪些行动）。有时这可能涉及某个NPC、奥塔里的一处地点、当地公会、下一章节的一个小钩子，或更广阔的星石岛。我通常会把这些内容作为日志条目和私信分别发给每位玩家，让他们按自己的喜好进行分享与角色扮演（当然，我会鼓励这么做，并为此奖励英雄点）。

This summary is for the GM to get familiar with the Exploration and Encounter modes for this map.

When the heroes turn south from the South Coast Road to the beaten forest path (roughly two miles long toward the Fish Camp), they will encounter two threats and have the ability to explore. Below are the summaries. The specific journal entries have the more details and the DC summary may list some of the common/potential DCs related to the below as well.

Reward Summary

  • VP
  • XP
  • Treasure

Totals for GM tracking.

Victory Points: 27 to 37

Experience Points: 368 to 378

Treasure: Boar Carcass (5gp) or 12 Rations of Boar Meat (4gp)

Treasure: Corpse Loot (26gp, 5sp)

  • 3 Horsechopper (27sp)

  • 4 Leather Armor (12gp)

  • 4 Shortbow (8gp)

  • ~80 Arrows (8sp)

  • 1 Potion Emergency Escape (3gp)

Encounter Summaries

Wild Boars
MOD 2

Two boars will attack the party if they stay on the road as they pass by the grazing area. If the heroes enter the boar territory, the threat will increase as more boars engage or if a mother boar feels her two younglings are threatened.

Take Away

Stay alert. Use precise and imprecise senses. Make use of any animal you destroy. A party with a druid will have additional outcomes and opportunities.

Goblin Tolls
SEV 2

Three Goblins and their Captain are waylaying any traveler for "tolls." The heroes can decide to pay the toll, negotiate the toll, threaten the goblins or destroy or chase them away. The "front-keeper" will run if they refuse the to pay the toll in hopes of luring them to an elevated arrow storm and a trip wire their captain has set just past a bush.

Take Away

There is more than one way to complete an Encounter and often more than one obvious path forward. Running away or avoiding it is perfectly fine (and equally rewarded).

Exploration Summaries

While exploration activities span at least 10 minutes, the map includes three distinct times an automated trigger to allow the heroes to change their activity. They can cycle through more if desired, but in general it is to provide transitional perks to the heroes from Exploration into Encounter Mode.

Enjoying Nature
@Check[type:nature] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

Heroes that would like to use a precise or imprecise detection for any usual or unusual elements of the forest might smell, hear or see a boar. In the last leg prior to the Goblin Toll request, they may notice less birds and stillness from nature (the goblins hiding out on the cliffs causes any wildlife in those areas to avoid the immediate area).

Keeping a Lookout
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kV3XM0YJeS2KCSOb]{Scout} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

Heroes that would like to scout ahead and loop behind to watch the trail will find this advantageous for initiative checks both with the boars and the goblins.

 Minding the Path
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate}

Heroes can comb the path and find very old wagon tracks (normal), animal tracks (recall knowledge boar), and humonoid (recall knowledge goblin) at various DCs. If the heroes identify either tracks and are scouting, the GM can award every party member a circumstance bonus during first round as a reward.

 Exploring other Paths
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}

Heroes who have a non meta-game reason to be wary of the track could potentially take to the hills. Doing so could put them in the danger of additional boars if they are noticed, but they could actually surprise the goblins. For players not on the path, the terrain will be difficult. If they are trying to avoid notice their speed should be reduced even more.

 Staying Alert
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYtYKa1gDEl7y2N0]{Defend}

Heroes may more generally want to be on the ready. If they provide a non meta-game reason to have their shield out, they could Defend.

 Following Tracks
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

If the Heroes locate tracks, they can choose to follow them. The animal tracks will lead them to boars including a protective mother boar guarding her younglings. The humanoid tracks all stay on the path up till the Goblin Toll collection Encounter. The tracks do circle back up the hills toward the end of the map where their owners, the Goblins, are hiding to ambush them should they not pay the toll.

 Picking up the Pace
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JuqmIAnkL9hVGai8]{Hustle}

If the Heroes choose to move faster through the area in hopes of avoiding dangers, you can award them an initial circumstance bonus during the first round of the Goblin Toll Encounter signifying that the Goblins have to hustle to be prepared.

 Climbing Up
@Check[type:athletics] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

Heroes may want to climb the cliffs either in Exploration or Encounter modes to improve their line of sight, cover, or reduce the threat. The map is marked with heights relative to where they choose to climb.

 Detecting Magic
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Yb0C1uLzeHrVLl7a]{Detect Magic}

If the heroes have a non meta-game reason to sense for signs of magic, they can detect magic once they are within range of the goblin toll collector. While detect magic does not disclose specifics about which magical tradition or item it is detecting, for GM purposes it is the Potion of Emergency Escape on the belt of the Toll/Runner Goblin (who will consume this on its first turn if Encounter mode triggers

Filling in with some Lore

When I have some travel maps, I often use some of the "in-between" space to provide each player with some Lore they picked up during Downtime (depending on their activities). Sometimes that could be a NPC, a location in Otari, local guilds, a small hook for an upcoming chapter, or the broader Starstone Isle. I often will give them to each player as a journal entry and a direct message allowing them to share and role play as they prefer (naturally I encourage this and reward Hero Points for it).

DC Inventory.name: DC 物品清单 DC Inventory
DC Inventory.text:
DC方法

在我的游戏中，我会采用两种方法之一。要么我使用从大成功到大失败的掷骰结果分布，要么我使用可变的成功等级，其中较低的DC会提供较少的信息，或者可能提供错误的信息。我非常常用回忆知识，而Remaster RAW正是我一直以来自订规则处理它的方式，这意味着大成功/大失败 = 2条他们想知道的信息外加基础信息，而成功/失败 = 1条信息（当然，失败时提供的是错误信息）。以下内容旨在作为指引，请按需要使用或调整。

踩踏成形的林间小路

野猪：在攻击前注意到野猪 @Check[type:perception]

  • DC22 - 看见最近的野猪，它们处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} 但同时 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}
  • DC18 - 听见最近野猪的喷鼻声，它们处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}
  • DC16 - 闻到一丝动物气味，野猪处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}
  • 失败 - 任何结果 <16，野猪处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

野猪：回忆知识 @Check[type:nature|dc:16]*

  • 大成功：动物、野猪、注记，以及2条由玩家选择的信息
  • 成功：动物、野猪、注记，以及1条由玩家选择的信息
  • 失败：动物，以及1条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给出错误信息）
  • 大失败：生物，以及2条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给出错误信息）

小路：发现踪迹 @Check[type:search|dc:16]

  • 大成功：成功，外加额外的人形生物足迹
  • 成功：旧货车车辙、动物踪迹和粪便
  • 失败：一条磨损但很少使用的道路
  • 大失败：巨魔（特征）踪迹

踪迹：追踪 @Check[type:survival|dc:16]

  • 大成功：注意到两条踪迹，并且无需额外时间即可同时追踪两条
  • 成功：追踪一条踪迹，但如果他们看见第二条，可在第3次探索请求时再次尝试
  • 失败：线索松散，但可在第3次探索请求时再次尝试
  • 大失败：线索松散，并额外多花1小时旅行

踪迹：回忆知识 @Check[type:investigation|dc:16]

  • DC26 - 确切的野猪和哥布林数量，并且其中2头野猪是幼崽
  • DC18 - 野猪踪迹，以及哥布林
  • DC16 - 野猪踪迹，但另一种不确定，不过是小型类人生物
  • 失败 - 任何结果 <16，无法推断出任何信息，且不能再次尝试

攀爬：山坡 @Check[type:climb|dc:18] 受训/绳索 @Check[type:climb|dc:18] 专家/无绳索 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

  • 大成功 - 向上、横向或安全地下斜坡移动5尺，外加你地面速度每20尺再增加5尺，并处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}
  • 成功 - 向上、横向或安全地下斜坡移动你地面速度每20尺对应5尺，并处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}
  • 失败 - 没有进展，且处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}
  • 大失败- 坠落并以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 状态落地，并受到坠落伤害

哥布林：侦测藏起来的那些 @Check[type:search]

  • DC22 - D20结果外加你看见前方灌木中有些移动，但其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 且具有轻度掩蔽
  • DC20 - 你看见上方悬崖上有些移动，哥布林处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 但具有标准掩蔽
  • DC18 - 你听见上方悬崖上传来一些窸窣声，悬崖上的哥布林处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}
  • 失败 - 任何 <DC18 的结果，除奔跑者外的所有哥布林都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

哥布林：回忆知识 @Check[type:society|dc:16]*

  • 大成功：类人生物、哥布林、注记，以及2条由玩家选择的信息
  • 成功：类人生物、哥布林、注记，以及1条由玩家选择的信息
  • 失败：有智能的类人生物，以及1条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给出错误信息）
  • 大失败：生物，以及2条由玩家选择的信息（但在所选类别中给出错误信息）

*回忆知识 检定可以根据适用的类别学识或适用的特定学识进行调整，也可以调整尝试次数。记得每次尝试都要提高DC，直到允许的最大值为止。

DC Approach

In my games, I use one of two approaches. I either have a roll result spread from Critical Success to Critical Failure or I have variable levels of success, with lower DCs providing less or possibly incorrect information. I make a ton of use out of Recall Knowledge, and the Remaster RAW is how I have always homebrewed it, which means Critical Success/Failure = 2 pieces of information they want to know plus basic, and Success/Failure = 1 piece of information (naturally with failures being incorrect information). The below is meant to be a guide, use or adjust them as helpful.

Beaten Forest Path

Boars: Notice boars prior to attack @Check[type:perception]

  • DC22 - See closest boars, they are but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.1wQY3JYyhMYeeV2G]{Observed} but @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}
  • DC18 - Hear snorts of nearest boars, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}
  • DC16 - Whiff of an animal, boars are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}
  • Failure - Any result <16 boars are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

Boars: Recall Knowledge @Check[type:nature|dc:16]*

  • Critical Success: Animal, Boar, Notes, and 2 pieces of player selected information
  • Success: Animal, Boar, Notes, and 1 pieces of player selected information
  • Failure: Animal, and 1 pieces of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)
  • Critical Failure: Creature, and 2 piece of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)

Path: Discover Tracks @Check[type:search|dc:16]

  • Critical Success: Success plus additional humanoid tracks
  • Success: Old wagon tracks, animal tracks and scat
  • Failure: A worn and seldom used road
  • Critical Failure: Troll tracks

Tracks: Follow @Check[type:survival|dc:16]

  • Critical Success: Notices both trails and can follow both with no additional time
  • Success: Follows one trail but can try again at 3rd Exploration Request for second trail if they see it
  • Failure: Loose trail but can try again at 3rd Exploration Request
  • Critical Failure: Loose trail and spend an extra 1 hours traveling

Tracks: Recall Knowledge @Check[type:investigation|dc:16]

  • DC26 - Exact number of Boar and Goblin and 2 Boars are youngling
  • DC18 - Boar tracks, and Goblin
  • DC16 - Boar tracks, but other one not sure but small humanoid
  • Failure - Any result <16, infers nothing and cannot try again

Climb: Mountainside @Check[type:climb|dc:18] Trained/Rope @Check[type:climb|dc:18] Expert/ No Rope @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Follow the Expert}

  • Critical Success - move up, across, or safely down the incline for 5 feet plus 5 feet per 20 feet of your land Speed, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}
  • Success - move up, across, or safely down the incline for 5 feet per 20 feet of your land Speed, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}
  • Failure - No progress, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}
  • Critical Failure- fall and land @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} with fall damage

Goblins: Detection for ones hiding @Check[type:search]

  • DC22 - D20 results plus you see some movement in bush ahead, but it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} and has light cover
  • DC20 - You see some movement on cliffs above, goblins are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} but have standard cover
  • DC18 - You hear some rustling on cliffs above, goblins on cliffs are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}
  • Fail - Anything <DC18 and all goblins other than runner are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9evPzg9E6muFcoSk]{Unnoticed}

Goblins: Recall Knowledge @Check[type:society|dc:16]*

  • Critical Success: Humanoid, Goblin, Notes, and 2 pieces of player selected information
  • Success: Humanoid, Goblin, Notes, and 1 pieces of player selected information
  • Failure: Intelligent Humanoid, and 1 pieces of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)
  • Critical Failure: Creature, and 2 piece of player selected information (but give them wrong information in selected category)

*Recall Knowledge Checks can be adjusted by applicable category lore or applicable specific lore as well as adjusting number of attempts. Remember to increase DC with each attempt up to the max allowed.

Transition to Beach Camp.name: 前往海滩营地 Transition to Beach Camp
Transition to Beach Camp.text:
概要

这张地图大约会花冒险队伍2小时走完，而从地图边缘到鱼营地还需要另外30分钟。地图边缘有一个传送点，会将他们转移到新地图。他们会在下午3点左右抵达鱼营地，并且在必须扎营过夜之前，还有几个小时可以探索这个地点。

塔米莉的旧鱼营地（又名海滩营地）

当所有英雄都已进入新地图并且你已将其激活后，读出以下内容：

茂密的森林开始变得稀疏，前方的小径豁然通向一片狭长的粗砾海滩；在你们南边，内海闪耀着蔚蓝波光，正值最高涨潮，海浪轻柔地抚过这处小海湾。海边柔和的交响轻抚着你的心灵。告别冷杉的气息与海滩的召唤交织成芬芳的和声，随着气流撞上沿着海滩北缘缓缓升起的崖壁。当你深深吸气时，目光从咸涩的海面滑向眼前的建筑。“就是那里！”

确保玩家的指示物按他们进入地图区域的顺序设置好。

le.

Synopsis

The map will take the adventuring parties ~2 hours and they will have another 30 minutes from edge of the map to the Fish Camp. There is a teleport at the edge of the map that will transition them to the new map. They arrive at the Fish Camp around 3pm in the afternoon and have a couple hours to explore the site before they would be required to camp for the night.

Tamily's Old Fish Camp (aka Beach Camp)

After all of the heroes have entered the new map and you have Activated it, read the following:

The thick forest begins to thin before the trail opens onto a long stretch of a coarse gravel beach, the shining blue waves of the Inner Sea rolling beyond to your south at their highest tide caress the cove gently. The soft symphony of the seaside serenades your soul. The scent of farewell fur trees and beckoning beach roll up into an aromatic assonance as it collides with the cliff rising gently along the beach’s northern edge. As you take a deep inhalation, your eyes glide from the salty sea to the buildings just before you. "There it is!"

Ensure the players have their tokens set in the order the enter the map area.

le.

Figure: [base of name].name: 人偶：[名称基础] Figure: [base of name]

Housing Perks.name: 住房福利 Housing Perks
Housing Perks.text:
本节提供了有关英雄们通过提升其行动基地等级将获得哪些增益的信息。要获得一项增益，英雄们必须随着时间推移花费累计列出的胜利点数。每五个等级，此数值都会进一步提高。每位英雄都会获得所有累计增益的效果。其中一些增益会是恩惠，一些偏向叙事性质，还有一些则是情境性的。（你的GM可以根据本冒险中的其他战利品选项，对这些内容进行调整。）

此外，每五个等级还会因英雄们在该地区日益增长的影响力而触发一个事件。在你花费所需的胜利点数后，等级会自动提升。

投资与领导力等级

领导力是一个长期子系统，反映了你与冒险队伍周围的人们和地点之间不断增长的影响力与联系。影响力/态度反映的是你与所遇到的单个NPC之间的关系，声望反映的是你与各组织之间的关系，而领导力则反映了这两者如何通过休整模式事件，以及协助其他组织、个人或响应神祇或其他有影响力实体的行动号召所带来的周期性收益，在特定时间与地点汇聚起来。

你的领导力等级反映了你将行动基地作为自身身份核心所投入的程度。你对行动基地的投资是通过积累胜利点数实现的。下表列出了你已在该地产上花费/投资的累计VP，以及相应的收益等级。

增益脚注

  • ** 我建议除了通常的幸运重骰外，也使用英雄卡组卡牌来代表英雄点。通常，小队可以抽取三张卡，且所有人都可以使用这些卡，作为花费英雄点的另一种方式。该增益会使可用卡牌增加到四张。

  • *** 英雄们仍然需要进行技能检定，并在休整模式中支付任何所需劳力。因此，虽然所需天数既可使用冒险日也可使用所奖励的休整时间来计算，但英雄们必须等到休整模式时才能花费胜利点数。

This section provides information around the perks the heroes will receive from leveling up their base of operations. To obtain a perk, the heroes must spend the cumulative listed amount of Victory Points over time. Every five levels this will increment higher. Every hero receives the benefit of the cumulative perks. Some of the perks will be boons, some will be narrative in nature, and some will be situational. (Your GM may adjust these relative to other Loot options within the adventure.)

Additionally, every five levels an event will trigger due to the heroes growing influence in the region. Leveling happens automatically after you spend the needed Victory Points.

Investment and Leadership Level

Leadership is a long-term subsystem which reflects your growing influence and connection to the people and places around your adventuring party. While Influence/Attitude reflects your relationship to individual NPCs you meet, and Reputation reflects your relationship with Organizations, Leadership reflects how these both come together at a place and time through Downtime events and periodic benefits from assisting other organizations, people or Call to Actions from deities or other influential entities.

Your Leadership level is a reflection of your investment in your Base of Operations as a center point of your identity. Your investment in the Base of Operations is made possible by your accumulation of Victory Points. The below table lists the cumulative VP you have spent/invested in the property as well as the corresponding level of benefits.

  • The heroes earn a fully equipped @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.vehicles.Actor.VNlJ7zPnOPThFEmR]{Airship}

  • +1 Rep with all Friendly Factions

  • -1 Rep with all Unfriendly Factions

  • Ollie Levels up

  • Each players gets a Worn version of @UUID[Item.0tALnYeDV8Na6RPV]{Spacious Pouch (Type IV)}

  • Reach and Research Expands: Each player can Learn a new rare spell (level 10 max), rare recipe (item 20), or item (level 18)

  • Reach and Research Expands: Each player earns an extra Dedication Feat, General Feat or Class Feat

  • +10 Circumstance Bonus to any Gather Information, Recall Knowledge or Investigation on Starstone Isle

  • 2000 Total Followers: Unskilled Hirelings (5), Skilled Hirelings (30), Level 4 (60), Level 3 (150), Level 2 (250), Level 1 (500), Level 0 (1000)

  • 200 Total Lieutenants: Level 9 (20), Level 8 (30), Level 7 (50), Level 6 (100)

  • Reach and Research Expands: Each player can Learn a new rare spell (level 10), rare recipe (item 20), or item (level 18)

Perks Footnotes

  • * Level 0 is obtained when you secure the Beach Base

  • ** I recommend using Hero Deck Cards for Hero Points in addition to the normal Fortune Re-roll. Normally, the party gets to draw three cards and all have access to them as another way to spend a Hero Pont. This perk allows four cards to be available.

  • *** The heroes will still roll the Skill check and pay any required labor during Downtime. Therefore, while the days it will take can use Adventuring Days in addition to awarded Downtime, the heroes have to wait until Downtime to spend Victory Points.

Building Codes.name: 建筑规范 Building Codes
Building Codes.text:
升级地产

为了升级一个房间，你需要支付 VP，拥有所需的休整模式时间、熟练度等级，并通过一次具有所列 DC 的 @Check[type:crafting]。（见表 1.0。） 一些升级依赖于其他升级，而另一些则会为队伍提供额外收益。表 1.0 列出了这些附加条件。如果队伍希望在休整模式期间加快升级进度，或提高技能检定的成功率，也可以选择雇佣一名雇工。随着你完成升级并获得领导力点数，雇工也可以在你的队伍外出冒险时完成任务。

代码

  1. 税款必须已缴清

  2. 必须完成费用、时间和技能检定

  3. 必须满足所有依赖条件

  4. 任何房间或空间的升级都不能比其他房间或空间领先超过一个阶段

  5. 玩得开心！

学识技能

虽然表列 DC 通常使用制作作为通用且广泛适用的技能，但你可以请求 GM 根据适用的非特定学识（-2）和适用的特定学识（-5）来下调 DC。

  • 非特定学识：地形、地区或某种行业（例如工程）

  • 特定学识：海滨地产、防御工事，或由 GM 判定的其他内容

成功度

  1. 大成功 - 你以一半时间完成任务。

  2. 成功 - 你消耗资源和时间，并完成任务！

  3. 失败 - 你消耗资源和时间，但未完成任务，你可以再次尝试。

  4. 大失败 - 你消耗资源和时间，但未完成任务，你可以再次尝试，但在下一次休整模式前，所需时间翻倍。

依赖条件

  1. 所有房间都必须先升级为基础

  2. 所有房间都必须先升级为高级

  3. 所有房间都必须升级为卓越

  4. 熏制房的卓越升级为巫师塔/三层研究塔——其花费为 500

  5. 树屋需要先将庭院维护扩展后才能建造——它是一个“自然房间”，并且必须在扩展庭院完成的同时购买

继承收益

* 厨房以及至少足够让英雄们睡觉的已清洁/修复房间（每名队伍成员四个方格空间）必须先清洁/修复，否则他们就需要通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{Subsist} 才能在行动基地休息，但在完成该 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{Subsist} 检定时获得 +1 环境加值。

** 升级门廊会阻止危险生物（例如鳄鱼）进入地产，你将不再需要在这里睡觉时安排守夜。

*** 屋顶的初次修复（第 1 次升级）会使室内任务获得 +1 环境加值（受训），+2 环境加值（专家）。

Upgrading the Property

In order to upgrade a room, you will need to the VP, have the required downtime, the proficiency level, and pass a @Check[type:crafting] with listed DC. (See Table 1.0.) Some upgrades have dependencies on other upgrades while others provide additional benefits to the party. Table 1.0 lists these additional conditions. Your party may also choose to employ a hireling if they wish to expedite upgrades during downtime or improve their success on skill checks. As you complete upgrades and earn Leadership Points, hirelings can complete tasks while your party is adventuring as well.

Codes

  1. Taxes must be current

  2. The cost, time, and skill check must be completed

  3. Any dependency must be met

  4. No room or space can be upgraded more than one step ahead of any other

  5. Have fun!

Lore Skills

While Crafting is the general and broad skill for the listed DC, you can ask the GM to adjust the DC down with Applicable Unspecific Lore (-2) and Applicable Specific Lore (-5).

  • Unspecific Lore: Terrain, Region or a Trade (e.g. Engineering)

  • Specific Lore: Beachfront properties, Fortifications, or as determined by the GM

Degrees of Success

  1. Critical Success - you complete the task in half the time.

  2. Success - you expend resources and time and complete the task!

  3. Failure - you expend resources and time, but do not complete the task, you may try again.

  4. Critical Failure - you expend resources and time, but do not complete the task, you may try again, but the time doubles until next downtime.

Dependencies

  1. All Rooms must be upgraded to Basic first

  2. All Rooms must be upgraded to Superior first

  3. All Rooms must be upgraded to Extraordinary

  4. The Smokehouse Extraordinary upgrade is a Wizard Tower/3-Story Research Tower - this costs 500

Inherit Benefits

** Upgrading the porch will deter dangerous creatures (e.g. Crocodiles) from entering the property, you will no longer need to set watch for sleeping here.

*** Initial repair of the roof (1st upgrade) adds a +1 circumstance bonus to Trained, +2 to Expert indoor tasks.

Overview.name: 概述 Overview
Overview.text:
本节旨在告知地产所有者，如何依据特定建筑规范与劳工认证来建造、雇用、维护并展示位于星石岛上的所有住宅与商业地产，以改善该正式称为“海滩营地”且此后称为“[name here].”的地产。

行动基地 - 概要

你拥有了自己的第一处地产，而你想把它妥善布置起来，配上舒适的家具，也许还有训练室、美食，甚至战利品陈列室或彻底翻修！

这是一项新的休整模式行动。 你也可以根据任务雇用一名@UUID[Item.WUlJr2sIJamQBzXv]{雇工}或一名@UUID[Item.OIQtlHdTqgkBu9U9]{雇工（熟练）}！升级内容旨在支援队伍一直推进到20级。

快速指南

  1. 通过完成任务、遭遇以及其他由你的GM决定的方式获得胜利点（VP）。

  2. 选择你想要改善的房间或地产部分，并在休整模式期间花费所需时间和胜利点。

  3. 满足最小熟练度要求并完成技能检定。

  4. 使用下表判定你的成功。

  5. 看着地产逐步改善，并且每次成功投入VP时，将其转化为领导点数，并让你的冒险队伍获得额外收益。

This section serves to inform property owners how to build, hire, maintain, and present all residential and commercial properties on Starstone isle with specific building codes and certifications of labor for the improvement of such property formally called the "beach camp" and henceforth called "[name here]."

Base of Operations - Summary

You have your first piece of property, and you want to set it up right with comfortable furniture, maybe training rooms, good food, possibly even trophy rooms or total remodeling!

This is a new Downtime Activity. You can also hire a @UUID[Item.WUlJr2sIJamQBzXv]{Hireling} or a @UUID[Item.OIQtlHdTqgkBu9U9]{Hireling (Skilled)} depending on the task! The upgrading is intended to support the party progress through Level 20.

Quick Guide

  1. Earn Victory Points (VP) by completing quests, encounters, and other ways as determined by your GM.

  2. Select a room or part of the property you wish to improve and spend the required time and victory points during downtime.

  3. Meet the Minimum Proficiency Requirement and Complete the Skill Check.

  4. Determine your success using table below.

  5. Watch the property improve and with every successful VP investment, convert it to Leadership Points and earn perks as an adventuring party.

Housing Perks - GM Read Me.name: 住房福利 - GM 请阅读我 Housing Perks - GM Read Me
Housing Perks - GM Read Me.text:
本节提供了关于英雄们通过提升其行动基地等级将获得哪些增益的信息。要获得一项增益，英雄们必须随着时间推移花费累计列出的胜利点数。每提升五个等级，所需数值会进一步提高。每位英雄都能获得这些累计增益的好处。其中一些增益会是恩惠，一些偏向叙事性质，还有一些则是情境性的。（你的GM可以根据本冒险中的其他战利品选项，对这些内容进行调整。）

此外，在5级、10级和15级时，由于英雄们在该地区影响力的增长，会触发一个事件。领导力等级提升会在你花费所需胜利点数后自动发生。不需要进行任何检定。

GM注：这些是我曾使用过且平衡性相当不错的增益。请随意根据你的偏好或玩家的目标增添、移除或调整其中任何一项。我也大致将这些与队伍战利品进行了平衡。

强叙事性

我鼓励你让每个领导力等级不只是英雄获得增益的一个机械步骤，而是借此讲述一个有关他们影响力不断扩大的故事：是谁捐赠了礼物、某样东西从何而来，或他们周围的局势正在如何变化。也许竞争性组织开始紧张起来，或者奥塔里镇因为有他们在场而变得疏忽大意。也许他们正在建立合作关系。

这些不一定非得是剧情钩子，但也可以是。目的是帮助创造沉浸感。

投资与领导力等级

领导力是一个长期子系统，反映你的冒险队伍与周围人物和地点之间日益增长的影响力与联系。虽然影响力/态度反映的是他们与所遇见个别NPC的关系，而声望反映的是他们与各个组织的关系，领导力则体现了这两者如何在特定时间与地点，通过休整模式事件，以及协助其他组织、人物，或来自神祇及其他有影响力实体的响应号召所带来的周期性收益而汇聚在一起。

5级、10级和15级会触发一个事件。这些事件的设计目的是影响较小、叙事上更有趣，以帮助该系统不只是一个“打勾确认”的机制。详情见下方，或你也可以自行添加内容。

领导力等级反映了他们对你的行动基地作为自身身份核心据点的投入程度。他们对行动基地的投入是通过累积胜利点数来实现的。下表列出了你在该地产上已花费/投资的累计VP，以及对应的收益等级。

增益脚注

  • * 0级是在你取得海滩基地时获得的

  • ** 我建议在正常的幸运重掷之外，使用英雄牌堆卡牌来作为英雄点。通常，队伍可以抽三张卡，且所有人都能使用这些卡，作为花费英雄点的另一种方式。这个增益会让可用卡牌增加到四张。

  • *** 英雄们仍然要在休整模式中进行技能检定，并支付任何所需人工费用。因此，虽然所需天数可以使用冒险日加上奖励的休整模式时间来计算，但英雄们必须等到休整模式时才能花费胜利点数。

  • 事件

  • 5级（提议）：一则讯息被派出并送达英雄们手中，来自科托斯财团。内容中对他们赞誉有加，并推测他们会支持下层阶级与劳动者的相关事业。财团奉承英雄们，希望能在对抗艾巴萨罗姆控制性利益的过程中获得一个更强有力的盟友。他们向每位英雄提供80GP，希望存放一些不合法货物，这些货物不得被搜查；同时再次表示，他们相信英雄们足够可靠，不会过于窥探、也不会对这些货物过度感兴趣。（给GM——这些货物可以是任何东西，但通常不应对队伍构成威胁、危险或麻烦，而更适合作为一个情境性的角色扮演桥段，用来看看PC们想成为什么样的人。）如果他们选择接受提议，每位玩家获得80GP。KC不会讨价还价。如果他们拒绝，则会获得一个3级或以下的专长（族裔、技能或通用）。

  • 10级（研究与发现）：叙事应根据玩家的背景来设计情境。可以是一位显贵、一位带着新发现宝藏来访的访客，或一些游戏/友好遭遇。你可以创造一条故事线，但目标是让每位英雄进行一次检定，并覆盖全部三类检定。每类检定都应至少掷一次，且没有玩家能多掷超过一次。

    技能检定 DC27

    1. 运动/特技 - 可以是摔跤比赛、趣味试炼、惊险壮举

    2. 制作/表演/社交 - 可以是一首歌、一场说唱对决、一件艺术作品、一个待破解的谜题

    3. 奥秘、自然、神秘、宗教） - 可以是某件古老神器、失落知识、典籍与卷轴，或一个异象/梦境解读。

    成功度

  • 三项全失败：每位英雄获得100gp，作为努力的奖励。

  • 成功：

    • 运动/特技 = 在一种他们可使用的特定普通武器上达到专家（战士则为大师）

    • 制作/表演/社交 = 免费获得一件10级或以下的普通物品

    • 根源 = Expanded Cantrips（如果他们已经拥有此项，可免费重训，并学会一个新的5级或以下普通法术。

  • 大成功：

    • 非普通武器

    • 制作 = 非普通物品或+1消耗品

    • 根源 = 非普通法术

  • 15级（派系）：这个事件是一项来自另外五个派系的挑战，它们不想看到任何势力不受制衡地成长。这是一场循环赛制的锦标赛，英雄们将在限时比赛中战斗。每赢下一轮可获得一项奖励：10k gp、1个族裔专长、1个献身/职业专长。

This section provides information around the perks the heroes will receive from leveling up their base of operations. To obtain a perk, the heroes must spend the cumulative listed amount of Victory Points over time. Every five levels this will increment higher. Every hero receives the benefit of the cumulative perks. Some of the perks will be boons, some will be narrative in nature, and some will be situational. (Your GM may adjust these relative to other Loot options within the adventure.)

Additionally, at Level 5, 10, and 15 an event will trigger due to the heroes growing influence in the region. Leadership leveling happens automatically after you spend the needed Victory Points. No checks are required.

GM Note: These are perks that I have used and balance fairly well. Feel free to add, remove or adjust any of them based on your preference or the player's goals. I have balanced these generally with party loot as well.

Strong Narrative

I encourage you to make each Leadership Level not just a mechanical step where Heroes acquire perks, but rather, tell a narrative about their growing influence, who donated a gift, where something arrived from or how circumstances around them are changing. Perhaps competitive organizations are getting nervous or the town of Otari is becoming careless with them around. Perhaps they are forming partnerships.

They don't have to be story hooks, but they could be. The idea to help create immersion.

Investment and Leadership Level

Leadership is a long-term subsystem which reflects the growing influence and connection to the people and places around your adventuring party. While Influence/Attitude reflects their relationship to individual NPCs they meet, and Reputation reflects their relationship with Organizations, Leadership reflects how these both come together at a place and time through Downtime events and periodic benefits from assisting other organizations, people or Call to Actions from deities or other influential entities.

Level 5, 10, and 15 will trigger an Event. These are meant to be lower-impact, and more narratively fun to help move this beyond a "check the box" mechanic. See the details below or add you own.

The Leadership level is a reflection of their investment in your Base of Operations as a center point of their identity. Their investment in the Base of Operations is made possible by accumulation of Victory Points. The below table lists the cumulative VP you have spent/invested in the property as well as the corresponding level of benefits.

  • 200 Total Lieutenants: Level 9 (20), Level 8 (30), Level 7 (50), Level 6 (100)

  • Reach and Research Expands: Each player can Learn a new rare spell (level 10), rare recipe (item 20), or item (level 18)

Perks Footnotes

  • * Level 0 is obtained when you secure the Beach Base

  • ** I recommend using Hero Deck Cards for Hero Points in addition to the normal Fortune Re-roll. Normally, the party gets to draw three cards and all have access to them as another way to spend a Hero Pont. This perk allows four cards to be available.

  • *** The heroes will still roll the Skill check and pay any required labor during Downtime. Therefore, while the days it will take can use Adventuring Days in addition to awarded Downtime, the heroes have to wait until Downtime to spend Victory Points.

  • Events

  • Level 5 (Offer): A message is dispatched and received by the heroes from the Kortos Consortium. It offers praise and assumptions to aligned causes for the lower class and working persons. It flatters the heroes in hopes of have a stronger ally against the controlling interest in Absalom. They offer 80GP to each hero to store some illicit goods that are to go unsearched and again state assumptions that they would be trustworthy not to be overly prying and overly interested in them. (For the GM - these good can be anything, but are generally not intended to be a threat, danger, or inconvenience to the party, rather a situational role-play to see who the PCs want to be.) If they choose to accept the offer, each players earns 80GP. KC will not haggle. If they refuse, they will earn a Level 3 or lower Feat (Ancestry, Skill or General).

  • Level 10 (Research and Discovery): The narrative should be situational to the players background. It could be a dignitary, visitor with some found trove or some games/friendly encounter. You can create a thread, but the goal is to have each hero roll a check covering all three checks. Each check should be rolled at least once, and no players roll more than once.

    Skill Check DC27

    1. Athletics/Acrobatics - could be a wrestling match, a fun gauntlet, a daring feat

    2. Crafting/Performance/Society - could be a song, a rap battle, a work of art, a puzzle to decipher

    3. Arcana, Nature, Occult, Religion) - could be some old artifact, lost knowledge, tomes and scrolls or a vision/dream interpretation.

    Degrees of Success

  • Fail All 3: each hero gets 100gp for effort.

  • Success:

    • Athletics/Acrobatics = Expert (Fighter Master) in a specific common weapon they can use

    • Crafting/Performance/Society = Free Common Item of Level 10 or lower

    • Tradition = Expanded Cantrips (retrain for free if they have this already and learn a new Common level 5 or lower spell.

  • Critical Success:

    • Uncommon weapon

    • Craft = Uncommon item or +1 consumable item

    • Tradition = Uncommon Spell

  • Level 15 (Factions): This event is a challenge from five other factions that do not want to see any power going without check. This is a round-robin tourney where the heroes will fight in a timed match. Each round they win earns one reward: 10k gp, 1 ancestry feat, 1 dedication/class feat.

Upgradeable Map.name: 可升级地图 Upgradeable Map
Upgradeable Map.text:
本节包含费用与技能检定表，以及供GM使用可升级地图工具的说明。

注意：启用视野后，只有GM能够看到这些控制项并与之交互。

升级地产

为了让英雄升级房间，他们需要支付VP、投入所需的休整模式时间、满足熟练度等级要求，并通过一个列出DC的 @Check[type:crafting]。（见表1.0。） 某些升级依赖于其他升级，而另一些则会为队伍提供额外收益。表1.0列出了这些附加条件。如果队伍希望在休整模式期间加快升级进度，或提高技能检定的成功率，也可以选择雇用帮工。随着他们完成升级并获得领导点数，帮工也可以在队伍外出冒险时完成任务（使用相同数量的休整模式成本）

学识技能

虽然列出的DC通常使用制作作为通用且广泛适用的技能，但你作为GM可以根据适用的非特定学识将DC下调2，或根据适用的特定学识将DC下调5。示例：

  • 非特定学识：地形、地区或某种行业（例如工程）

  • 特定学识：海滨地产、防御工事，或由GM决定的其他内容

成功度

  1. 大成功 - 以一半时间完成任务。

  2. 成功 - 消耗资源和时间，并完成任务！

  3. 失败 - 消耗资源和时间，但未完成任务；他们可以再次尝试。

  4. 大失败 - 消耗资源和时间，但未完成任务；他们可以再次尝试，但直到下一次休整模式前，所需时间翻倍（因为他们弄得一团糟、搞坏了某些东西，或者用错了施工方式/顺序）。
